Name: Future Females Foundation
Description:
Future Females Foundation is a nonprofit organisation focusing on empowering women around the world by fighting for an end to gender-based violence and discrimination. 

We work on preventative as well as protective solutions that are safe, scalable and sustainable.

We are technology-enabled, education-focused and community-driven.
We know that in order to really make an impact in combating gender-based violence around the world, we need to tackle the ingrained systemic normatives that cause it.

We envision a world where women are free and able to be who and what they want to be.

Name: Bedaya Team - فريق بداية
Description: فريق بداية كيان موجود في جامعة الازهر بالقاهرة من 23 فبراير 2014 ... كان الانطلاقة الاولي للفريق في التوقيت ده بـ 3 من شباب الجامعة بدأوا يشاركوا بكل قوة وحماسة وكان كل هدفهم انهم يفيدوا كل زمايلهم وكانت طموحاتهم بسيطة بعض الشئ { وهي انهم يسهلوا العملية الدراسية علي الطلبة بتنظيم مجموعة دروس التقوية لهم مجانا } بعد كده بدأت الطموحات تعلي وترتفع وبدأنا نشتغل علي أكتر من كلية في جامعة الازهر زي كليات "" علوم وهندسة وصيدلة وطب بشري وتجارة وشريعة اسلامية ولغة عربية ودراسات انسانية وشريعة وقانون وغيرهم ........."" بعد كده بدأت الطموحات تعلي وبدل ما كنَّا بنعمل محاضرات تقوية بس بقينا كمان بنعمل كورسات تفيد الطلبة في الواقع العملي ونظمنا بالفعل كورسات زي "" ICDL - ENGLISH - HRM - PHOTOSHOP "" وغيرهم كتير وده كله مجاني طبعاً...... حالياً بقي عندنا اهداف وطموحات اكبر بكتير وده كان بسبب برنامج عملناه تحت عنوان "" بروفيسور أونلاين"" وكان عبارة عن شرح وتعريف بمنصات التعليم علي الانترنت المشهور باسم MOOCS وده اتشرح فيه مجموعة كبيرة من المواقع التعليمية زي كورسيرا - وأليسون - وإدكس - وخان اكاديمي ورواق- وادراك وغيرهم كتييير ....... ومن هنا جات فكرة ان احنا نعمل مجموعات علي الواتساب والفيس بوك ونعلم ناس كتير ونزود عندهم المعلومات التقنية واللي هي في مجالات كتيرة ومتعددة زي أمن المعلومات والعمل الحر والتعليم الاونلاين واللغة الانجليزية وغيرهم كتييييييييييييييير ..... ومن تاريخ 18 يناير 2017 بدأنا كمان في فرع جديد للفريق في جامعة كفرالشيخ كـ بداية لتوسيع نطاق عمل الفريق وتقديم مساعدة لأكبر عدد ممكن من الناس

Name: National Indigenous Affordable Housing Corporation
Description: We are the first to create a National Affordable Housing Strategy focused on Canadian’s missing from the middle class. We want to reset housing affordability for low to moderate income Canadians. This is a Canadian Housing Strategy for Real Canadians. We are also the first to provide a National Strategy for Urban Indigenous Affordable Housing.

Name: Social S 體育係
Description:
The power of sport to transform communities, alter mindsets and break down barriers has long been known, but framing this power into a sustainable solution has been a relatively recent phenomenon, and it has proven to be very powerful. 

Social S, a social venture founded in 2019, promote empowerment, compassion and wellness through innovatively blending sports and social intervention. Our consultancy work supports us in providing free sports experiences to low-income groups to reduce social isolation. We also offer employment and on-the-job training opportunities for the disadvantaged (such as early retirees, underprivileged youth, ethnic minorities) to improve social upward mobility, including but not limited to sports ambassadors, coaches and project management personnel.

Social S has received the Social Enterprise Endorsement Mark since its incubation.

Name: The Viney Wallach Foundation
Description: The focus of our support is on the next generation - we want to help young people to achieve their dreams.  To do this, we make concentrated investments in a small, carefully selected group of high performing organizations working in the fields of youth development, career and college readiness, STEM education and career development, and civic engagement.

Name: Nobleconnection
Description: Noble Connection was established in early 2015 by a diverse group of volunteers and from a diverse wider community. Noble Connection is a registered charity in the UK run by volunteers. We aim to develop socially conscious leaders and individuals by building stronger and healthier community and working closely with other community organisations such as relief, cultural, education and organisations/institutions.

Name: Fundación CAI
Description:
Cuenta oficial de Fundación CAI  Descubre nuestra Obra Social!  Porque #NuestroCompromisoEresTú

Desarrolla, promueve y apoya actuaciones sociales, culturales y económicas que tienen como objetivo impulsar y fomentar el desarrollo socioeconómico de la Comunidad Autónoma, con especial atención a aquellas actividades dirigidas a combatir la exclusión, mejorar la calidad de vida de los grupos sociales más desfavorecidos y generar empleo.

Fundación CAI permanece fiel a su compromiso de responder adecuadamente a las necesidades de la sociedad a la que se debe y por la que continuará trabajando en el futuro.

Name: LÖVSTA STUTERI
Description: Lövsta Stuteri has developed Swedish and international equestrian sports since 2000. Lövsta Stuteri offers a wide range of internationally sought-after stallions and we strive to be an international role model for horsemanship and environmental work in the horse industry.

Name: Community Foundation of Hancock County
Description:
The Community Foundation of Hancock County (CFHC) was created by and for the people in our local area in 1992. Its core purpose is to assist you in helping others. CFHC is a nonprofit, public charity that promotes local philanthropy, convenes community initiatives, and supports nonprofit organizations. By focusing on philanthropy with a kind heart and strategic mind we:

• Help people give more efficiently and effectively
• Help donors extend giving beyond their lifetime to their favorite causes both here and afar
• Strengthen nonprofit programs that address community needs
• Strengthen communities through strategic grantmaking
• Convene community groups for common causes

Name: Project Focus
Description: Project Focus is a non-profit foundation established to provide programs and services through a unique learning community to assist young adults with disabilities to connect with each other and integrate into the larger community in order to live their best lives. The foundation benefits the existing programs of Focus Academy, as well as new and future initiatives for young adults with developmental disabilities.

Name: Maatschappij van Welstand
Description: De vereniging Maatschappij van Welstand steunt uiteenlopende projecten en initiatieven op het gebied van Kerken, Samenleving, Persoonlijke ondersteuning, Duurzaamheid en Onderwijs. Dit doen wij door het toekennen van financiële bijdragen, maar ook als metgezel, inspirator en sparringpartner. Bekijk onze trailer 'Maatschappij van Welstand in twee minuten': https://vimeo.com/770739032

Name: Caramel Rock
Description: Caramel Rock is a fashion and creative arts education charity based in Newham, London, providing training and opportunities. We have a strong belief in shaping our future leaders and therefore we offer, in every course, a personal development plan, as well as helping young people. It is also our mission to provide people with the knowledge and expertise of the working world, to help them form a solid foundation for a brighter future. Additionally, Caramel Rock guides young people to achieve both their short and long-term goals. This is accomplished by improving their skills and giving them work experience.

Name: The Rustic Pathways Foundation
Description:
The Rustic Pathways Foundation is a 501(c)(3) organization that aims to harness the passion, energy, and generosity of the Rustic Pathways community to drive forward meaningful community-prioritized development initiatives in the areas of education, infrastructure, community health, social services, and economic development in the United States and abroad.

With thousands of students traveling to over 18 countries and participating in over 200 community projects annually, Rustic Pathways has grown into a powerful force for creating positive change in the world. The Foundation emerged in 2006 as an effort to enhance and sustain the positive impact of Rustic Pathways. From the highlands of Peru to the backwaters of Cambodia's Tonle Sap, we often find ourselves operating in areas where few or no other nonprofits operate. We develop long-term relationships with willing and enthusiastic community partners to implement a range of development initiatives. The Rustic Pathways Foundation leverages the passion and generosity of the Rustic Pathways community to implement the most necessary and impactful community-prioritized initiatives that have been selected only after the most careful consideration and comprehensive stakeholder engagement.

Name: Live The Dream Network
Description:
We utilize community partnerships to provide resources to young adults entering the workforce. These resources enable them to identify and establish a viable career path through certifications or trade, leading to sustained, lifelong success.

Live The Dream Network wants to spread our message of hope and compassion. We believe that a single action can make a difference in the community and that collective action can greatly impact the world. Our team works tirelessly to contribute their part to the greater good through advocacy and outreach activities.

Name: City Dogs & City Kitties Rescue
Description: City Dogs & City Kitties Rescue is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization that rescues adoptable dogs and cats in overcrowded and kill shelters, where resources are severely limited. We offer a lifeline to as many of these wonderful animals as possible. Sadly, many of the dogs and cats that City Dogs Rescue & City Kitties takes in are just days — and sometimes hours — away from being euthanized for no reason other than lack of space. By finding these dogs and cats permanent and loving homes in the DC metropolitan area, we can enrich the lives of humans and their pets.  We welcome help in any capacity — through volunteering, fostering, adopting, sponsoring, and/or donating.

Name: Projeto de Aprendizagem Social FACAMP
Description:
O Projeto de Aprendizagem Social (PAS) é um projeto social que tem como missão tirar a invisibilidade dos funcionários da FACAMP e transformar suas vidas por meio da educação. Além disso, quebramos barreiras sociais e visamos criar uma relação de igualdade entre funcionários e alunos, por meio de aulas de: Português, Matemática, Informática e Inglês oferecidas diariamente pelos nossos alunos voluntários.
Desse modo, nosso lema é "Ensinando e Aprendendo", uma vez que os voluntários entram no projeto com o intuito de ensinar as matérias aos funcionários, mas acabam aprendendo muito mais com a história de vida de cada um deles.

Name: Young & Leaders Organization Inc
Description:
Young & Leaders Organization Inc a pour mission de préparer les jeunes au monde professionnel en passant par des programmes de mentorat en leadership et des formations.
L'organisation collabore avec des associations, ONG et fondations pour impacter au mieux les jeunes dans chaque pays où elle agit et prendre en compte ainsi les différents codes culturels dans leur monde professionnel.
Aujourd'hui elle impacte les jeunes malgaches à l'international (en France comme à Madagascar) via un programme de mentorat en Leadership pour les jeunes filles Malagasy en collaboration avec l'ONG MWA mais aussi grâce à des formations pour de jeunes professionnels.

Name: Women Veterans Giving
Description:
Mission: Connect. Empower. Grow. Accomplish. 
Vision: To connect, empower, and accomplish growth of professional women veterans. 
Purpose:  WVG is one of the very few organizations that currently serves woman veterans.  WVG is committed to narrowing the gap between civilian and military relations, empowering women of all leadership positions, assisting in the reintegration to civilian life, finding fulfillment in the professional world, encouraging a sense of belonging, encouraging entrepreneurs, small business owners and building a supportive educated community.  WVG is women veterans lifting each other up, for all to succeed and create a better community.   
 WVG is committed to raising funds to provide women veterans scholarships for the Unconference, other professional development conferences, small business funding as well as other professional development opportunities.

Name: Pay It Forward Tuesdays
Description: The Pay it Forward Tuesdays initiative is a way to giveback.  We support entrepreneurs, startups, non-profits, and small businesses that need that a little something to move forward but are not sure how to get there.  Through the peer nomination process, businesses have the opportunity to receive 3 hours of one on one coaching with experts in LinkedIn marketing, social media marketing, business coaching, digital marketing, and public relations.

Name: Adote um Focinho
Description: A Associação “Casa da Passagem São Lázaro” esta inscrita no CNPJ sob nº 08.133.246/0001-43, não tem fins lucrativos e foi constituída oficialmente em maio/2006, em São Paulo, por um grupo três pessoas inconformadas com o descaso e abandono ao qual estes animais estão sujeitos. Tomaram para sí a responsabilidade sobre a vida e guarda destes animais até que sejam adotados.

Name: CSFund
Description:
CS Fund seeks to create an equitable democracy and achieve a just transition to regenerative economies and food systems.

The Problem:

The dominant global economic, social, environmental and political systems, policies and practices are not just, equitable, inclusive, healthy or sustainable. These systems are founded on – and continue to advance – white supremacy, oppressive state power, rapacious racial capitalism, and industrialized food systems that cause incredible harm to Indigenous, Black and other marginalized communities and our planet.

Our Approach: Values-Aligned Grantmaking 

- Our grantmaking aligns with our values, including partnership, integrity, learning, and boldness.
- We address critical, under-resourced issues, contend with root causes of problems, and seek systemic solutions.
- Our grantmaking is forward thinking and evolves over time, yet is guided by a commitment to multi-year, long-term general and program support. 
- We serve as a partner and resource to our grantees.

Name: Nuzzles & Co Pet Rescue and Adoption
Description:
We’re Nuzzles & Co, a private, non-profit 501(c)(3) no-kill organization located in Summit County, Utah. In 1990, a group of volunteers founded our organization, originally known as Friends of Animals Utah, so we could come together to find homes for animals in need. Since then, we have found homes for over 20,000 pets.

Our mission is to protect animals. To provide a loving, nurturing place where they can get healthy and learn positive behaviors. And then to find loving homes for each one of them. We also work to educate people on the humane treatment of animals.

What we’ve learned is that, in helping these animals, we are the ones who benefit. As our animals get a second chance at life and find loving homes, they give back that love one-hundred fold. When we put love first, we come together as a community and grow stronger as a society.

Name: Xaleyi - Les Enfants d'Avenir
Description:
XALEYI est une association fondée en 2015,  ayant pour but de promouvoir l’éducation des enfants de primaire au Sénégal. 
Née d’une volonté commune d’améliorer les conditions d’accès à l’éducation et les conditions de scolarisation dans les zones défavorisées, XALEYI  contribue également à l’apport de matériel scolaire mais également au renforcement des capacités des structures locales déjà existantes. 
Notre soutien aux écoles et aux élèves est double puisqu'il est à la fois de nature pédagogique et matériel. 
Nos projets sont pensés et mis en oeuvre avec l'aide et le soutien de nos partenaires locaux. Nous les créons ensemble afin qu'ils répondent le plus précisément aux besoins identifiés sur le terrain. 
Les premières actions ont été menées dans la banlieue de Dakar et se sont élargies, au fil des années, au sein de 5 autres régions du Sénégal dans les région de Fatick, Tambacouna, Ziguinchor, Saint Louis et Thiès.  
Les actions menées par XALEYI  au sein des ces écoles ont, toutes, pour but d'améliorer les conditions de scolarisation des élèves et de répondre aux différents constats faits sur le terrain: 
- fort taux d'échec scolaire- fort taux de déscolarisation /abandon scolaire - difficulté en français (selon les régions)- manque de fournitures scolaires - retard dans les inscription à l'école- manque de supports pédagogiques- manque de mobilier 
Aussi, et par le biais des diverses actions mises en place, nous tentons depuis 2015  de répondre à ces problématiques, avec l'aide de nos soutiens locaux.
Pour ce faire nous avons notamment réalisé les projets suivants:  distribution à chaque rentrée solaire des fournitures, mise en place des cours de renforcement, financement de la construction d'une bibliothèque,  réfection des tableaux noirs et des tables bancs abimés, développement avec l'association SCF un jeu de société ludique, servant de supports pédagogiques aux enfants. 
Ces actions améliorent concrètement les conditions de scolarisation des enfants.

Name: Fashion Fights Poverty
Description:
Fashion Fights Poverty (FFP) is a Washington, DC metro area-based 501c3 that began in 2005 as an annual eco-ethical fashion show on the United Nations Week calendar. Since then, Fashion Fights Poverty has evolved into one of the largest non-profit ethical and eco fashion organizations in the United States raising awareness and contributing to initiatives that encourage and support creative, effective, and sustainable means of challenging poverty. The organization is centered on the principle that the fashion and textiles industries offer unique and effective opportunities to contribute to the alleviation of poverty. Working with designers, craftsmen and consumers, Fashion Fights Poverty urges them to help fulfill this mission through trade, skill-building and community empowerment.

Fashion Fights Poverty collaborates with industry organizations to creatively challenge poverty world-wide, sponsor local DC artisan programs, mentor high school and college students in related disciplines, and educate industry and consumers in eco-ethical business and personal practices. Through the Dress Responsibly Annual Gala and Look book campaign, 

Fashion Fights Poverty provides an outlet for premier fashion houses, as well as local and international artisans and designers, who have demonstrated how fashion, textiles and designs can and will continue to alleviate poverty and empower communities.

MISSION
Fashion Fights Povertyâs (FFP) mission is to raise awareness and to contribute to initiatives that encourage and support creative, effective, and sustainable means of challenging poverty. FFP believes that the industries of fashion, textiles, and design offer unique and effective opportunities for designers, craftsmen and consumers alike to contribute to the alleviation of poverty through trade, skill-building and community empowerment.

Name: alpha Kappa Delta Phi National Alumnae Association
Description:
The purpose of the alpha Kappa Delta Phi National Alumnae Association is to:

-Continue the sisterhood after graduation 
-Provide a support system of sisters residing in cities or Regions outside of their alma mater chapters 
-Provide a network for social and professional/career development 
-Coordinate events for alumnae 
-Facilitate communication with the National Alumnae Board and alumnae nationwide

The alpha Kappa Delta Phi National Alumnae Association is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization and is managed by the National Alumnae Board (NAB), which consists of elected members who volunteer their time and skills to the organization.

Join the Linkedin Group.

Name: Rwanda Action
Description:
Rwanda Action exists to empower communities to relieve poverty. We deliver locally-led and sustainable development projects in the areas of education, disability care and community development in the Rusizi and Nyamasheke Districts of Western Rwanda.

Our ultimate goal is to no longer be needed, so we take great care to ensure all our projects tackle development issues in a sustainable way. This means that after our projects end, the individuals and communities we work with no longer need our support and can independently improve their lives.

Name: The Umbrella Foundation Nepal
Description:
The Umbrella Foundation Nepal is a registered charity in Ireland, US (501(c)), UK, Holland, Australia, Hong Kong and Nepal that has rescued 388 orphaned, trafficked and vulnerable children in Nepal since 2005.

Through various projects such as our Residential Childcare Homes, Family Reintegration and Support, Youth Program1me and Rural School Support Programme we continue to help these vulnerable children and families help themselves.

We are a family-first organisation, working against the negative effects of child trafficking.

Name: Hope Girl Crystal foundation
Description:
Hey

Welcome to the H.G.W.C Foundation 

An organization to improve the lives of the less privileged children and adults individuals around us.

A charitable organization established to assist people who are in need of financial and material support.

We are committed to impacting the orphans, widows and less privileges.

Name: Hansen Little Foundation
Description: The Hansen Little Foundation is a large-scale, active philanthropic undertaking with a singular objective: to create a legacy of significant and positive change that inspires and enables Australians.

Name: Fundación por la Salud Mental de América y El Caribe
Description: La Fundación por la Salud Mental de América y el Caribe (FSMAC) se dedica a mejorar, proteger y promover la salud mental en nuestras comunidades. Nuestro compromiso abarca desde la concienciación y prevención hasta el combate al estigma que rodea los trastornos mentales. Trabajamos para asegurar que cada persona en América y el Caribe tenga acceso a servicios de salud mental de calidad, contribuyendo así a una sociedad más saludable y empática. A través de la educación, investigación, y colaboración con una amplia red de socios, nos esforzamos por construir un futuro donde la salud mental sea un componente esencial del bienestar humano. Únete a nosotros en LinkedIn para conectar, compartir y colaborar en la promoción de una salud mental accesible y sin estigmas para todos.

Name: Happy Hearts Czech
Description: Happy Hearts staví bezpečné školy v oblastech postižených přírodními katastrofami. Nadační fond založily Petra Němcová a Karolína Bosáková, které se po vlastní zkušenosti s přírodní katastrofou rozhodly dlouhodobě a udržitelně pomáhat dětem v zasažených oblastech. Partnerem Happy Hearts je americká nadace All Hands and Hearts. K dnešnímu dni jsme společně postavili 344 škol ve 26 zemích světa. Naše školy slouží více než 121 000 dětem a mají pozitivní vliv na 1 327 000 členů komunity. Školy Happy Hearts přináší naději a dlouhodobou podporu generacím dětí a celým komunitám.

Name: Wave Foundation
Description:
Founded in 2019 with the goal of promoting a wave of kindness, the Wave Foundation seeks to recognize, empower and encourage emerging leaders who are affecting positive change in their communities. 

We provide financial support and resources for individuals who embody the ideals of empathy, integrity, generosity and service and are committed to positively impacting their community by filling their daily lives with acts of kindness.

Name: Network4U
Description:
Somos una comunidad para personas, profesionales, emprendedores y empresarios
que promueve el desarrollo integral de sus miembros fortaleciendo competencias, generando alianzas profesionales
y promoviendo la responsabilidad social
para contribuir con el desarrollo sostenible de nuestro país

Name: ROBIJ - ROTARIER FÜR DIE BERUFLICHE INTEGRATION JUGENDLICHER
Description:
ROBIJ agiert als Brückenbauer zwischen den Institutionen und Organisationen, die unbegleitete minderjährige Flüchtlinge betreuen und lokalen Unternehmen, die Lehrberufe anbieten und via ROBIJ einen Zugang zu einem Pool an potentiell Auszubildenden bekommen, der über herkömmliche Kanäle bisher weitestgehend ungenutzt blieb.

Organisation von Berufserkundungstagen (BET)

- Für Unternehmen, deren Geschäftsleitung sich entschieden hat sich eine zusätzliche Quelle für Lernende erschliessen zu wollen 

- Für Unternehmen, welche die Ressourcen besitzen, einen oder mehrere Berufe auf dem firmeneigenen Gelände / im firmeneigenen Gebäude während eines halben oder ganzen Tag anschaulich präsentieren zu können

Für Unternehmen, welche für die Durchführung der Berufspräsentationen die Koordinations- und Vorort-Unterstützung von ROBIJ in Anspruch nehmen möchten

- Für Unternehmen, welche daran anschliessend dem einen oder anderen Jugendlichen eventuell (bei entsprechender Eignung) die Möglichkeit geben wollen, auch eine mehrtägige Schnupperlehre zu absolvieren

- Für Unternehmen, welche eventuell auch eine Integrationsvorlehre (Kontakt: Bildungsdirektion des Kantons Zürich) anbieten wollen

Name: Turrell Fund
Description: Turrell Fund is a private foundation located in Montclair, NJ supporting organizations which directly provide or foster the creation and delivery of quality developmental and educational services to at-risk children, especially the youngest and their families, in designated areas of New Jersey and the state of Vermont.

Name: JITO UK
Description:
The Jain International Trade Organisation (JITO) is a global network of businessmen, industrialists and professionals.

Brought together to practice and promote ethical business practices, in accordance with Jain principles.The Jain International Trade Organisation (UK Chapter), works to create a business community and connect professionals in the UK through our JITO UK channels and events, with the aim of fulfilling our visions of Seva, Knowledge and Economic Empowerment.

Name: Waccamaw Community Foundation
Description:
Since 1999, local philanthropists have turned to Waccamaw Community Foundation to effectively manage their giving and meet community needs. We serve many people who share a common concern: improving quality of life in Horry and Georgetown Counties.

We make charitable giving simple and effective by offering individuals creative ways to establish and manage funds that will positively impact the Waccamaw Region for generations to come. We also offer advice about projects and organizations that match your areas of interest, helping you meet your philanthropic goals.

Waccamaw Community Foundation has made a lasting impact in Horry and Georgetown Counties. Through the generosity of our donors, we have awarded more than $17.8 million in grants since our 1999. We aim to continue that legacy by helping donors of the Waccamaw Region connect with causes they care about.

Our business hours are 8:30 a.m.–5:00 p.m. Monday through Thursday and 8:30 a.m.-3:00 p.m. on Friday.

Name: Bradley Impact Fund
MECENAT LEONIE
Description:
Mecenat Leonie aims to promote Guidance With Horses (Equine Assisted Activities) for the benefit of disabled and fragilized people. Excellence of practices is mobilized for acting in 3 directions : institutional & political support and recognition, beneficiaries’ access, practitioners support. Furthermore Equine Welfare according to Equine Scientific Ethology, is transversal and fully demanded, both for efficiency and for safety.
Guidance With Horses considers Humans & Equines as Partners building their own Relationship. Hence this creates and develops a Link between both that enables therapeutic, educative and social impacts. Outcomes expresses itself with a global state wellness and a social insertion improvement. Therefore it also facilitates any social interaction, particularly team building and motivation regarding the strong mirror effect with the Horse and the emotional communication.

Name: John James Foundation
Description:
The John James Memorial Foundation is an independent medical charity based in Canberra, with a membership of 140 doctors who are specialists in their chosen field of medicine.  Through the Foundation’s Board, there has been hard work over a number of years to establish a base of charitable and support programs, both in the ACT and further afield.  With the continuing support of its members, the Foundation is able to provide services distinct from other medical and health related charities.

The Foundation’s flagship program is the Specialist Volunteer Program.  Each year a number of medical teams, consisting of specialist doctors and support staff, volunteer their services to travel to remote areas of Australia.  These teams provide real benefits through the supplementary medical services provided in areas that generally do not see this level of support.  The Katherine District Hospital in the Northern Territory, and the remote communities that it services, have been the centre of much of this volunteer work.

The Foundation is recognised by the Australian Taxation Office as a deductible gift recipient and a tax-free not-for-profit charity.  The Foundation has a small team of dedicated staff at its offices in the Peter Yorke Building on the John James Healthcare Campus in Strickland Crescent, Deakin, in the Australian Capital Territory.

Name: The Pierre & Tana Matisse Foundation
Description: The Pierre and Tana Matisse Foundation was founded in 1995 by Maria-Gaetana (Tana) von Spreti Matisse, wife of the late art dealer and collector, Pierre Matisse. In accordance with the founder’s belief in the importance of the arts in each person’s life, the Foundation makes grants to organizations and institutions providing arts education in New York City. The Foundation awards three types of grants all designed to emphasize accessibility to art and its practices to promote identity, creativity, and cultural literacy. In 2021, the Foundation distributed 95 grants totaling $4.5 million.

Name: Students Shoulder to Shoulder
Description:
We are a community of partners working together to inspire and support generations of ethical leaders.

Our programs put high school students shoulder-to-shoulder with inspirational leaders. They help us build the next generation of the world’s visionaries.

We help school leaders develop and nourish global citizenship education and ethical leadership programming for students and faculty.

We work with like-minded businesses and philanthropists to create partnerships within the broader universe of our shared values.

Name: Women Veterans Giving, Inc
Description:
Mission: Connect. Empower. Grow. Accomplish. 
Vision: To connect, empower, and accomplish growth of professional women veterans. 
Purpose:  WVG is one of the very few organizations that currently serves woman veterans.  WVG is committed to narrowing the gap between civilian and military relations, empowering women of all leadership positions, assisting in the reintegration to civilian life, finding fulfillment in the professional world, encouraging a sense of belonging, encouraging entrepreneurs, small business owners and building a supportive educated community.  WVG is women veterans lifting each other up, for all to succeed and create a better community.   
 WVG is committed to raising funds to provide women veterans scholarships for the Unconference, other professional development conferences, small business funding as well as other professional development opportunities.

Name: Mammogram Poster Girls Inc.
Description: Our mission is to raise money to fund mammograms for under- and un-insured women (and men) in the Dallas area.

Name: harp-weaver LLC
Description:
harp-weaver is a philanthropic advisory firm based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.  We offer a broad array of philanthropic services including establishing a foundation or donor-advised fund, defining mission, managing operations, involving the next generation & maximizing intended impact through grants & investment.

Think of harp-weaver as your personal philanthropic staff, supporting your interests professionally, ethically and cost-effectively. harp-weaver works closely with donors and their advisors to develop tailored giving plans and creatively executes against those plans. We are network weavers, bringing people and organizations together to address issues you care about.  You can be more strategic with your charitable dollars and more fulfilled with your involvement.

Name: Advocacy in Technology
Description: Advocacy in Technology's online blog provides a holistic perspective to its readers on technology, its inequities and injustices. As we are in a constant state of learning and cultivating perspective ourselves, we hope that you can learn with us!

Name: Celestial Manna Inc
Description: Celestial Manna is a faith-based nonprofit organization founded in 1986. Our mission is to transform surplus into support, ensuring that excess resources reach those who need them most. Join us in our efforts to empower communities and make a tangible difference in the fight against hunger. Together, we can create a brighter future for all.

Name: De Mano a Mano AC
Description: La Fundación DE MANO A MANO AC MX nace en Ciudad de México, días después del #19s con el objetivo de construir casas dignas. A 5 años de su creación hemos evolucionado de la mano de Campbells Foundation Soup para alimentar a más de 70 niños y niñas apadrinados y sus familias. En Hermosillo, Sonora y en la Ciudad de México. Si quieres ser padrino o madrina de esta causa por favor entra a nuestra página web.
Location: Ciudad de México, Ciudad de México

Name: CapCon Foundation
Description:
Our Mission

To eradicate poverty through economically sustainable, market-based initiatives which improve the lives & livelihoods of the world’s most vulnerable populations.

Our Values

We must help: we can (and should) work to increase the well-being of the most vulnerable populations.
We must begin at birth: we want to live in a world where every child has access to basic healthcare, a quality education, and economic security.
We must equalize opportunity: all adults should have a chance to find a rewarding livelihood through access to markets.
Markets provide the best tool: market-based innovation and entrepreneurship are the best way to get this work done.
Markets aren’t perfect: governments and other non-market based actors play a critical role in facilitating success through advocacy, policy, rule of law, and security.

Our Focus

Health Care

Access to basic health care enhances opportunity by treating curable diseases as well as timely treatment of injury and trauma.

Income Enhancement

Creating a culture of entrepreneurship, combined with access to capital, will provide well paying jobs and increase opportunity for all.

Education

Education provides a foundation for prosperity by creating a skilled workforce, which in turn attracts investment and opportunity.

Product Innovation

Access to labor and energy-saving devices at affordable prices can make a huge difference in quality of life for many marginalized populations.

Name: Ecuadorian Association of British Columbia
Description: La Asociación Ecuatoriana de British Columbia tiene como misión integrar a los ecuatorianos residentes en esta provincia a través de diferentes actividades que fomenten la fraternidad y la conservación de nuestras tradiciones.

Name: Liberty Hospital Foundation
Description: The Liberty Hospital Foundation was established in 1984 to provide financial support to Liberty Hospital by funding programs that have a positive impact on the patients and employees of the Hospital, and therefore the community and the region.

Name: The Blue Arbor Foundation
Description:
The Blue Arbor Foundation generates initiatives designed to break sectors and barriers. Individuals are connected by passion, driven by the desire to act, networking to create change through innovative pilot projects.
We strive to be, act, and belong.

Name: Takis Shelter
Description:
Takis Shelter is a no-kill, no-cage shelter in the island of Crete, Greece. The situation in post-crisis Greece is really bad for dogs and cats, with millions of them roaming the streets. Takis build this shelter single handedly 6 years ago and started saving stray animals from the street. The shelter right now has reached its capacity and is home to 350 dogs, 50 cats, 7 goats and 2 sheep and more come in every day. Takis is especially known for taking in animals that everybody else would put to sleep. The shelter is considered a role model in how animal shelters should be. With no cages, chains or euthanasia.
To find out more about Takis shelter:

https://takisshelter.org/

https://www.facebook.com/TakisShelterCrete/

http://www.youtube.com/c/TakisShelter

https://www.instagram.com/takisshelter/

Name: Salem Angels
Description: The Salem Angels' mission is to walk alongside children, youth and families in the foster care community by offering consistent support through intentional giving, relationship building and mentorship.

Name: Apollo's ARC Animal Rescue & Care
Description:
We are currently closed and are helping the rescue community in other ways. A former registered non-profit rescue who believes that every animal deserves a chance and the right to a good life. 

Please consider donating or sponsoring one of our animals today!

Venmo: @apollosarc
PayPal: apollosarc@gmail.com

Name: Blagomay Charity Fund
Description: Основний напрямок нашої діяльності- допомога дітям в дитячих будинках. Кожен день наша команда робить все можливе для того, щоб змінити долю цих дітей, дати краще майбутнє, психологічну підтримку, освіту, турботу, адже кожна дитина заслуговує на щастя. Ми щиро віримо, що разом ми зможемо змінити світ накраще.

Name: Association Rêves de Fandié
Description:
A travers cette association, nous souhaitons apporter aux enfants des villages reculés de Guinée des moments de partage, en dehors de l'école.

Nous souhaitons à notre échelle leur faire découvrir de nouvelles activités et impliquer nos enfants en donnant du sens à leurs dons.

Comment? En créant du lien entre enfants Français et Guinéens. Chaque enfant qui fera un don pour Fandié enverra sa photo et un petit mot ( sous la forme de dessin ou de carte postale etc...) L'enfant qui le recevra enverra à son tour une photo de lui avec le cadeau.

Nous souhaitons avant tout placer les enfants au centre de cette démarche.

Name: تفسير القرآن الكريم: بذور الرشد
Description:
بذور الرشد: التوجيه العملي للآية القرآنية، ما بعد اكتمال التفسير
معالجة للقرآن الكريم في سياق معرفيٍّ، فكريٍّ، حضاريٍّ مؤسَّس على "نموذج الرشد"، بمشاركة ثلة من الأساتذة والباحثين

Name: SEAL Veterans Foundation
Description:
To maintain the connections that keep the brotherhood strong.

To better serve our SEAL, Underwater Demolition Team, and Special Warfare Veterans, the UDT-SEAL Association established the SEAL Veterans Foundation. 

The Foundation raises funds for the Association’s Life Assistance, and Scholarship programs. Our goal is to keep the Brotherhood and their families strong and secure.

Name: Challenge du Ruban Rose
Description: Course et marche pour le dépistage du cancer du sein

Name: Honduras Good Works
Description:
Honduras Good Works is a 501(c)3 charitable organization actively supporting villagers in the rural region of El Paraiso, Honduras. We do this through our annual medical brigade, ongoing hygiene education and water filter program, and scholarship program for secondary education. Our purpose is to foster the HEALTH of Hondurans who have no access to medical care and clean water, to support EDUCATION for underserved Honduran youth, and to nurture the SPIRIT of Hondurans that we serve.

Our programs work towards providing a better quality of life for each Honduran we serve and the ability to become independent. Thanks to the support of our donors, the medical teams are seeing an improvement in the health of villagers, the water filter program is helping to provide clean water and improve health in communities, students are graduating from high school and getting jobs that will help lift them and their families out of poverty, and our university students are getting much-needed assistance.

Name: Invest for children
Description:
Invest for children (i4c) es una fundación internacional sin ánimo de lucro que trabaja para conseguir una vida mejor para las personas con discapacidad intelectual.

¿Qué es el Venture Philanthropy?

El Venture Philanthropy (o Filantropía de riesgo) es un campo de la filantropía donde se aplican los modelos del Capital Riesgo en el sector de las organizaciones y fundaciones sin ánimo de lucro. Hay muchas formas de ejercer el Venture Philanthropy, éstas son algunas de las acciones que hacemos en i4c:

Sensibilizamos a la sociedad, “lanzando” mensajes de integración mediante la realización de libros, DVD y publicaciones en prensa.
Ayudamos a las fundaciones a conseguir recursos recurrentes y a alcanzar notoriedad.
Apoyamos proyectos de inserción socio-laboral.
Conectamos empresas y fundaciones para promover la integración.
Empujamos a todos para que la educación y la formación sean lo más importante para construir un futuro digno.
Animamos a que las personas con discapacidad intelectual aprendan, disfruten y se beneficien de la práctica del deporte.

Name: Kenosha Community Foundation
Description: The Kenosha Community Foundation is a not-for-profit organization that manages over $11 million in charitable endowment funds.  From the proceeds of the endowment, the Foundation provides grants to not-for-profit organizations in the Kenosha, Wisconsin area and awards scholarships to local students.

Name: APAE de Joinville
Description: A APAE de Joinville é uma organização não governamental, sem fins lucrativos, que atua no Município há 56 anos, de forma gratuita, prestando serviços a pessoa com deficiência intelectual e/ou múltiplas e/ou espectro autista e suas famílias que frequentam nossa Instituição

Name: Women in Science Switzerland
Description:
Since 2012, Women in Science SWITZERLAND (WiSS) aims to bring the field of biological and scientific research into the lives of women in the community by engaging with women scientists in the region. It is at the centre of an initiative at the University of Lausanne to foster stronger relationships between members of the broader community and important research in genetics and biology, that impacts humanity.

Through interactions fostered by the Annual WiSS Lecture and Luncheon as well as other events co-supported by WiSS, we bring together people from diverse expertise and interests among the corporate, private and public sectors to create one community that can benefit from current knowledge of the latest technology and breakthroughs in the field of genetics such as cancer research, biological innovations and other research. Women in Science creates a platform for scientific, corporate, philanthropic and other interested women to come together for stimulating dialogue and engagement. 

All proceeds garnered through WiSS events support community educational programmes specifically for children (see below), public lectures, as well as grants for researchers in the field of genetics at the Centre for Integrative Genomics at the University of Lausanne. 

L’éprouvette is a scientific education centre for children and non-scientists at UNIL, which explores the interface between science and technology. The centre conducts hands-on experiments linked to DNA expression, translation and analysis, using sophisticated laboratory equipment and technology. Students are exposed to the principles of genetics, introduced to disease risk and learn how scientists gain knowledge of genetic information through stimulating, interactive and fun workshops!

Name: The Keswick Foundation
Description:
The Keswick Foundation (KF) was established in 1979 by Sir John Keswick and his daughter, Maggie Keswick Jencks. 

Sir John was the Chairman of Jardine Matheson Ltd from 1952 to 1956. He spent much of his life in China and Hong Kong where he developed a deep regard for all things Chinese. As part of his legacy, Sir John wanted to give something back. This desire resulted in the setting up of KF. 

Today, KF is managed by a team of dedicated volunteers and professionals who are committed to the vision set forth by Sir John and Maggie in facilitating long-term and impactful service development and capacity building to address social needs in Hong Kong and Mainland China.

Name: TEDxKoenigsallee
Description:
Wasw bedeutet das also, grenzenlos? Und warum stellen wir es in den
Mittelpunkt einer TEDxKoenigsallee Konferenz?
Sucht man nach Synonymen für grenzenlos, findet man Ausdrücke
wie: unendlich, unermesslich, unergründlich, bodenlos, unbestimmt,
ewig oder sogar unbegreiflich.
Sieht das nicht so aus, als sei der Begriff genauso schwer zu
definieren wie die Gegenstände, die es beschreiben würde? Es ist
diese Ambivalenz, die uns fasziniert. Er beschreibt zugleich die
Vieldeutigkeit unserer Welt und die Divergenz - ja sogar die
Entgegengesetztheit - der scheinbar endlosen Möglichkeiten, aus
denen wir wählen können.
Wir wollen einige der vielen Facetten dessen erkunden, was
grenzenlos für uns, unsere Gesellschaft und die Welt, in der wir leben,
bedeutet.
Begleitet uns auf unserer Entdeckungstour im Juli.
Willkommen an Bord. Auf zu neuen Horizonten.

Name: The HAND Foundation
Description:
We are an advisory, advocacy, and grant-making organization dedicated to building better communities by enabling the growth and advancement of individuals. We advise and invest in seven areas of social change that build, inform, and strengthen the individual. Our focus areas include:

ADVANCEMENT OF PHILANTHROPY + VOLUNTEERISM
We focus our efforts on strengthening diaspora communities, and helping young people cultivate the lifelong habit of giving—areas that instill a philanthropic ethic for future generations.

EDUCATION
We invest in forward thinking programs that celebrate and deliver individual learning and leadership opportunities. In addition, we sponsor individuals of Persian heritage in their pursuit of higher learning in the fields of economic policy.

ENTREPRENEURSHIP
We invest in organizations that cultivate entrepreneurial thinking, problem-solving, and opportunity globally.

DEBATE + ADVOCACY
We enable the exploration and development of social policy that is focused on creating better outcomes, by investing in organizations that fuel conversation, policy-making, and social action.

PREVENTION OF CHILD SEXUAL ABUSE
We support organizations that are focused on preventing abuse through institutional programs and media that provide tools for identifying potential threats and acting accordingly.

ADVANCEMENT OF WOMEN + GIRLS
We support organizations that provide mentorship and create opportunities for girls and women who need encouragement for the path they’re on, or support to change course.

CRISIS MANAGEMENT + REBUILDING
We support organizations that focus on the health and healing of communities in transition so that life in these areas can return to a productive, peaceful, and promising future.

For more information please see:
http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_HAND_Foundation

Name: R.I.S.E. Northwest
Description:
R.I.S.E. Northwest aims to foster resilience, strength and endurance in children who have lost a parent. 

We pledge to provide free services through mentoring and peer support groups to help grieving children navigate their lives, in childhood and beyond. 

We are committed to meet children where they are in the grieving and healing process. 
We will rally around them, provide a safe space to grieve and heal. 
We will make sure that, despite the obstacles, these children will RISE.

Name: Nadácia otvorenej spoločnosti - Open Society Foundation
Description:
Sme mimovládna organizácia, ktorej poslaním je presadzovať hodnoty otvorenej spoločnosti, vytvárať ľuďom príležitosti na jej skvalitňovanie smerom k väčšej otvorenosti, transparentnosti a presadzovaniu rovnosti šancí.
 
NOS - OSF pôsobí na Slovensku od roku 1992  ako súčasť rodiny nadácií známych ako Open Society Foundations, pôsobiacich vo viac ako 70 krajinách na celom svete. Od júna 2012 je pridruženou organizáciou siete OSFs (www.opensocietyfoundations.org).

///

The OPEN SOCIETY FOUNDATION (NOS-OSF) is a non-governmental organization that promotes the ideals of an open society and creates opportunities for people to improve society by making society more open, transparent and accepting of equal opportunities for all people.
 
NOS-OSF was founded in 1992 as a part of a network of foundations known as Open Society Foundations. Open Society Foundations work in more than 70 countries worldwide. Since June 2012, OSF Bratislava is an affiliated organization to the OSFs network (www.opensocietyfoundations.org).

Name: Programa VioPet
Description:
El Observatorio de Violencia Hacia los Animales es una red multidisciplinar de profesionales e instituciones de bienestar animal y humano que se ocupa  de la intersección entre el maltrato a animales, la violencia de pareja, el maltrato a menores y a mayores, a través de investigaciones, políticas públicas y programas destinados a la comunidad. Asimismo, también cuenta con expertos en criminología, policing, veterinaria y ciencias jurídicas que estudian la violencia hacia los animales como ilícito.

Creemos que el bienestar humano y animal están vinculados íntimamente y que la  prevención de la violencia familiar y comunitaria puede conseguirse mediante protocolos que incluyan una perspectiva multiespecie. El Observatorio cree que a través del  reconocimiento y la integración de estos conocimientos en políticas públicas y buenas prácticas, los humanos y los animales estarán más seguros y sanos. Por este motivo se creó el Programa VioPet, asociado al SAF-T en EEUU y al Onewelfare Phoenix en UK.

Name: Dragonfly Global Cooperative
Description: Instigating kindness, projects, and programs to improve the environment, health, and education of women and children globally.

Name: Impact 100 East Bay
Description:
Membership in Impact100 East Bay provides women an opportunity to be part of a greater effort by funding transformational community projects in a way that is far more impactful than one can achieve alone.  It also provides an opportunity to meet other dynamic women who are passionate about becoming more aware of and responding to the unmet needs of those in Alameda and Contra Costa counties. 

Founded in late 2016 by Nancy Clark and a like-minded group of women, Impact100 East Bay proudly awarded its first grant in September 2017.  By 2021 our membership had grown sufficiently to award two grants for the first time, reaching a 5-year grant total of $500,000.  Qualifying nonprofit partners submit projects for annual consideration in the areas of Arts & Culture, Education, Environment, Recreation & Preservation, Family, and Health & Wellness.

The Impact100 model was founded by Wendy Steele in 2001 in response to the feeling that women’s roles in philanthropy needed a new way to be expanded and encouraged.  Since its inception, Impact100 has donated more than $105 million to worthy causes through its more than 60 chapters worldwide.

Name: Phoenix Club of Jackson
Description:
The Phoenix Club of Jackson is a registered 501(c)(3) organization for young professional men that raises money in social settings for the benefit of the Boys & Girls Clubs of Central Mississippi. The Phoenix Club parent organization was founded in Memphis, Tennessee, in 1955, with the Jackson Chapter being founded in 2007. The Phoenix Club of Jackson has raised over $500,000 since inception. 

Through popular events such as Seersucker & Sombreros, Speakeasy Soiree, The Phoenix Classic Golf Tournament and The Jackson Tacky Christmas Party as well as our annual Christmas Card Campaign, the Phoenix Club is able to add to the social opportunities in Jackson while also raising awareness and funds for a very worthy cause. 

The Phoenix Club provides a dynamic mix of young professionals ages 25-35. Among Phoenix Club alums in the Greater Jackson Area are numerous non-profit board members, community leaders, businessmen, entrepreneurs, accountants, attorneys, bankers, sales professionals, financial advisors, architects, engineers, real estate professionals, insurers, governmental staffers and physicians. Our members make long lasting friendships while giving back to the Jackson community.

Name: James Graham Brown Foundation
Description: Through philanthropic investments in Louisville and across Kentucky, the James Graham Brown Foundation strives to create a brighter future for people in its communities and to elevate the Commonwealth in the eyes of the world.

Name: Northside Funders Group
Description:
We are a collaborative of 19 corporate, family and community philanthropic and public sector investors who are committed to aligning strategies and resources to catalyze comprehensive, sustainable changes in North Minneapolis. We work to:
- Build Thriving Learning Communities
- Build Social Capital 
- Build Thriving Economies

Name: Foyer Tanjomoha
Description: Le foyer Tanjomoha est une œuvre lazariste qui accompagne les pauvres et les plus abandonnés de la région de Vohipeno, au Sud-Est de Madagascar. Au fil des ans, le foyer a répondu à de nombreux besoins et c’est ainsi que sont aujourd’hui accueillis quotidiennement 500 tuberculeux, enfants malnutris, jeunes handicapés, étudiants, orphelins, jeunes de villages de parias, malades mentaux, pauvres.. Mais l’œuvre de Tanjomoha s’étend aussi dans la région et le foyer apporte de l’aide à deux écoles, une cantine de brousse, une prison, un hôpital, un foyer pour jeunes handicapés, un centre d’éducation spécialisé, un centre de rééducation pour jeunes enfants et porte de nombreux projets de développement.

Name: OceansAsia
Description:
To investigate and research wildlife crimes, exposing and bringing to justice those destroying and polluting marine ecosystems. To uphold the highest level of integrity, relying exclusively on factual, intelligence-based conservation.

We use the latest technologies, creative ingenuity, and a wide range of investigative and research techniques to identify criminal activity in the fisheries supply chain, and to keep one step ahead of those under investigation.

Name: Saskatchewan Roughrider Foundation
Description: The Foundation’s mission is to empower youth and communities through the passion of Rider Nation, teaching them skills like leadership, resilience and responsibility. We help to build on the strengths of our youth ensuring they have an opportunity to reach their full potential, as well as empower them to achieve their goals.

Name: Angelic Warrior Foundation
Description:
Angelic Warrior Foundation, Inc. (AWF) was founded in June 2020, following the passing of Ms. Angelica “Angel” Duggins in May 2020, due to Colon Cancer. Angel battled for almost 3 years, and often expressed during her journey the desire to help other patients who didn’t have the support she had, or medical insurance. 

Our mission at Angelic Warrior Foundation is to fulfill Angel's wishes to increase Colorectal Cancer Awareness and to provide the emotional & financial support that patients, their caregivers, & their families need in order to thrive.

Name: Crisis Control Ministry
Description:
Crisis Control Ministry's mission is to assist people in crisis to meet essential life needs and to become self-sufficient.

We believe that food, shelter, and medicine are basic human needs and that we can meet the needs of people in Forsyth County who are in crisis and dealing with unfortunate circumstances. As a trusted resource since 1973, we serve residents of our community and provide over $3 million worth of services annually.

Name: Association Coeur D'Ingenieur
Description: Soucieux de contribuer à la promotion du savoir vivre ensemble dans un monde rempli d’opportunités, l’Association Coeur d’Ingenieur s'est donnée pour mission de venir en aide aux personnes démunies en Afrique.
Location: Yaoundé, Douala, Ebolowa, et zones rurales du Cameroun

Name: Stichting LACH
Description:
Een LACH voor iedere dag! Alle Rotterdammers, die wel een beetje vrolijkheid kunnen gebruiken, brengen wij een LACH! Dit kan zijn in de vorm van een gave activiteit, het bouwen van een bibliotheek, een wandeling op het strand, samen chocomel drinken in het park of keihard BINGO roepen - ook als dit nog niet nodig is. Graffiti spuiten op een verlaten pand met stoere senioren? Kom maar op ;). Voor stadsbewoners van 0 jaar en ouder.
Op ontzettend veel gezichten een LACH te toveren, dat is wat we willen! Dus als jij jouw LACH ook wilt laten schateren, ben je meer dan welkom om met ons mee te LACHen.

Het is heel simpel: je helpt mee bij een van onze vrolijke missies en/of met het geld dat je graag doneert, steun je een fantastisch project. Of meerdere. En het fijne is: 100% van jouw bijdrage gaat 100% naar een prachtige LACH!

MeeLACHen mag!

Name: The First Tee of Greater Kansas City
Description:
The First Tee of Greater Kansas City is one Chapter of a national/international non-profit youth initiative called The First Tee. The First Tee of Greater Kansas City positively impacts the lives of nearly 3,000 young people of all ethnic and economic backgrounds, an opportunity to develop life-enhancing values such as confidence, perseverance and judgment through golf and character education. By engaging young people in a combination of life skills, leadership and golf activities, they also are exposed to positive traits that will help them achieve success in life. In the process, participants become valuable assets to their community.  The First Tee Life Skills & Golf Experience is the unique component that sets The First Tee apart from many other successful junior golf programs.

Mission Statement
To impact the lives of young people in Greater Kansas City by providing learning opportunities and educational programs which promote character development and life-enhancing values through the game of golf.

Name: Cambodian Rural Development Team (CRDT)
Description: The Cambodian Rural Development Team (CRDT) is a Cambodian NGO which aims to lift communities out of poverty in support of conservation through participatory community based approaches. It undertakes community development, natural resource management, and social enterprise projects throughout the North East of Cambodia. CRDT was registered with the Ministry of Interior as a local NGO in 2005. CRDT has deep technical expertise and extensive experience in environmentally appropriate agricultural development, strengthening food security, supporting market linkage and income generation, natural resource management, non-timber forest products, water and sanitation, renewable energy technologies, eco-tourism and community empowerment.

Name: BuyForGood
Description: BuyForGood est une association 1901, site de vente en ligne de produits gastronomiques français et artisanaux. Les bénéfices sont reversés  à  100% à l'association de votre choix parmi celles agréées

Name: المجتمع التنموي
Description: نسعى لإثراء القطاع غير الربحي عبر مبادرات مجتمعية ملهمة ومساحات حوارية تعزز الأثر وتفتح آفاقاً جديدة للتعاون والتطوير

Name: ASAH - Association au Service de l'Action Humanitaire
Description:
ASAH, organisation non gouvernementale (ONG), est un réseau d'associations d'inspiration chrétienne, agissant en particulier dans l’urgence, le développement, le plaidoyer, l’environnement ou la solidarité au Nord et au Sud.

L'objet d'ASAH est de favoriser l'échange, la réflexion et la collaboration entre les associations humanitaires et autres organismes, de mutualiser et renforcer l'efficacité et la qualité des actions de ses membres, et plus largement des acteurs de solidarité, afin de répondre aux besoins réels des populations les plus démunies.

Name: Akonadi Foundation
Description:
Akonadi Foundation is one of the first place-based family foundations to make racial justice a central focus of our giving. We follow the lead of organizers on the frontlines of the movement for a racially just Oakland. 

For more than two decades, we have invested audaciously in Black and people of color-led organizing to make Oakland a beacon of justice and liberation for the nation. Since 2000, Akonadi has given more than 1,800 grants totaling $43 million to organizations that center power building and organizing in Black communities and communities of color. 

Our philanthropy is focused on organizing, advocacy, and healing and culture to build the power and voice of communities of color. Learn more at akonadi.org.

Name: Mindful Philanthropy
Description:
Our mission is to catalyze impactful funding in mental health, addiction, and well-being. 

We envision a world in which all funders are invested in solutions that integrate mental health and well-being so that all people have equitable access to the tools and resources they need to be well.

Name: The Patchwork Collective
Description:
The Patchwork Collective is a family philanthropic fund supporting locally-led solutions to global challenges. We fund a diverse range of innovative organizations tackling inequities in the human condition, whose programs are developed in close collaboration with the communities affected. 

 

Our mission is to provide funding and other forms of support to organizations intent on increasing equitable access, among all people, to better health, education, food security, opportunity, justice, and harmony with their environment.

Name: MAS Pago por Resultados
Description:
MAS (antes SIBs.Co) es el Programa de Pago por Resultados en Colombia, liderado por Fundación Corona, el Laboratorio de Innovación del Banco Interamericano de Desarrollo (BID Lab) y la Secretaría de Estado para Asuntos Económicos (SECO) de la Embajada Suiza en Colombia.   
                                   
MAS Pago por Resultados es un programa que busca transformar la gestión de los proyectos sociales en Colombia mediante la implementación de mecanismos de pago por resultados (MPR). Junto a sus socios, el Programa ha contribuido a establecer a Colombia cómo referente regional en el uso de estos mecanismos, promoviendo programas sociales con mayor eficiencia, costo-efectividad y la generación de impacto medible.  

A través del trabajo colaborativo entre el sector público y privado, MAS Pago por Resultados busca impulsar una transformación estructural en la gestión de recursos para alcanzar objetivos de desarrollo sostenible en la región.

Name: LA Promise Fund
Description: We are an education non-profit in Los Angeles. Our mission: to prepare students for success in college, career & life. www.lapromisefund.org

Name: Rugby French Flair
Description:
L’association Rugby French Flair est née en 2010 de la volonté de quelques amis de faire partager à des enfants défavorisés dans le monde, les valeurs du rugby et ses vertus sociales et de les soutenir matériellement.
Elle compte aujourd’hui plus de 200 membres, tous bénévoles, dont une cinquantaine d’anciens internationaux du rugby.
L’association utilise ses réseaux dans les médias et les entreprises, pour lever des fonds et  collecter  des équipements en France et dans les pays visités. Ces moyens sont ensuite   attribués  à  des  organisations qui, sur le terrain, s’occupent de ces jeunes.
L’objectif final est de proposer à ces enfants, souvent orphelins, des valeurs et une activité face à la violence constituant leur cadre de vie (trafics, prostitution, recrutement dans des groupes armés, …), dans un contexte d’extrême pauvreté. Ces opérations sont menées en collaboration avec les responsables économiques, sportifs, politiques en France et à l’étranger, ainsi que la Diplomatie Française qui a toujours été active à nos côtés dans cette démarche.

Name: Fundación Mar Adentro
Description:
Fundación Mar Adentro (FMA) es una organización sin fines de lucro creada en el año 2011, cuyo propósito es generar experiencias colaborativas que vinculan arte y ciencia para desarrollar aprendizajes, conciencia y acción por el cuidado de la naturaleza.

Nos motiva:
Conservar los ecosistemas y su biodiversidad, a través de una mirada integral del territorio y sus cuencas, que va desde los glaciares hacia el mar.

Además, desarrollamos iniciativas pedagógicas replicables que promuevan la reflexión, creatividad y cuidado de la naturaleza, a través del arte y su cruce con otras disciplinas.

Impulsamos proyectos que vinculen arte y ciencia, como medio de investigación, experimentación y desarrollo del pensamiento crítico, para generar nuevos diálogos en relación al cuidado de la naturaleza.

Realizamos trabajos transdisciplinarios y colaborativos en diversas regiones de Chile, integrando sensibilidades y conocimientos vinculados al territorio, para comprender la interrelación de todos los elementos de la naturaleza.

Name: Corey C. Griffin Foundation
Description:
The Corey C. Griffin Foundation is a 501(c)(3) public charity that partners with leading nonprofit organizations to change the trajectory of the lives of kids in need. 

The Foundation provides strategic financial support to Boston’s most innovative non-profits focused on at risk youth as well as those with medical challenges. Through our high-impact partnerships with leading academic and healthcare organizations, we are providing critical opportunities to “Corey’s Kids”, and building upon Corey Griffin’s legacy of giving back while encouraging others to do the same.

Created in memory of Corey C. Griffin (1986-2014), The Corey C. Griffin Foundation relied upon Corey's incredible passion for life and uncommon dedication to philanthropy, to map out the guiding principles of the foundation: improving the lives of primarily Boston-area children through strategic partnerships with the city’s leading educational and healthcare institutions, with an emphasis on faith-based initiatives. We believe that every child should have the opportunity to succeed, irrespective of their financial or health circumstances; our partnerships are helping make this goal a reality.

In large part due to Corey’s incredibly wide network of friends and close acquaintances, the Corey C. Griffin Foundation has grown considerably in five years.  The impact of the Foundation’s financial support can be seen across dozens of carefully selected partnerships, with children across the Greater Boston area benefiting on a daily basis.  Known lovingly as ‘Corey’s Kids’, it is through these children that Corey Griffin’s legacy will live on forever.

Name: Glioblastoma Foundation
Description: GLIOBLASTOMA FOUNDATION INC is a national non profit 501(c)(3). The Glioblastoma Foundation funds research for new therapies for glioblastoma, provides patient services for those impacted by glioblastoma and raises awareness of this rare stage 4 tumor. The company is headquartered at 2451 Croasdaile Farm Parkway Suite 109 Durham, North Carolina, United States.

Name: Maverick Collective
Description:
Maverick Collective is a community of women philanthropists making catalytic investments in health and reproductive rights to advance gender equality. Members collaborate closely with experts and consumers through a unique Experiential Philanthropy model that invites hands-on-engagement in the projects they fund. Our programs are designed to fund projects on the cutting-edge of global health, while pushing the boundaries of philanthropy. 

Founded in 2013 by PSI in partnership with Melinda French Gates and Her Royal Highness the Crown Princess of Norway, Maverick Collective has mobilized over $100 million in resources and helped nearly 7 million people live healthier lives.

Name: Commerzbank-Stiftung
Description:
Die Commerzbank-Stiftung steht als Unternehmensstiftung für die gesellschaftliche Verantwortung ihrer Stifterin. Im Geiste des Corporate Citizenship bekennt sich die Commerzbank mit der selbständigen Stiftung zu einem über ihre eigentliche Geschäftstätigkeit hinausgehenden, wirkungsvollen Engagement als „guter Bürger“ für das Gemeinwesen.  Mit der Stiftung möchte sie zur Lösung gesellschaftlicher Probleme in Deutschland beitragen und sich damit als aktives Mitglied einer zukunftsorientierten und gleichzeitig solidarischen Gemeinschaft zeigen. Die Stiftung ist damit Teil der Nachhaltigkeitsstrategie des Unternehmens. 
Seit ihrer Gründung am 26. Februar 1970, mit einem Startkapital von 5 Millionen D-Mark, hat sich die Commerzbank-Stiftung zu einem wichtigen deutschlandweiten Förderpartner mit einem Stiftungskapital von über 60 Millionen Euro entwickelt. Die Unternehmensstiftung hat viele nachhaltige Partnerschaften aufgebaut und sich so als feste Fördergröße etabliert. In den mehr als 50 Jahren ihres Bestehens unterstützte sie erfolgreich weit über 1.000 Projekte mit insgesamt an die 40 Millionen Euro. Ihr Partnerschaftsnetzwerk reicht von Kulturinstitutionen über gemeinnützige Vereine bis hin zu Wissenschaftseinrichtungen.

Name: The DeBruce Foundation
Description:
At the DeBruce Foundation, our mission is to expand pathways to economic growth and opportunity.  We do this by:
Changing how people pursue careers...
-  With the Agilities.org Resource Center, we help individuals unlock their potential to find new career pathways. 
Working with employers and agencies to identify workforce gaps...
-  Through partnerships, we work to highlight industries and fields in need of talented individuals for high-demand, well-paying jobs.

Name: Allied Forces Foundation, Inc
Description:
Allied Forces Foundation (AFF) is a British-American foundation that works to raise awareness and funding for wounded service personnel, veterans and their families, particularly those affected by the conflicts of Iraq and Afghanistan.

A primary focus of AFF is to reinvigorate the spirit of comradeship and teamwork that so many wounded, ill and injured (WII) serving and veterans miss when forced to return to a desk job or civilian life. This is achieved through enabling participation in different challenges, both in the US and UK, including the Marine Corps Marathon in Washington, D.C. and the Cateran Yomp in Scotland. These challenges deliver an opportunity for WII to come together with other military and former military who are facing similar experiences. It enhances the US/UK relationship between WII personnel from both nations who fight together on the battlefield and the Yomp provides the chance to share stories and advice as they fight for recovery.

Name: Kura Tāwhiti - Canterbury Community Foundation
Description:
Kura Tāwhiti - Canterbury Community Foundation helps create, support and build the foundations for a better Ōtautahi Christchurch, and the surrounding Selwyn and Waimakariri Districts.

Community (City) Foundations are relatively common-place around the world and other regions in New Zealand have recognised the need for a “place-based” charitable organisation to enable donors to give directly to their city or region. 

Kura Tāwhiti actively collects, manages and distributes funds for community projects, charities, and non-profits of all sizes to help them continue to deliver their important mahi.

We accommodate a range of giving models to enable diverse contributions to the long-term good of communities, such as bequests, endowments, trust transfers, diaspora or expat giving and corporate partnerships. Contributions can be ‘tagged’  to a sector (e.g. community recreation and sport projects), a community within the geographic area (e.g. Opawa), or to a range of local charities. Contributions can also be ‘untagged’ and spent at the discretion of the Foundation Trustees under a developed set of policies. The Foundation will always ensure donor wishes are met.

Name: Fundação St. Paul's
Description: The St Paul’s Foundation provides fully funded places for the education of talented children living in Brazil, whose family income cannot cover the costs of an international education.The foundation believes that, with access to an excellent curriculum, outstanding pastoral support, within a safe and nurturing environment, scholars can truly fulfil their potential and make a significant contribution to the school and thereafter within their own communities and the wider world.

Name: Global Water Challenge
Description: Global Water Challenge (GWC) is a coalition of leading organizations deploying expertise and networks to achieve universal access to safe and affordable drinking water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH) in communities around the world. Since 2006, GWC has positively impacted more than 2 million people across Africa, the Americas and Asia with clean water access. GWC's campaigns, tools, data, and best practices reach millions more. In collaboration with multi-sector partners, GWC engages for action – catalyzing financial resources and driving innovative programming for sustainable, local solutions.

Name: The Christchurch Foundation
Description:
The Christchurch Foundation helps create, support and build the foundations for a better Ōtautahi Christchurch, and the surrounding Selwyn and Waimakariri Districts.

Community (City) Foundations are relatively common-place around the world and many other regions in New Zealand have recognised the need for a “place-based” charitable organisation to enable donors to give directly to their city or region. 

The Christchurch Foundation actively collects, manages and distributes funds for community projects, charities, causes and not-for-profits (both large and small) in delivering the important work that they provide.

A wide range of giving programmes is available to enable contributions to the long-term good of communities, such as bequests, endowments, diaspora or expat giving and corporate partner programmes. Donors’  contributions can be ‘ tagged’  to a sector (e.g. recreation and sport community projects), community within the geographic area (e.g. Opawa) or to a range of charities. Contributions could also be ‘ untagged’  and spent at the discretion of the Foundation Trustees under a developed set of policies. The Foundation will always ensure donor wishes are met.

Name: Vibrant Village Foundation
Description:
Founded in 2010, the Vibrant Village Foundation is a private foundation that provides direct assistance and grants to vulnerable communities in 20 countries around the world. 

We provide support in the areas of nutrition and health, clean water, agriculture, education, arts and economic development. Our goal is to achieve results that are measurable and long-term to improve individual lives.

Name: Nevada Women's Fund
Description: Nevada Women's Fund works with community donors and supporters to raise financial contributions and other resources to support northern Nevada women and families. We identify critical social needs and address them through award of individual education scholarships and community grant making to community non-profit organizations that share the Nevada Women's Fund mission to strengthen and empower our community.

Name: Longview Philanthropy
Description:
Longview Philanthropy designs and executes bespoke giving strategies for major donors. Our grant recommendations focus on global challenges that could make or break our collective future, including safely navigating emerging technologies and fostering a society with a more long-term outlook. On the model of venture capital, we seek to uncover neglected opportunities with the potential for lasting impact at scale. Everything we offer is free-of-charge, independent, and reviewed by external experts.

"Longview Philanthropy is the best resource in the world if you want to do the most good with your giving."
William MacAskill, Professor in Philosophy, University of Oxford

"Longview Philanthropy has directly and significantly influenced my giving, and I couldn’t possibly recommend them more highly to other donors."
Justin Rockefeller, Philanthropist & Rockefeller Brothers Fund Trustee

"Longview Philanthropy are the leading philanthropic advisors on work to protect the long-term future, and have enabled multiple donors at scale to have a truly outsized impact." 
Jaan Tallinn, Philanthropist, co-founder of Skype & co-founder of the Centre for the Study of Existential Risk at the University of Cambridge

Name: Centre lasallien
Description:
Un avenir brillant!
Le Centre lasallien est un centre socioéducatif dédié au développement intégral des jeunes, et d’une façon particulière et inclusive auprès des plus vulnérables.
Par notre action préventive et éducative, auprès des jeunes et de leur famille, nous visons à réduire les inégalités et à augmenter les chances de réussite sociale et scolaire. Dans un environnement stimulant et en collaboration avec les organismes du milieu, nous outillons les jeunes à devenir des citoyens engagés, proactifs et responsables.

Name: Children's Rights Innovation Fund (CRIF)
Description:
The Children’s Rights Innovation Fund is a collective challenge to reinvigorate and transform the global children’s rights field by building power with youth activists and their allies. We are a grantmaking fund and donor learning community.

In partnership with funders, youth activists, practitioners, and allies, we cultivate innovation and collaboration to dismantle the root causes of children’s vulnerability and strengthen the root drivers of their well-being.

Name: Impact Charitable
Description:
As a philanthropic capital intermediary, we bridge funders and communities, designing responsive pathways that unlock and accelerate capital to both nonprofit and for-profit ventures, projects, and funds.

We help DAFs make direct investments, we help Foundations make PRIs, and we host Special Purpose Funds that aggregate capital bringing people together to move more money.

We’re able to move money at accelerating speeds year over year because of our flexibility, creativity, and responsiveness, always looking for ways to say yes to impact.

We recognize that there are gaps between traditional investing and traditional philanthropy and the solutions needed to solve complex problem so we're dedicated to helping fill these capital gaps by collaborating with public and private funders who want to mobilize their assets into communities in creative and impactful ways.

As a nonprofit and donor-advised funds provider, we offer a suite of philanthropic tools and capital-ready investment opportunities, but we specialize in partnering with funders who are looking to meet an unmet need with a creative—even unconventional—tool. For over a decade, we’ve been innovating how we invest in our community, looking across sectors and investment types for deep impact.
 

To learn more information, visit www.impactcharitable.org.

Name: Stichting Stokroos
Description: Stichting Stokroos is een onafhankelijke organisatie die beeldend kunstenaars, vormgevers, ontwerpers en ambachtsbeoefenaars ondersteunt bij de ontwikkeling van hun praktijk. Stichting Stokroos werd geïnitieerd door Paul Deiters.

Name: U.S. Endowment for Forestry and Communities
Description: The Endowment works collaboratively with partners in the public and private sectors to advance systemic, transformative, and sustainable change for the health and vitality of the nation's working forests and forest-reliant communities.

Name: Fundația Umanitară ASSIST
Description:
