Name: i-Miracle 5.2
Description:
i-Miracle 5.2 – ENABLE TO PLAY A new project is born: i-Miracle 5.2 turns little heroes into superheroes and is ready to draw and produce children's prosthetic arts. 

“To the infinity… and beyond!”: the revolutionary motto of Buzz Lightear – the famous ranger from Toy Story – teaches to go beyond one's own limits, to fight against any kind of obstacle and to overcome any difficulty, ready to take part in a great adventure. Why a simple toy could speak such significant words? Toys are a child’s world. A world that makes him happy, that engages him and sometimes makes him tired. It’s a fantastic world, but at the same time so real and so true. It would be great to find toys that are able to improve disability, changing it in a great ability. 
Here is a tangible idea which helps to understand and accept the person in its entirety, with the originalities and peculiarities that make them unique. Hulk's Arms, Catwoman's or Wolverine's Claws, the fast legs of Superman or Batman will give birth to new superheroes, completely original, more and more aware of their great potential and strength, transforming the great rehab game into action, preparing them to cope with every situation. 
i-Miracle 5.2 proposes implants able to show everything from someone else's point of view, to understand and accept the differences. Fantasy gives us the ability to turn thoughts into action and to invest resources, expertise and professionalism. The world of specialist medicine is changing thanks to 3D printing, a new technology that allows physicians and engineers to develop completely customized supports. Why wait to change the world of our children? You don't need the bite of a spider to become Spiderman!

Name: Blue Health Brazil
Description:
O Projeto Blue Health Brazil visa gerar incentivo de longevidade nas pessoas, alertando sobre experiências amargas a serem evitadas contra a saúde física e mental, mostrando dados comprovados por diversas fontes nacionais e internacionais sobre produtos, componentes e atividades que estão tendo avanços e resultados com êxitos mundialmente.
Mostramos aqui informações verdadeiras, através de muita pesquisa e conhecimento, para que tenhamos uma sociedade menos doente, mais feliz e com mais tempo de vida de maneira saudável.

Sistema de Alimentação e Equilíbrio Psíquico e Emocional: 
Nosso projeto é lançado em dois blocos, sendo o primeiro com foco no sistema de alimentação e suplementação, e o segundo com foco no processo do equilíbrio emocional, psíquico e comportamental humano.
Em breve enviaremos várias dicas gratuitas sobre alimentos anti-inflamatórios, anti-oxidantes e que podem ajudar muito a prevenir as doenças crônicas e fatais.

Corpo Saudável - Experiências com Alimentação com foco no sistema digestivo:
Estudos internacionais comprovam: quanto mais alimentos inflamatórios nós ingerimos no nosso dia a dia, mais tendência às doenças crônicas, inflamatórias, e mais tendência ao acúmulo de gordura visceral que consequentemente causará mais inflamação interna.
Cuidado com os alimentos industrializados "normais" que você compra no supermercado, e com os alimentos cheios de agrotóxicos dos quais estamos acostumados a consumir no Brasil, já que os orgânicos são para os ricos. 
Em breve vamos disponibilizar o nosso livro gratuito contendo mais de 15 itens alimentares super importantes para nos ajudar a manter o nosso corpo longe de processos inflamatórios.
Ame-se, cuide-se e ouça o que seu corpo está pedindo. Ele quer um pouquinho da sua atenção.
Curta nossa página, compartilhe e acompanhe nossa comunicação, cuja causa é justa e cheia de amor para você!

Name: SOS DE MADAGASCAR
Description: Nous apportons une aide financière urgente à des familles souvent mono-parentales pour l'alimentation, la santé ou l'éducation de leurs enfants ! Aidez nous à poursuivre notre action dans la Grande Île se classant à juste titre au 4ème rang des pays les plus pauvres au monde. Notre aide est versée directement au bénéficiaire.

Name: Quaker House of Fayetteville
Description: Quaker House of Fayetteville is a nonprofit organization  providing counseling to active duty and veteran  military service members and their families and advocating for greater peace in the world.  Quaker House was founded through a combined effort of several Quaker meetings to meet these needs during  the Vietnam War and has been in continuous operation since that time.

Name: Penn Arab Student Society
Description: PASS is a forum to explore and promote Arab heritage and culture at Penn. It further acts as an umbrella organization for the Penn Arab Student Society Alumni Network.

Name: Order of the Golden Wattle
Description:
On 6 March 2022, Jesse J. Fleay and Christian Miller-Sabbioni formed the Order of the Golden Wattle. The aims of the order are to advance the culture of Australia, and to further promote reconciliation between First Nations and other Australians, and mutual respect and tolerance between different cultural and socio-economic groups within Australia, through the advocacy of a federal constitutional referendum. This constitutional referendum is characterised by the following elements:

1. A voice to parliament for First Nations Australians.
2. The abolition of The Crown.
3. The replacement of The Crown with a directly elected head of state, who is an Australian citizen.

Name: Isat Sans Frontière
Description:
Isat Sans Frontière est l'association humanitaire animée par les étudiants de l'Institut Supérieur de l'Automobile et des Transports (ISAT, Nevers). Association à but non lucratif, elle a pour objectif de former et de préparer des équipages pour le raid humanitaire étudiant Le 4L Trophy, tout en apportant son aide aux élèves nivernais en difficulté scolaire.

Chaque année : 

- ce sont plusieurs équipages ISF qui partent en route pour le Maroc. Aventure sportive, humaine et solidaire, Le 4L Trophy a pour but premier le développement de l'éducation des populations défavorisées du désert marocain. Ainsi, après de longues préparations techniques, administratives et la recherche de financements, les participants prennent la route du désert marocain avec leur Renault 4L, chargée entre autres de 50kg de fournitures scolaires. (Plus d'informations : www.4ltrophy.com)

- ce sont des dizaines de séances de soutien scolaire dédiées aux élèves de la région neversoise en difficulté scolaire. Une fois par semaine, dans les locaux de l'ISAT, les adhérents mettent leurs connaissances à profit de ces derniers. L'association se voulant à vocation sociale, l'adhésion à ces séances de soutien scolaire est très abordable et tout fond récolté est reversé à l'association en vue de préparer des équipages au 4L Trophy.

Name: Harden Foundation
Description:
The Harden Foundation was established in 1963 by Ercia and Gene Harden. Their hard work and good fortune in agriculture in the Salinas Valley produced the legacy that has, through their foresight and generosity, become today's Harden Foundation. The Harden Foundation is committed to build and expand upon the visions of Mr. and Mrs. Harden.  

We take pride in providing funding to a variety of qualified nonprofit organizations in Monterey County and we hope to continue to develop other resources that will benefit and aid them in their missions to serve our local communities.  The foundation recognizes that the dynamics and size of Monterey County will continue to present new challenges to the organizations that serve our communities.  The Board remains committed to funding programs that serve only Monterey County residents and they will continue to research additional ways to help the nonprofit community to interact and communicate with one another.

The Harden Foundation headquarters, historic Wind Engine and auxiliary buildings, the Harden home, and the beautifully manicured gardens are situated on six acres that now represents an island in the middle of a residential development in the North Salinas area.

Name: Glam U, Inc
Description:
Glam U, Inc is a transformative youth empowerment organization dedicated to inspiring, uplifting, and building the confidence of young girls. With a steadfast commitment to nurturing their potential, Glam U offers innovative programs designed to empower girls to embrace their uniqueness, develop essential life skills, and become future leaders in their communities.

Glam U, Inc stands as a beacon of hope, inspiration, and empowerment, dedicated to creating a brighter future for girls. Together, let us empower, uplift, and transform the lives of young girls, one Glam Girl at a time.

Name: Team Giv Håb
Description:
Team Giv Håb er Børn, Unge & Sorgs velgørenhedscykelhold,

Hvert år cykler alle Team Giv Håbs lokale hold turen 'Danmark Rundt' og skaber synlighed og samler penge til Børn, Unge & Sorg - fordi ingen børn og unge skal stå alene med sygdom og sorg

Name: uOttawa Team Diabetes
Description:
uOttawa Team Diabetes is a local chapter of Diabetes Canada comprised of students at the University of Ottawa. Our mission is to raise awareness for diabetes, and promote a healthy active lifestyle as a means to decrease the incidence of diabetes and to improve the quality of life for all.

We are involved with active fundraisers to send runners to the annual Ottawa Race Weekend Marathon as part of Team Diabetes, and host many health promotion workshops as well as physical exercise events, including volleyball tournaments and yoga lessons for the community throughout the year! Show your support and join us in our journey through healthy active living and our fight to prevent and cure diabetes!

Name: Peace Brigades International - Belgium
Description: PBI est une organisation non-gouvernementale (ONG) qui promeut la non-violence et protège les défenseurs des droits humains depuis 1981. Nous envoyons des volontaires internationaux dans des zones de conflit, proposant un accompagnement protecteur aux défenseurs des droits humains menacés par la violence politique. Nous nous différencions par une approche non-partisane et une attitude de non-ingérence.

Name: Oregon Space Camp Adventures
Description:
Oregon Space Camp Adventures (OSCA) is a Non-Profit organization dedicated to inspiring kids to pursue careers related to Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics.

Our Mission is Stem. Making STEM Oriented educational experiences, Like Space Camp, available to kids in the Pacific Northwest

Since 1995 OSCA has been organizing trips to space camp for students from the 4th to the 12th grades and provides for a wide range of educational opportunities for kids.

OSCA also through the generation donations of our sponsors makes financial aid scholarships available to those that qualify.

Name: American Friends of PSE
Description:
American Friends of PSE (Pour un Sourire d'Enfant) is a nonprofit organization  dedicated to helping the most impoverished children in Cambodia, through education and work.
As a US tax-exempt organization 501(c)3, we invest in proven, holistic and sustainable programs ranging from nutrition, education, health care, protection to vocational training. 
These programs have been developed by “Pour un Sourire d’Enfant” ("For a Child's Smile") over 25 years in Cambodia, and have been recognized for their excellence by the international community and the Cambodian government, having saved more than 11,000 children from destitution.
American Friends of PSE is an advocate for the poorest of the poor in Cambodia.

Name: Acción Familiar Euskadi- AFAE
Description: Acción Familiar Euskadi - AFAE- es una ONG fundada en 1987 y reconocida como entidad de Utilidad Pública por su labor social de atención a las familias vascas y sus necesidades con la prestación  de servicios de formación especializada, atención psicológica personal, de pareja y familiar y varias acciones de sensibilización dirigidas a las familias y a la sociedad en general, a los medios de comunicación y a otros agentes y entidades con las que trabaja en red.

Name: Just a Kid
Description: Being part of the Just a Kid movement you’re helping a kid in need so they can have a shot at accomplishing their dreams.

If at least 100 women donate $100 that would total $10,000 to a local charity!

Description: St. John United Way works to advance the common good by focusing on education, income and health. These are the building blocks for a good life- a quality education that leads to a stable job, enough income to support a family through retirement, and good health.

Name: Kappa Alpha Theta, Epsilon Tau Chapter
Stewart Woods & Associates
Description:
A boutique fundraising consulting firm for not-for-profit organizations.  We specialize in encouraging peak performance by solving leadership challenges, encouraging best practices, advising on development campaigns, improving development techniques as well as strengthening development planning, systems and administrative services. 

SWA has over 50 combined years of experience overseeing annual, endowment and capital campaigns for public benefit organizations. SWA's principals, have helped raise almost $500 million for educational institutions, arts organizations, health care facilities and environmental causes. SWA builds exceptional organizational capacity through the installation of a system of metrics, best practices and training designed to secure an organization's long-term sustainability. 

SWA affilates with associates who have expertise in executive coaching, volunteer engagement, development strategy, major gift fundraising, marketing, communications and organizational development.

Name: Tiny Paper Cranes
Description:
...spreading hope and happiness, one tiny paper crane at a time...

------------
An origami crane is the symbol of hope and peace. The most famous story being that of Sadako and the Thousand Paper cranes (link: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sadako_Sasaki). I've heard many stories of folding cranes for cancer victims, giving them at weddings or other similar gestures of spreading hope or happiness.

I fold tiny paper cranes and give them to anyone, including strangers to put a smile on their face.

------------
Our mission is to share something beautiful and positive with the world and connect with people on a personal level.

We will travel the world and meet as many different people as possible to distribute these tiny paper cranes. My goal is to have as many of these people come back to my website site to share their crane and/or a story. I also encourage people to fold their own small origami cranes and share it.

We create art for charity, for marketing events and to promote origami as an art form.

------------
Tiny Paper Cranes is a collaborative, charitable, social community focused origami art.

Name: Africa Phambili
Description: Africa Phambili is a brand promoting the interests of African youth, both at home and abroad, as a source of inspiration, comfort, support and, most importantly, knowledge. We are also a brand celebrating the unique perspectives, beauty, music, culture, sights, success and excellence of Africa and its people.

Name: Oummanity Project
Description: Oummanity Project est une Association Lyonnaise Loi de 1901 à but non lucratif ayant pour but d’apaiser les souffrances et venir en aide aux nécessiteux, d’apporter un soutien humanitaire de toute nature aux personnes en difficulté.

Name: The Fish Giver
Description:
Fighting against poverty and hunger is dear to our heart. Educate and raise awareness is our goal. Our final objective is to provide aquaponics systems to families in need, enabling them to eat healthy while providing them with work and an income to meet their basic needs in life. Using aquaponics by growing plants and raising fish in perfect harmony and respect for the environment, for all its benefits to physical and mental health.

Lutter contre la pauvreté et la faim, c'est ce qui nous tient à cœur. Éduquer et sensibiliser le public, c’est notre but. Notre objectif final est de fournir des systèmes aquaponiques à des familles démunies, leur permettant de se nourrir sainement tout en leur procurant un travail et une source de revenu afin de subvenir à leurs besoins essentiels à la vie. L’utilisation de l’aquaponie par la culture de végétaux et l’élevage de poissons dans une parfaite symbiose et le respect de l’environnement, pour tous ses bienfaits sur la santé physique et mentale.
http://leteaser.fr/thefishgiver

Name: KANGXING Foundation
Description:
Beijing Kangxing Foundation was established on October 12, 2018. It was registered and established by the Beijing Municipal Civil Affairs Bureau. Its business scope is to subsidize the lives of poor families, subsidize medical treatment for poor patients, subsidize poor students to go to school, subsidize poor school infrastructure improvement, and subsidize nature Disaster relief activities.

The name of the foundation is "Kang Xing", and its meaning is to enable the poor to have equal and healthy rights in life, and to work together to help achieve the goal of a well-off society in an all-round way.

Mission
Use actions to create a public welfare platform for co-construction and sharing to help realize a well-off society in an all-round way

Vision
A healthy heart is fearless, and a walker has no boundaries

Purpose
For the purpose of carrying out charitable activities, not for profit
Promote the development of public welfare undertakings by funding public welfare projects such as poverty alleviation

Beijing Kangxing Foundation actively responds to the call of the party and the government, and strives to build a joint and shared public welfare platform to provide medical subsidies for the poor, supplemented by exchange activities, promote the interaction of stakeholders in this field, and gather the capital's social charity forces. Form a joint force to serve the development of public welfare undertakings and work hard to realize a well-off society in an all-round way.

Name: Extended Hands
Description: We are a non-profit organization based in Montreal focused on meeting the needs of low income households while giving them the social skills needed to properly reintegrate in our society. We treat our neighbors as we would have them treat us. Our organization is based on principles of accountability, integrity, honesty and transparency. We have strict policies and budgetary reviews in place to ensure that all forms of assistance go to the people in need while maintaining very low administrative costs.

Name: Death Done Differently
Description: Death Done Differently exists to help the people of Northern Indiana return to natural, sacred ways of engaging with death and mourning in a death phobic culture. Whether through public educational events or individual consulting, Death Done Differently is capable of serving at any point in the life cycle by providing non-medical forms of logistical, emotional, and spiritual support.

Name: SESO : Social Enterprise Stimulus Ottawa - Stimulus des entreprises sociales Ottawa
Description:
Led by the Ottawa Community Loan Fund (OCLF), a group of organizations have come together to support the social entrepreneurship ecosystem in the Ottawa area. SESO provides social entrepreneurs of all kinds with the opportunity to receive both grant and loan capital to invest in starting, growing and sustaining their business. We want to promote sustainable business models in Ottawa, and support business that are having a social, environmental or cultural impact. Not only do we provide capital to fund your venture, but support as well thanks to our partnerships with the Centre for Innovative Social Enterprise Development (CISED) and mécènESS! SESO wants to foster a prosperous network of social enterprise in Ottawa. Join us as we share relevant resources and encourage collaboration and opportunity! 


Sous le leadership du Fonds d'emprunt communautaire d'Ottawa (FECO), des organisations se sont réunies pour soutenir la mise en place d’un écosystème à l'entrepreneuriat social dans la région d'Ottawa. SESO fournit aux entrepreneur-e-s sociaux la possibilité de recevoir des subventions et des prêts qui seront investis pour le développement, la croissance et le maintien de leur entreprise. Nous souhaitons promouvoir des modèles d’affaires viables à Ottawa, tout en appuyant des entreprises qui ont un impact social, environnemental ou culturel. Non seulement nous fournissons du capital pour financer votre entreprise, mais nous vous offrons un accompagnement personnalisé grâce à nos partenaires mécènESS et le Centre for Innovative Social Enterprise Development (CISED)! SESO favorise la croissance  d’un réseau des entreprises sociales à Ottawa. Rejoignez-nous afin que nous partagions des ressources pertinentes et encourageons la collaboration et les opportunités !

Name: GVNGTogether, Inc.
Description:
GVNGTogether sparks next generation philanthropy through experiential education and collective giving. 

Young professionals get together with the mission of learning about and furthering philanthropy. Each gives a minimum contribution to be pooled together and donated to the non-profit organization(s) of the group’s choice and everyone gets an equal vote. The group collectively determines which organization(s) to give to, while (having fun and) learning: how to evaluate non-profit organizations; what you need to know to be on a non-profit board; and how non-profit organizations run.

We're taking the “I” out of giving back. Join us!

Name: Photo Shoot for a Cure
Description:
Photo Shoot for a Cure is a series of photo shoot-based events benefiting The Michael J. Fox Foundation.  Our next event will take place Saturday, September 22, 2018 at District Hall in Boston.

We are partnered with Boston Magazine, Sephora Prudential Center, James Joseph Salon, Polished Nail Boutique, Blo Blow Dry Bar Seaport, Following//Boston and 22 photographers and filmmakers. Our party features photo shoot booths for fashion/style photos, headshots, family portraits & more -- as well as makeovers, Silent Auction, photo and art galleries, speeches and appetizers. 

You can read all the details here:
photoshootforacure.com

You can see our video from 2017 here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r3L9mcUggVU

You can support our team by making a donation here:
http://fundraise.michaeljfox.org/tf-2018/photoshootforacure

And you can read some recent press here:
http://adorama.com/alc/how-22-photographers-are-t…
http://bostonmagazine.com/arts-entertainment/2017/…
http://bostoncommon-magazine.com/photo-shoot-for-a-cure
http://parkinsonslife.eu/diana-levine-taking-photos-for-a-cure-p…
http://jewishboston.com/photo-shoot-for-a-cure-pho…

Photo Shoot for a Cure is produced by advertising and editorial photographer Diana Levine, in support of her Mom, who was diagnosed with Parkinson's disease 15 years ago. To date, we have raised over $45,000 for The Michael J. Fox Foundation.

Name: MissionBridge Philanthropy LLC
Description: MissionBridge is a philanthropic advisory firm that works with indiiduals, families and private foundations seeking to achieve meaningful and effective philanthropy. We provide a full range of services to help our clients define their philanthropic goals and aspirations, analyze funding opportunites, and implement giving programs that can lead to transformative social change.

Description: general

Name: Somebody's Mama
Description:
Somebody's Mama exists to bring awareness to issues affecting women across the globe, to create a community of people who care deeply about finding real solutions, and to turn ideas into action. 

Our vision is to invest in partnerships that empower women across all cultures and people. 

We do this by raising awareness and funding global projects focused on women's healthcare, education, economic empowerment, and ending violence against women.

Name: Well of Change
Description:
WELL OF CHANGE is a non-profit organization making it easier for individuals and businesses to raise money for charity by donating their skills and services.

Our goal is to make it easier for everyone to give back to the community.  We welcome all type of talents and services including graphics design, photography, music lessons, tutoring and more!

Name: FUNDACIÓN JARDÍN
Description: ONG destinada a estimular la Creatividad del individuo en función del beneficio social colectivo.

Name: FUTR Philanthropic Services
Description:
FUTR provides philanthropic consultative advising to both families and institutions:
Families --> Effective family legacies use charitable giving as a progressive, leadership development, and responsibility program for its younger members. Each generation may make different choices about how to best impact the community.

Institutions --> The key to development and fundraising is the relationships you have with your donors and potential donors. Our aim is to partner with clients to provide the right combination of tools, techniques, and personal interaction to help them maximize the value of their relationships. FUTR is structured to offer its services and advice in conjunction with donors’ existing advisor relationships – so as to maintain existing relationships and not alienate them

Name: CASD-Népal
Description:
CASD-Nepal est une organisation à but non lucratif, créée par des personnes qui croient que le changement peut commencer avec une petite aide à ceux qui en ont le plus besoin.

CASD-Nepal travaille avec des partenaires locaux et des bénévoles volontaires, dont le travaille et l'ambition consiste à améliorer la qualité de vie, la santé, l'éducation et les droits de la femme, notamment chez les populations pauvres dans les territoires ruraux, dans tout le pays.

Name: Women Behaving Baldly
Description:
Women Behaving Baldly is a global project connecting bald women and their stories through social media and live interaction. This multi-tiered process will evolve through varying genres including visual art, stage, and screen.

Our focus is to create a supportive outlet for women to share their emotional journeys – reminding them that they are not alone. The popular opinion in the land of big hair is that, “you should just get over it;” but through this extensive interview process, we hope to prove that this is not just about hair.

Women Behaving Baldly depicts the provocative “day in the life” portrayal of the bald woman in her most vulnerable skin. This delicate exploration, by means of Skype, provides an intimate look into the emotional layers of the body’s largest organ.

We are very proud of all of our participants for the bravery and enthusiasm they have shown with this project. Upon being interviewed, many have gone bald publicly for the first time and have even become leaders of change and awareness! Women Behaving Baldly celebrates your boldness and wants to remind you that you matter, your emotions are valid, and your story is worth telling.

The Women Behaving Baldly brand was birthed by two respected women in the Alopecia Community, Margaret Baker and Laura Hudson, who bring these women’s stories of humor, pain, and sarcasm to life. These bald women have ripped away the curtain of judgment, wiped off the fake smile, and presented Alopecia for what it really is (and what it is not). Their eyes have been dried and their heads have been lifted. Their fight has just begun!

Name: Party Farms Animal Sanctuary
Description: We’re a nonprofit animal sanctuary.

Name: Stichting Clear Water Initiative
Description:
Stichting Clear Water Initiative is set up to raise awareness for the pressing issues on proper sanitation, clean drinking water and polluted oceans.

We want to raise this awareness by means of setting up various events throughout the year. The money raised at these events will be solely for helping to fund projects to build wells, proper sanitation and projects concerning beach and ocean clean ups and in setting up an educational programme for childern on the impact of marine litter.

Name: HATCH
Description:
Hatch is a workforce development nonprofit with the vision to strengthen our community and empower opportunity youth to lead self-sufficient lives. We accomplish this by combining life skills workshops with hospitality and culinary training, into an intensive eight-week life-changing program.

We believe—and our research holds—that our work not only has an immediate impact on our students but also long-term, positive effects on their children, other family members, peer groups, and the community at large.

Name: Columbus Wisconsin Downtown Development Corporation
Description: Columbus Wisconsin Downtown Development Corporation owrking to improve Downtown Columbus Wisconsin since 1992.  Non-Profit owner of two buildings.

Name: And Now She Rises
Description: Founded by survivors, And Now She Rises is a Minnesota-based 501(c)3 non-profit working to build awareness of Intimate Partner Violence and provide assistance to women in domestic abuse emergency shelters.

Name: Someday Is Now
Description:
Someday Is Now is a Global Online Community and Website with a mission to provide inspiration, support and resources for turning your "someday" aspirations into your Someday Is Now achievement.

We believe there’s something in the air
That’s stirring our hearts
Calling out to our souls
And reminding us of our dreams.
Faded, but not forgotten.

We believe it’s the beginning of a new era.
To be bold, to be brave, and to behold
That our best years are still to come.
That we can achieve
What we were born to do.

We believe every moment in our life 
Got us to this point.
All the good times and the hard times
That make us who we are.

NOW’s the time to stop re-living our memories
And start living our dreams!

We believe we must stand together
To re-set our course 
Not a second to lose.

And if you think someday you’ll follow your heart,
Stop Watching-Start Living-Someday Is Now!

Name: Blackwood Advisors
Description: Blackwood Advisors is a philanthropy education and advisory firm that serves individuals, families and institutions. Our partners will gain deep access to our sector knowledge and leadership. We help philanthropists use their money, time and brainpower to create meaningful change in Black communities. We aim to design meaningful philanthropic experiences that maximize the social impact of our clients’ resources. As thought partners, we aid in the analysis of our clients' values and priorities to enhance the quality of each investment.

Name: At the Table Colorado
Description:
At the Table Colorado is an inclusive, ethnically diverse, multigenerational dialogue that reaches the full spectrum of the socioeconomic scale, empowering people to create the change they wish to see in their neighborhoods, communities and regions. This volunteer driven initiative, powered by partnership, unites people of diverse views and inspires possibilities.

“Table” is based on a civic engagement concept developed by the Chicago Community Trust as On the Table. Since the Trust launched the initiative in 2014, more than 25 communities have successfully replicated the project. “Table” is a proven and powerful civic engagement tool that has sparked a national movement. At the Table Colorado will be the first in the Rocky Mountain west. 

At the Table Colorado gathers family, friends, neighbors and strangers together, to partake in a series of free meal time discussions about our community’s triumphs, challenges and what we can do even better – to become a more sustainable, stronger and vibrant Colorado.

Name: Social Swag LLC
Description:
Social Swag Co. started as an idea seed over two years ago.
"I learned early on that effective social media is finding a coalition of people who think alike, act alike and speak alike and then creating easy sharing platforms where they can exist and flourish." - Michelle Dow, Founder/Owner

In the search for what connects us globally we discovered some interesting things:
Everyone wants to be connected, and the things that make us feel connected as humans are what make us happy. The things that statistically make us happy are being thankful, generous, kind and giving back. 

So we came to one conclusion: Effective social media marketing is sown with great ideas and grown in the fertile soil of promoting social good.

Social Swag Co. is on mission to redefine swagger, with your brand on the brain. 

Social Swag Co. is a Digital Media Management Company with the fundamental belief that social impact and social good = effective social media and social growth.

Description:
The EPIC Kids Foundation is a 501(c)3 approved children’s non-profit organization.  Our mission is to develop healthy communities through technology, renewable energy, training, education and health related projects and initiatives.

As a privately funded organization, EPIC Kids is empowered by individuals and corporations with a passion for the development of healthy communities. We receive our financial and volunteering support from businesses, grants, private citizens, civic and faith-based organizations.

Through organizational initiatives, EPIC Kids encourages power in community by creating volunteer opportunities for youth of all ages to make a difference in the life of others.  We serve children and families of all ages from all economic, racial, ethnic and religious backgrounds.

Name: PenTales - Global Community of Creative Storytellers (Non-Profit-Organisation)
Description:
PenTales is a project focused on the power of individual creativity and live storytelling. We host intimate salon nights in cities all over the world where we bring together friends and soon-to-be friends to share tales on topics everyone can relate to. 

We believe that by sharing perspectives on the same topics we sometimes learn that while we’re unique, we’re not actually all that different.

PenTales was founded 2009 in New York City by Stephanie Hodges and Saskia Miller, two childhood friends who have always loved to swap stories. Philipp Seybold joined PenTales in 2010 and took the lead from Stephanie in 2015. Both agreed that the cause shall live but the old organisation, which had it’s best days before 2013, had to die. In 2016 Philipp asked a couple of friends to join the cause. Together they are building iTell.

Name: Pushing for Pink
Description:
Pushing For Pink is a 501 (c)(3) tax-exempt non-profit organization founded by Gary Rogers and Mathew Matthews. In 2015 P4P was created in an attempt to nurture the growth of breast cancer support and philanthropy amongst young adults, starting with our own community of skateboarders.

Our goal is to wash away the feelings of separation and loneliness that come with watching someone you love battle cancer. Our method is to host fundraising events in celebration of loved ones who have won, lost, or are currently battling breast cancer.

Every October, Pushing for Pink hosts annual events to raise money for breast cancer research and prevention, bringing together hundreds of people, skateboarders and non-skateboarders alike. We are very grateful for our sponsors who allow us to make this happen.

Name: Travelteer Inc.
Description:
Our Mission

Our goal is to connect volunteers with nonprofit organizations that need help. We want to create a simple and affordable way for charitable people to plan and book their own volunteering vacations.

Why Travelteer?

Travelteer is working to provide a new and exciting way to travel while giving back to local communities through volunteering. We believe Travelteer is the most rewarding way to travel because it allows you to understand a city and its culture in ways you otherwise wouldn’t – by helping the local community, connecting with local volunteers, getting local recommendations, and seeing the city through the eyes of its community.

Our Plan.

Our plan is to create a way to travel while providing nonprofits and causes with much-needed help. We want to simplify the process for connecting volunteers with nonprofit organizations through the ultimate voluntourism experience.

Description

Name: Society for the Preservation of the Greek Heritage
Chip In
Description:
So have you ever walked down Pitt St Mall or Bourke St Mall or (insert large pedestrian mall in the middle of the city) and all of a sudden, there’s this person smiling at you. Bright t-shirt. Clipboard in hand. Waving.

For a moment you think you might be in one of those movies where the attractive European backpacker asks you for directions and after some awkward translational comedy, love ensues.No such luck – you know who it is. Your eyes meet, briefly. Damn it. Pull out the phone, or divert. It’s one of those “charity” people trying to get you to sign up.

For lots of us, that’s the most frequent interaction we have with charities and the non-profit world… and let’s be honest, it’s crap.Even for those of us in the non-profit world (yep, that’s us), we know the days of the charity muggers (‘chuggers’) are numbered. We know that dropping your money into a charity and never knowing or hearing where it goes are numbered. And we know that even though Australians are generous and they want to give, it’s hard to know who’s actually going to make a difference with your hard earned cash.

That’s where we come in.

Chip In is Australia's first non-profit crowdfunding platform designed for Australian social enterprises, non-profits and charities. 

We’ve built Chip In to make sure that even if you’re only able to give $1 of your money or a minute of your time, you know that you, along with hundreds of other generous Australians are building a more awesome Australia.

Name: The Al-Ma'idah Initiative
Description:
The word Al-Ma’idah in Arabic, means ‘the Table’ but the word means more than a piece of wood, it conjures an image of a table filled with food and conversation. 

We have been working on building bridges between the Christian world and the Muslim world for 5 years and have been able to facilitate meaningful conversations and real friendships between people of different beliefs and cultures. 

One of our key values which allows us to do this as Christians, is a belief in the total sovereignty and power of God. 

We believe God’s plan for individuals and nations is unstoppable, that truth is invincible and history itself has a destination! 

Because of this, the pressure is not on us, to ‘convert’ people or change anyones mind, but rather to speak the truth in love and leave the results to God. 

Many Muslims have a similar belief, which gives us a unique opportunity to talk and even disagree about life's deepest issues and still go home as friends at the end of the night.

What about you? Do you want to distance yourself from those who think differently from you? Or will you join us at the table, eat good food and talk about what’s really important?

Because there are over 150,000 Muslims in the Greater Seattle area...
We want every Muslim in Seattle to know a Christian who cares about them as an individual.

We are working towards this by focusing on three things, we call them our 'Pillars.' 

 
Educate. Equip. Engage.
 

Educate. 
Training believers to understand Islam as a worldview and Muslims as human beings. 

Equip.
Helping Christians feel confident and competent to interact well with the Muslim neighbors.

Engage.
Helping Local churches connect their people to their Muslim neighbors.

Name: Pennsylvania Pink Zone
Description: The Pennsylvania Pink Zone promotes cancer awareness and empowers survivors through year-round efforts to raise funds critical in supporting vital breast cancer organizations, charities, and facilities that focus on breast cancer education, prevention, diagnosis, and treatment.

Name: GoPhilanthropic Travel
Description:
GoPhilanthropic Travel is a socially conscious travel company encouraging a deeper understanding and connection to the world through travel.

GoPhil Journeys involve learning about and engaging with a collection of effective small grassroots non-profits, committed to long-term work within their communities. Journeys are powerful experiences, often life-changing, and give us each the opportunity to become active members of our global community.

Engage one-on-one with NGOs, social entrepreneurs and community leaders — the oftentimes lesser-known change-makers of the world who are actively making the world a more just place. Discover the complexities of development work, understand the challenges and experience first-hand the courageous people and organizations paving the way for a better future.

Name: Neiger Consulting
Description:
Want to donate to an Israeli cause and don't know how? Afraid your money will be misspent?  Don't know how to research an NGO/ NPO? Which cause is the most crucial today?  There are so many NGOs in the same field - which one should you choose? Is it tax deductible? Will you be recognized for your contribution?

I assist philanthropists and foundations with these and many other concerns every day. It is my specialty and I am passionate about it. Let me help you make the most effective contribution possible.

 What is Neiger Consulting? 

Partnerships and Resource Development :
Philanthropic consulting and management services in Israel. 
Specializing in the non profit sector.

* Provides philanthropists and foundations with consulting, project development and management services in Israel.
* Provides non - profit organizations with guidance and tools to develop a strong and independent philanthropic infrastructure.

Name: BARAZA FOUNDATION
Description: Baraza Foundation's mission is to empower people to enhance health, end hunger, and overcome hardship. We are a nonprofit organization that aims to help people raise themselves out of the darkness of poverty by working with communities to increase income, improve child nutrition, care for the Earth, end world hunger and poverty. Our goal is to help communities become self-sufficient, engage in sustainable agriculture and commerce, and provide viable solutions. By partnering with other organizations, public & private, we hope to provide life-changing solutions that empower people to become self-reliant. We also help to save women's lives from breast and ovarian cancer by empowering them to know their risk and manage their health proactively. In addition to that, we aim to empower the youth about their culture and heritage by educating, inspiring, and mobilizing them to embrace their roots.

Name: Warm Turkey
Description: Warm Turkey is a philanthropic initiative that aims to deliver food, select comfort clothing items, and sanitary items to the New York City (NYC) homeless community during the week of thanksgiving. Warm Turkey’s aim is to provide a little comfort to people who will often have no one or nowhere to celebrate thanksgiving with.

Name: elderabuse.org
Description:
We are committed to ending the shameful societal failures that lead to the abuse, neglect and exploitation of older adults.  

We are committed to urgent action, working collaboratively to ensure that every victim of elder abuse has timely access to quality care and intervention.  

From supporting and protecting victims of elder abuse, to strengthening communities and enabling research, we work to end the exploitation, neglect and mistreatment of older people and build a fairer society. 

Our vision is a world where we can all grow old safely, together.

Our mission is to provide environments and opportunities conducive for physical and mental development using sports, outings and mentor curriculums. The Diamond-Stackz Classic Organization looks

Name: Love You Back 2 Life
Description: We are committed to providing hope for the homeless women and children within the DMV. Since 2016, we've impacted close to 1,000 people effected by homelessness and we will not stop until the fight is finished.

Name: Community Assistance Friends Enterprise (CAFE)
Description: Community Assistance Friends Enterprise (CAFE) is a Pennsylvania nonprofit 501(c)(3) corporation that provides free legal and business guidance to small businesses and entrepreneurs in Southeastern Pennsylvania with a demonstrated need. CAFE envisions a world with a diverse variety of successful small businesses supporting jobs and economic growth in our neighborhoods. CAFE aims to help Main Street small businesses survive, grow, and thrive over the long term, with a special focus on minority, LGBTQ, and women-owned small businesses. As a nonprofit, CAFE’s values are based in the Quaker (Friends) tradition, which emphasizes the importance of education, integrity, collaboration, and community stewardship. We are looking for volunteers and donations to support our effort.

Name: COMPASSION BOATS - C.A.N.
Description:
The Compassion Boats is a capstone project developed by E.V.A.L. for the Applied Compassion Training (ACT) by the Center for Compassion and Altruism Research and Education of Stanford Medicine.
The ultimate aim of the Applied Compassion Training is to prepare people who feel an urgency to bring forth and integrate compassionate action into their occupations, professions, communities and institutions, as well as into their personal development. ACT offers participants a chance to apply compassion in practice during the program and use the dialogue, skill-building, and tools in real-time. Participants who successfully complete ACT will be in a variety of fields as AMBASSADORS of compassion in many fields, including educators, facilitators, consultants, physicians, nurses, coaches, and leaders of all kinds.

More info:
https://www.appliedcompassionacademy.com/2022-capstone-projects-c1

"WE ARE ALL IN THE SAME WATERS AND WE CAN..."Honoring the nature of compassion through creative arts. COMPASSION-ARTS-NATURE-APPRECIATION-EVENTS!

Founded in 2007 and operated completely on a non-profit basis. All of our public events including our big comics festival are always free to attend.

Name: Youth Ending Slavery
Description: YES is an entirely student-led 501(c)3 nonprofit based in Portland, Oregon. Our mission is to combat modern-day slavery by raising awareness about its prevalence in the world and empowering youth to be advocates for change. Educating youth about the existence of slavery is crucial because the rising generation has both the opportunity and responsibility to create a world where unjust practices in the name of profit are not tolerated.

Name: Rotary Club of Templestowe Inc
Description:
Our mission is to deploy our skills to achieve Rotary International’s objectives of humanitarian aid, education, world peace, understanding and goodwill in our local and international communities.
The differentiating characteristic of the Rotary Club of Templestowe is as an enabler, working in partnership with other organisations to match services with community needs – both domestic
and global. Our membership reflects the rich demographic mix of the City of Manningham. Our members are active leaders in our community, who take a stand on issues in our global community, consistent with the values of Rotary International.

Description: The Natural Streets for Performing Arts Foundation (NSPA) is a non-profit initiative that aims to reclaim public spaces for the arts and to support the livelihoods of independent artists.

Name: Foundation For Technical Education
Description:
FTE aims to leverage technology-based education to help transform lives and enable local development. We achieve this by providing the tools and essential skills that are needed for young people to achieve successful careers in the technical field.

We believe that through technical education, citizens can be provided basic tools to participate in the development and maintenance of technologies in their own communities, contributing to job creation, economic development and societal betterment. Meaningful development relies on sound and quality technical education and we are committed to developing and delivering sustainable and industry-aligned solutions. In today’s information age, technical education has never been more key to long-term sustainable development that benefits all.

Name: The Rotary Club of Ridgefield
Description:
The Rotary Club of Ridgefield is a nonprofit organization located in Ridgefield, Connecticut with a focus on philanthropy and community service in the spirit of our motto “Service Above Self”. Recognized as one of the town’s most fundamental institutions, the Club’s efforts have resulted in over a million dollars of donations to local organizations.  Ridgefield Rotary is a member of Rotary District 7980 and part of the worldwide network of 34,000 clubs of Rotary International. 

The Rotary Club of Ridgefield provides local residents, who have the desire, with the opportunity to “give back” by leveraging their time and talents with our network, knowledge and resources to make significant changes in our Town, Country and World. Examples of our accomplishments include building Rotary Park, the preeminent accessible children’s playground in Western Connecticut; awarding more scholarships than Fulbright or Rhodes; working to eradicate Polio; and providing many communities with safe drinking water!  We sponsor multiple fundraising and philanthropic events throughout the year including Taste of Ridgefield, Citizen of the Year, Fly the Colors, the Ballard Park Egg Scramble, Ridgefield Food Drive, Amber Alert Program, Meals on Wheels Delivery, Grove Street Clean-Up, Rotary Scholarship and many more!

We are an extremely active community continually seeking to work with and help all groups within the community to continue to make Ridgefield the great place that it is.  For more information or details about joining our Club, please message us here on LinkedIn, via our website at https://ridgefieldrotary.org/contact-us/, or by email at ridgefieldrotary1941@gmail.com.

Name: The 21 Fund
Description:
The 21 Fund was founded to honor the memory of Joseph “Joey” Glynn. Joey was a star basketball player at Cardinal Spellman High School where he scored more than 1,000 points and secured a scholarship to play at Bentley University. In June of 2013, Joey passed away during a summer league basketball game, doing what he loved most, playing the game of basketball. During his short time on earth, Joey touched many lives. His loss is mourned an immeasurable amount by family and friends. All who were fortunate enough to know Joey remember him as a friend to all and a leader on and off the court.

 

To continue Joey’s legacy, a nonprofit foundation was established in March of 2018 by Joey’s family and friends. The 21 Fund will benefit local individuals and families in financial need due to illness or unexpected hardship. Joey’s tremendous ability to love and care for the people in his life motivates the foundation to give back to the people in our community who are in need. Just as Joey would have done, the foundation aims to lend a hand and put smiles on the faces of those who need it most.

Name: Comfort Connections
Description:
Comfort Connections is a pending 501(c)3 non-profit whose mission is to use our golden retrievers to create compassionate connections that promote empathy, understanding, comfort, inclusion, and acceptance. This unique bond strengthens human resilience through times of crisis, persistent adversity and disruptive transitions.

The need for comfort goes much deeper than simply the need to be kind. Comfort is a skill we need to teach the next generation so that we can help mend our disconnected world. That is why we teach and provide comfort through an evidenced-based curriculum.
