Name: Pupil for Pupil Committee (PPC)
Description: PPC (Pupil for Pupil committee) was founded by PG students of NIT Trichy in 2005.The main aim of this student run organisation is to help poor and needy

Name: Effective Altruism Groningen
Description:
Effectief Altruïsme Groningen wil individuen en organisaties uit Groningen en omgeving aanmoedigen en in staat stellen om zoveel mogelijk goed te doen. Dit doen we aan de hand van de principes van Effectief Altruïsme.

EA-Groningen wil een brede community van effectief altruïsten zijn, die elkaar onderling inspireren en informeren om zodoende de impact zo groot mogelijk te maken. Dit kan bijvoorbeeld op een informele manier (door sociale contacten aan te gaan), of door een commissie te vormen om samen te werken aan een specifiek probleem.

Binnen onze community bevinden zich:
Mensen die geld aan de meest effectieve goede doelen doneren (of dit ambiëren)
Mensen die actief bijdragen aan het uitdragen van het EA-gedachtegoed
Mensen die een EA-carrière hebben (of dit ambiëren)
Mensen die EA-keuzes maken binnen hun eigen levensstijl
Een combinatie van bovenstaande vier

Name: Miss Asian America
Description:
About Our Pageant

Founded by Rose Chung, the Miss Asian America Pageant has been the premier event in Asian American community for the past two decades and the longest running Asian American pageant in the United States. From our humble beginnings in 1985 with the Asian American Arts Festival, our event has expanded to an internationally recognized event with regional competitions nationwide.

The Face of Asian America

Today, the Miss Asian America Pageant continues its active participation in nationwide events. From our partnership with the American Legion, the nation's largest veteran's organization, to our participation in America's largest Chinese New Year celebration held in San Francisco annually, the pageant continues its positive representation of the Asian American community.


Contact us

Miss Asian America Pageant
2161 Mason Street San Francisco, CA 94133
Phone: (415) 474-8398 or (415) 290-5595
Email: info@missasianamerica.org

Name: Projeto Integral de Vida - Pró-Vida
Description:
O Projeto Integral de Vida – Pró Vida é uma instituição filantrópica e assistencial, sem fins lucrativos. Há mais de 32 anos, desenvolve atividades socioeducativas de convivência e fortalecimento de vínculos para crianças e adolescentes, com foco no desenvolvimento do protagonismo, da autonomia, da participação cidadã, tendo como eixos norteadores o lúdico, a cultura e o esporte.

Os atendimentos são realizados de segunda a sexta, nos turnos matutino e vespertino, sempre no contra turno escolar. As crianças e adolescentes são transportadas diariamente das suas residências até a instituição em ônibus escolar.

Somos referência em atendimento a Primeria Infância com reconhecimento em nível distrital - pelo TJDFT e Instituto Alana com o projeto "Ações Integradas de Proteção à Criança: Política de Proteção à Criança Pró-Vida" e em nível nacional - pelo CNJ com a prática "Ações Integradas de Proteção à Criança: Política de Proteção à Criança Pró-Vida".

Name: Music Aid Northwest
Description:
Music Aid Northwest (MANW) is a nonprofit organization that supports music education in Washington State's public schools. Harnessing the power of Washington’s strong music community, a group of all volunteers raise funds throughout the year to show that Music Matters in the Northwest. Since our inception, MANW has granted over one million dollars to over 150 schools across the state.

PLAY IT FORWARD
Play It Forward brings together the best of Washington’s musicians, community leaders, and local fans for an annual fundraising event that isn’t just your typical charity auction. Over its 10 years, Play It Forward has grown from a small gathering in a Woodinville bar to a full-scale concert event at the Triple Door—and it’s always a sold-out crowd. This celebration of Washington features incredible food, amazing Washington wines, and musical performances by local talent, including well-known rock stars, classical musicians, and student performers! During the event, MANW presents the Washington Music Icon Award to an individual who builds and supports the music community. Sponsoring Play It Forward is a great way to build brand awareness while participating in one of Seattle’s most unique fundraising events.
 
MUSIC MATTERS LICENSE PLATE
In 2010, we created the “Music Matters” specialty license plate that directly benefits music education in the state. After a public art contest for the design, the first plates were issued in 2012 and have consistently ranked in the top 20 of the almost 70 specialty plates available in Washington. Each year, the “Music Matters” plate raises around $60,000 towards education grants. We encourage you to help make that number grow while adding a little soul to your vehicle. Music Aid Northwest’s “Music Matters” specialty plates are available directly from the Washington State DOL.

With your help, Music Aid Northwest is working to ensure that every student in Washington State has access to music education during their K-12 learning years.

Name: Global Dialogue Foundation (@Global_Dialogue)
Description:
We believe that open and respectful Dialogue is and should be the way of developing this world towards a brighter future.

Our goal is initiating, promoting and fostering 'Dialogue' and' Projects' among everyone and about everything on what is still our beautiful planet Earth, as our home.

We are ordinary citizens from beautiful Planet Earth, and as ordinary citizens we will try in a humble way  to articulate what we think is important for humankind in general, as well for our planet as a unique living entity in it's own way, and with appropriate friendly actions, try to help others with dialogue.  

With modest capacity and knowledge, we attempt handling these matters in a democratic and friendly manner, for a safer and a brighter future for all, everywhere. 
 
Our efforts hinge on our beliefs that spiritual and material balanced re-union with ourselves is the only guarantee and is fundamental for our brighter future and for that of our next generations.

Name: Ngorli Organization
Description:
Our Mission

Ngorli believes that access to quality education is a necessity and a fundamental right for every child regardless of their constraint. Hence Ngorli provides the means and access to quality education for children of underprivileged communities internationally. We are committed to cultivating the optimum academic potential of each child regardless of the constraints.
Vision

Ngorli’s vision is to one day realize a world in which children from developing parts of our world have equal access to quality education in this era of global competitiveness. The organization envisions a world in which children from these underprivileged parts of our societies would receive quality education in a constructive environment and well-resourced educational facilities. This would give them the opportunity to access the wide horizon of possibilities the world has to offer.

Ngorli also seeks to identify and provide a comprehensive range of opportunities with the help of stakeholders at all levels of education. Our priority is to ensure that generation upon generation of our future leaders are not singularly or collectively left out on this fundamental human right; whether it be a result of gender inequality, geographical location, policy, financial, human resource or any other limitations.

Name: Overland Park Masonic Lodge #436
Description: Overland Park Lodge is a Masonic Lodge located in Overland Park, KS, USA and is in the Grand Jurisdiction of the Most Worshipful Grand Lodge A.F. & A.M. of Kansas. Our philosophy boils down to “we take good men and make them better through faith, hope, charity, fraternity and brotherly love.” Our lodge is comprised of members aged 21 to 95 averaging around 55 as of last year. But, most of our newer members are under 45 and they make up the bulk of our current leadership. Our members represent all different sorts of careers, religions, nationalities, incomes, and family compositions. We range from college students to retirees and include construction workers, lawyers, truckers, pilots, engineers, recruiters, computer experts, salesmen, clerks, accountants, janitors, and teachers – just to name a few. Some members come to lodge in jeans and work boots while others will attend the same meetings in business suits. It is not the outer trappings, the career, or religion that we care for when we think of a brother mason. It is the man underneath. We are not a religion, church, or board room. As long as the man desires to better himself as a man and wishes to help brother masons, their causes and allow himself to be helped in return then he may be accepted into the fraternity, never to fall by the wayside.

Name: PANDOO Foundation
Description:
Managed by the founders of ShiftRunner and PANDOO Nation, PANDOO Foundation's mission is to challenge, celebrate and assist a new generation of young people to put their values and evolving world view into action, to actively participate in improving the lives of others. 

A not-for-profit sister organization, PANDOO Foundation drives our ambitious social agenda, reinforcing our commitment to making meaningful and measurable changes in the developing world.

On its own, and with carefully chosen partners, PANDOO Foundation funds and operates development programs in the areas of, education, health and sanitation, sports and leadership and IT. 

The ethos and ambition of PANDOO Foundation are re-created in the online virtual world, PANDOO Nation, which introduces social concepts to children in a fun and engaging way. 

PANDOO Foundation is funded primarily from PANDOO Nation subscription revenue. For every membership dollar spent in PANDOO Nation, 20 cents goes directly to PANDOO Foundation or to PANDOO Foundation field partners. 

In that way, our organization is unique: It is kid-sponsored, kid-focused and kid-friendly. With PANDOO Nation and PANDOO Foundation, kids change the world one mission at a time.

Name: Giuliana and Giorgio Stefanini Foundation
Association Choisir d'Agir
Description:
"Choisir d’Agir" (or "Choose to Act" in English) is an international charity organization based in Paris.

It aims at helping children in education, providing support to populations in difficult situation in improving their living conditions and search for new revenue sources to ensure their autonomy as well as sensitization about environment and climate change.

Name: U & Improved Leadership Foundation
Description: The U & Improved Leadership Foundation provides leadership development training scholarships to deserving teens with the potential to positively impact their lives, the lives of their families and their communities.

Name: The Bridge Community Education Centre
Description:
The Bridge Community Education Centre is a registered charity which offers a broad range of workshops, classes and services covering IT, Arts and Crafts, Health and Well Being, Financial Management and Literacy and Language. 

The program set by our experienced, enthusiastic and friendly team aims to encourage and support members of the local community in gaining the skills and knowledge needed to overcome challenges they may face in employment and/or social inclusion. 

With many of the courses being low cost or even free, The Bridge supports its work through fundraising, grants and through its social enterprises which currently consist of its cafe and catering company Food From The Bridge Ltd (which trades as The Bridge Kitchen), and through the hire of its rooms and facilities to local and national businesses and private clients.

Every aspect of operations at The Bridge have the same purpose and mission; to make accessible to the local community the tools needed to increase quality of life, regardless of age,  financial, social or ethnic background or circumstance.

Name: Croissant Rouge Tunisien Comité Local Manouba
ProjetoDonaOdette
Description:
O Projeto Dona Odette surgiu em agosto de 2017 com o objetivo de transformar pessoas e espaços que não tivessem nenhum tipo de ajuda substancial.

A partir da realização das nossas ações percebemos que são diversas as iniciativas sociais na periferia com liderança das próprias comunidades, mas com pouco alcance de captação de recursos e crescimento.

Entendemos assim que nosso propósito é fortalecer essas iniciativas, atuando com a linha de frente dessas comunidades a partir de processos sustentáveis e perenes, gerando transformações de impacto e agentes multiplicadores nas próprias comunidades.

Nós conectamos agentes de transformação e facilitamos processos de impacto com foco em situações de vulnerabilidade social. 

Nossa missão é proporcionar independência financeira, emocional e oportunidade de escolha para essas comunidades, estruturando ações com foco em cultura, educação, esporte e empregabilidade.

O projeto atua há aproximadamente seis anos apoiando o acolhimento de idosos em Embu Guaçu e a comunidade de Ferraz de Vasconcelos. 

Somos empreendedores sociais e nossa base é a dedicação, responsabilidade e amor!

Name: Stormcells, Inc.
Description: Stormcells provides individuals the opportunity to use their unique perspectives to solve challenges faced by non-profit organizations.  In doing so, the individuals exercise and improve upon their own creative problem solving skills, while the organizations benefit from a diverse set of potential solutions to issues that may not have otherwise been solved.

Name: Lazis Darul Hikam
Description:
LAZIS DARUL HIKAM, Hadir Lebih Dekat!
Berbagi Kebaikan dan Kemaslahatan Umat

Lazis Darul Hikam berada dibawah Yayasan Darul Hikam yang dulunya bernama Lawazis yang mengelola dana Wakaf, Zakat, Infak, dan Sodaqah beserta dana-dana sosial kemanusiaan lainnya. Strategi utama Lazis adalah pemerataan dan proaktif mengelola dan mendistribusikan dana-dana ZIS sehingga memberikan manfaat maksimal dengan kegiatan penyaluran bantuan dan pembinaan kaum dhuafa untuk kesejahteraan dan kemslahatan umat.

VISI
Menjadi Lembaga Pengelola ZIS, Bertaraf Internasional yang Profesional dan Amanah.

MISI
1. Membangun sistem zakat terkini.
2. Membuat Program Pemberdayaan Masyarakat, yang Berkesinambungan.
3. Membangun Relasi Seluas-luasnya.
4. Meningkatkan kemampuan Sumber Daya Manusia Lebih Kompeten.
 
Sebagai lembaga fundraising filantropi Islam lazis Darul Hikam mengfokuskan program pada empat pilar utama meliputi :
1. Berbagi Untuk Pendidikan.
2. Berbagi Untuk Lingkungan.
3. Berbagi Untuk Umat.
4. Berbagi Untuk Kesehatan.
5. Berbagi Program Khusus.

Name: Many As One
Description:
Many As One is comprised of leaders across industries that apply their expertise to launch digital-first campaigns to drive awareness and donations towards charitable initiatives.

The team activates rapid relief efforts, as well as ongoing charitable campaigns. Philanthropic focus is on causes that support first responders, food insecure and at-risk communities. 

The first campaign is the #InMyScrubs Challenge, drives awareness for social distancing, as well as supports local restaurants and critical-need hospitals. Find out more here: www.inmyscrubs.com

Name: Redwood Philanthropic Advisors
Description: We are the leading philanthropic consultancy in the upper Midwest, renowned for our expertise and success. Our proven development process has consistently delivered exceptional results, empowering countless organizations like yours to achieve their fundraising goals. With our comprehensive approach, we provide the guidance and support you need to maximize your fundraising potential. Trust us to help you make a meaningful impact.

Name: Ecoles de Madagascar
Description:
Créée en 2010 par d'anciens volontaires à Madagascar, la fondation "Ecoles de Madagascar" œuvre à la construction d'écoles dans le Nord de l'Ile.
Disposants de formations diverses (architecte, professeur, ingénieur, soignants, ...), nous avons mis à disposition nos savoir-faire sur place en brousse pendant une année.

Aujourd'hui, tous témoins et conscients que l'éducation est un levier indéniable pour l'espoir d'un avenir meilleur chez les jeunes de ce pays, nous poursuivons désormais notre année de volontariat en récoltant des fonds pour les projets de construction en cours.

Name: Bill Cook Foundation
Description:
OUR VISION
A world where the poorest children everywhere have access to an education. 

OUR MISSION
The Bill Cook Foundation helps some of the poorest children in the world gain access to the best education possible. By providing grants that support education, we help break the cycle of poverty for children, their families and communities.

Name: Fundación Corriente por los Niños
Description: Somos un grupo de personas unidas con el propósito de ayudar, contener, asesorar y atender integralmente con criterio de calidad humana y científica las necesidades de salud, educación y recreación del niño, buscando preservar y mejorar su calidad de vida y la de su familia, procurando en todas sus acciones el reconocimiento y respeto de su dignidad.

Name: Les Amis de Tous - "Solidaires ici et ailleurs..."
Description:
Les Amis de Tous est une association caritative à but non lucratif. Créée à Villeurbanne en 1992, elle a pour objectif de venir en aide aux plus démunis. A Villeurbanne, grâce à ses principaux partenaires,  La Banque Alimentaire du Rhône, la Mairie de Villeurbanne et l'Association Les Petits Frères des Pauvres, elle propose une aide alimentaire pour les personnes en difficulté. Elle intervient également pour aider les personnes dans leurs différentes démarches administratives. 
Depuis le début des années 2000, l'association s'est engagée en Afrique et notamment au Sénégal. Après différentes actions menées dans le domaine de l'aide humanitaire, elle construit aujourd'hui un poste de santé avec maternité rurale dans la région de M'Bour. Cette structure de santé permettra de réduire les mortalités infantiles et maternelles, de lutter contre certaines pratiques comme l'excision avec la prévention et l'information des publics, et de prendre en charge les premiers soins pour les 8000 habitants des 14 villages environnants.

Name: EM'POWER Women
Description: Committed to offering reusable feminine hygiene products to young Tanzanian and Kenyan schoolgirls to fight school truancy, in relation to menstrual taboos.

Name: seamos.uno
Description:
Portal de Espiritualidad y Terapias Alternativas. 
======================================================


Actualmente página en desarrollo, pueden seguirnos en Twitter @1seamosuno1 e Instagram @1seamosuno1y Facebook "seamos.uno".

Name: Cell Phones for Autism.com
Description: CPFA manages cell phone collection drives to raise awareness, support, and funds for autism research and support.

Name: Siddheshwar Vaidyakiya Sanstha
Description:
Siddheshwar Vaidyakiya Sanstha is a legally registered Healthcare Charitable Trust based in Mumbai, India. It was founded in 2001 to provide necessary healthcare provisions in the rural and urban parts of India.
Our key focus is on enhancing the lives of people by delivering specific healthcare projects/campaigns each year. This year our focus is Mental Health awareness.

Name: That Loud Wom*n
Description:
That Loud Wom*n is a startup organisation which seeks to normalise and encourage the female voice. We believe that ever woman should be able to possesses a strong, unwavering and irrepressible voice. She should be able to say “no” in the bedroom, pitch in the boardroom, ask and answer questions in the classroom - speak her mind and with nothing stopping her from doing so. 

We provide a safe platform for women to express their written opinions, ponderings and frustrations through poetry and prose in the read section of our website, as well as with 500 Voices. We are also in the process of developing free coaching videos pertaining to debating, public speaking and confidence. 

We exist to enforce the equal opportunity for loudness. We started to help a single woman achieve loudness and we’ll end when every single woman has achieved loudness.

Name: Rotary Club of East Honolulu
Description:
Rotary is a global network of 1.2 million neighbors, friends, leaders, and problem-solvers who see a world where people unite and take action to create lasting change – across the globe, in our communities, and in ourselves.

What we do
Rotary members believe that we have a shared responsibility to take action on our world’s most persistent issues. Our 35,000+ clubs work together to:

Promote peace
Fight disease
Provide clean water, sanitation, and hygiene
Save mothers and children
Support education
Grow local economies

Rotary Club of East Honolulu Mission Statement: 

The Rotary Club of East Honolulu is committed to relevancy in the 21st century; building a bridge to the young people in our community; and professional development of our members through sustainable and transformative projects and initiatives.

Name: Greener Pastures Charitable Foundation, Inc.
Description:
Greener Pastures Charitable Foundation, Inc. was founded by Jacqueline Nguyen to raise awareness and funds for cancer research and treatment, as well as to provide support to those affected by cancer.

Greener Pastures endeavors to raise cancer awareness and funds through its website, social media, and local efforts in Southern California, including hosting an annual silent auction and mixer, bone marrow/stem cell donor drives, and various fundraising social activities. 

Fighting cancer for a better tomorrow while enjoying today; this is where Greener Pastures begin.

Name: fundación F21
Description: non-profit institution

Name: Dominican Volunteers USA
Description:
We, Dominican Volunteers USA, members of the Dominican Family, invite men and women to walk with us as volunteers.
Compelled by the Gospel, we respond to the injustices of our day by ministering with our sisters and brothers, especially those who are poor and marginalized.
Recognizing existing inequalities, we invest time and energy working toward systemic change.
Within diverse, intergenerational communities we live out the Dominican mission of preaching the Gospel through the four pillars of Dominican Life: ministry, community, prayer and study. 

For the past 19 years Dominican Volunteers USA has been placing committed individuals in yearlong terms of service in our nation’s most vulnerable communities. Last year alone, our volunteers provided over 30,000 hours dedicated to service, direct aid, and social justice. 

These volunteers are preaching God’s love through service and participating in the 800 year tradition of the Dominican Order by teaching in impoverished areas, working with and as advocates for victims of abuse, giving the gift of companionship to elders, and providing direct services and support to immigrants, refugees, and people with disabilities. Their work not only impacts the areas they serve, but also inspires us to serve and fight injustice.

Name: PIPES International
Description: We bring the life-changing power of the gospel of Jesus Christ to the poorest indigenous people of the world. PIPES International (partnership for indigenous peoples) was founded in 2011 by Pastor Samuel Mwangi, a man convicted by the Lord to help the poorest people in Africa receive even the most basic human necessities but especially, the gospel message of Jesus. Committed to holistic transformation, in the spirit of the Great Commission, PIPES serves the Pygmy people of East and Central Africa, as well as other poor people in the slums of the world by providing medical aid, education, and sociological development and training. PIPES believes in equipping and empowering people in poverty to become self-sustaining and independent. As of 2019, PIPES has made an impact in 13 countries world-wide.

Name: Yafriqiya
Description: Créée en 2021, Yafriqiya est une association humanitaire qui a pour objectif de contribuer au développement économique, social, culturel et sanitaire en Afrique.

Name: Transitória Casa do Caminho
Description:
A Transitória Casa do Caminho (TCC) é uma instituição filantrópica, fundada em 1988, que tem como entidade mantenedora o Lar Espírita Luz e Amor (LELA).

 
Inicialmente a TCC atendia pessoas carentes do Município de Diadema e região por meio de programas assistenciais. Desde 1997 a TCC realiza o atendimento de pessoas em situação de rua, em regime de albergue, onde têm a oportunidade fazer sua higiene pessoal, alimentar-se corretamente e receber atendimento social personalizado, através de equipe multidisciplinar.

 
A TCC localiza-se na Rua Vicente Ádamo Zara, 230, Jardim Rosinha, Diadema, telefone: (11)4056-2008

Name: Junction City Local Aid
Description: Junction City Local Aid has been providing basic needs and economic assistance for low income people living in the Junction City area of rural Lane County for 73 years and counting. We provide an emergency food pantry, free clothing, utility and energy assistance, prescription and over-the-counter drug assistance, and transportation assistance; as well as referrals and partnerships with other service providers.

Name: Sport For Change
Description:
We exist to increase awareness and raise funds for mental health. We use sport as a vehicle to connect people and educate the community about mental health issues. 

At Sport for Change we are proudly supporting the impressive work that Beyond Blue do by engaging our networks. We are supporting the charity Beyond Blue, as they are leaders in the Australian community for their commitment to create change to protect everyone’s mental health and improve the lives of individuals, families and communities affected by anxiety, depression and suicide. 

Our goal is raise a minimum of $10,000 per year for Beyond Blue to support mental health research. We do this through a sporting event with mass participation each year.

Name: Chanticleer Foundation, Inc.
Description:
Established in 2010, the Chanticleer Donor Advised Fund strives to help all participants maximize their contributions while deriving optimal leverage. 

The mission of the Fund is to eliminate poverty through education.  However, your contributions and grant recommendations set the mission for the Fund.

A donor-advised fund is the perfect way for an individual, family, or corporation to maximize their potential while making a charitable, tax-deductible contribution to a nonprofit. 

The way it works is simple: you decide when to give, how much to give, and to which charity (or charities) your gift goes. You receive your tax deduction at the time of your charitable contribution, but grants to charity can be made over time. So you get the benefit of an immediate contribution (and tax-break) without having to rush the important process of deciding where your money goes. Plus, donors have the ability to give a variety of assets, including cash, mutual funds, appreciated securities and other illiquid assets, allowing the contribution to grow over time. It can be the difference between making a one-time gift and building a legacy. 

To find out how you can be about of the Chanticleer Foundation, Inc. fund, visit our website, www.chanticleerfoundation.com for more information and all the forms on how to get started!

Name: Blauwe Noordzee
Description:
De Blauwe Noordzee is het bureau waar ambitieuze non-profits samenkomen voor inspiratie, meer financiële slagkracht en ondernemerschap. Gericht op het realiseren van hun idealen.

De essentie van de Blauwe Noordzee is om maatschappelijke organisaties op een strategische manier naar inkomstenwerving te laten kijken: niet alleen aandacht voor donaties of subsidies, maar focus op een optimale financieringsmix. En die is voor iedere organisatie weer anders.

Name: FRCR : Fondation du Réseau de Conscience et Réalisation
Description:
La Fondation FRCR est à but non lucratif et agit à l’international dans plusieurs secteurs.

Notre Organisme aide l’humain et l’environnement à prospérer sur tous les plans. Cela passe par la création et la mise en place de solutions, de programmes et de technologies diverses permettant d’atteindre des résultats jusqu’alors inégalés.

La fondation offre des formations et des moyens afin d’augmenter le degré de conscience et de puissance d’action de chaque individu. Les formations proposées sont haut de gamme et couvrent les quatre domaines fondamentaux qui mènent vers l’accomplissement de soi : le développement personnel, la conscience financière, la vie relationnelle et la santé.

De plus, elle invite et commandite l’individu dans sa prise d'initiative afin qu'il soit un acteur réel du changement dans le monde.

Dans une volonté profonde de contribution, elle développe et distribue des solutions visant à améliorer :

la santé naturelle, 
la qualité de la vie, 
la conscience humaine, 
la production éco-énergétique, 
la préservation de la terre, de l’eau 
et l’accès aux aliments biologiques.

Afin de rendre les solutions facilement accessibles au plus grand nombre, la Fondation diffuse ses projets à grande échelle et instaure des lieux où ses produits et services sont offerts à la communauté.

Elle crée un Mouvement, conscient et puissant, composé d’individus décidés et motivés à mener leur vie à un autre niveau !

Elle offre la possibilité de créer des liens constructifs et enrichissants avec d’autres personnes et propose une opportunité d’abondance matérielle, afin que ceux qui le désirent puissent jouir d’une vie plus facile et agréable.

Avec la FRCR, tout un chacun a la possibilité de vivre une abondance matérielle et relationnelle, tout en participant à l’amélioration de notre Humanité !

Elle vous propose d’être des acteurs conscients de ce monde en changement !

Name: Agents of Change SA
Description:
Agents of Change South Africa, abbreviated as AoC SA, is a registered non-profit organisation officially launched on 15 June 2019. The organisation is led by dedicated and hard-working young people who are considered leaders in their communities. The organisation provides philanthropic services in the fields of academia, mentorship, and poverty relief. 

Academic services:
1. Free assistance with UNIVERSITY and NSFAS applications
2. Career expos 
3. Saturday classes for grades 10 to 12 learners
4. Literacy programmes

Mentorship programme:
1. Providing mentorship to matriculants- to ensure a smooth transition from high school to university

Poverty Relief Initiative:
1. Financial literacy programmes
2. Entrepreneurship symposiums 
3. School shoes drive project
4. Sanitary pads donation
5. Food parcel donation 

*All services of the organisation are provided to public high school learners and members of disadvantage communities.

Name: WheelsPlusWings Foundation
Description:
The WheelsplusWings Foundation started in Beijing, China, when a number of friends first encountered the difficulties faced by children born with disabilities in the country.  One of the group of friends was a successful businessman who happened to have been born with Osteogenesis Imperfecta, known as "brittle bone disease" to some.  But Stuart was also lucky enough to have been born into a family that didn't see why his condition should change either his ambitions nor what he could actually achieve with his life.  Stuart's success story served as the first example for families in China who, up til then, felt that no real life was possible for heir children.

The early goal for WheelsPlusWings was thus to help local children achieve the same simple, normal success (friends, school, work) and show all the others, and the society around them, what was possible.  From China we then started to work with volunteer groups in other countries to encourage support groups to help children in their local areas.

In seeking to lift the expectations of what children who are “Differently-Abled” can do in life, we hope to change attitudes about what is possible in Asia and around the world. Our goal is to erase the mental and physical fences between able-bodied and less able-bodied individuals, in the minds of the families, the communities in which they live, and the children themselves.  The hope is that if we expose more people to stories of children with disabilities leading normal lives (attending school, going to University, getting jobs and becoming happy contributing members of society) that fewer parents will then abandon their own babies born with disabilities; and fewer will hide the ones they keep.

Name: Devenir Vietnam - Association loi 1901
Description:
Le monde se construit par ceux qui osent et qui décident d’agir : nous sommes entrés dans la construction d’un monde nouveau pour notre futur. 

De nombreux jeunes, en particulier, l’ont compris et osent de plus en plus se lancer dans l’aventure d’un nouveau bien commun en rupture avec le précédent : ils veulent un «  monde responsable ».

Le fonds de dotation D☰V☰NIR est heureux de les accompagner dans leurs projets et réalisations. De la confrontation positive entre un porteur de projet et Le fonds de dotation D☰V☰NIR, émergent les raisons profondes et solides d’agir chez le porteur de projet. Ces motivations  sont toutes autant de contributions à ce monde nouveau en marche. Elles sont aussi une condition de réussite durable et responsable pour les projets. Il s’agit d’un véritable ancrage qui constitue le guide de référence pour décider au quotidien, sur le long terme et dans les tempêtes qui ne manqueront pas de se produire.
Mais à quelle(s) source(s) ces raisons d’agir et ces convictions peuvent-elles se nourrir ?

D☰V☰NIR croit à la philosophie du développement intégral, porteuse à la fois de la réalisation de soi et simultanément, du développement de toute la communauté. C’est en fait une approche globale qui prend en compte tous les éléments du monde dans lequel nous vivons et qui les relie. Le bien commun ainsi recherché se traduit par une vision ample où l’économique, le social, le culturel et le spirituel forment un tout en se respectant mutuellement.

Cette vision recherche à préserver nos ressources, à combattre la pauvreté et les injustices, à permettre une croissance durable tout en  se satisfaisant d’une certaine frugalité. Cette vision reconnaît la dignité, la créativité, la générosité et le besoin spirituel de toutes personnes.

Ayúdenos a crear una plataforma virtual  educativa gratuita
Sabe que hay millones de personas y niños en el mundo que no tienen acceso a una educación básica de calidad.
Ellos están destinados a recibir educación gratuita del gobierno que en la mayoría de los casos esta desactualizada y no es efectiva.
Teach the World es una organización que quiere crear curso de apoyo escolar, desarrollo personal, universitario y profesional; pero para ello necesitamos tu ayuda.
Necesitamos ayuda a fin de crear cursos de calidad que serán distribuidos en todos los países de habla hispana, nuestro portal puede ayudar a escuelas, institutos, universidades  a complementar con cursos de apoyo  a fin de mejorar la calidad del educado y con ello mejorar la calidad de vida del participante.
Nuestro website  busca distribuir cursos de apoyo educativo con profesores capacitados y expertos en la materia y ser entregados libremente a escuelas, para que puedan utilizarlo a fin de  complementar su educación. Alumnos podrán acceder a cursos de apoyo en diferentes materias y sus profesores tendrán la capacidad de monitorear el avance de los alumnos.
A donde irán los fondos:
Pagar profesores, Tutores  y profesionales que tengan experiencia y educación a fin de crear curso de CALIDAD en Video, no buscamos personas con buen corazón para ensenar. Si queremos cambiar y corregir este problema educativo tenemos que contratar a los MEJORES. Ayúdenos. Usted recuerde que a mayores oportunidades educativas de alguien mejor calidad de vida en el futuro tendrá. Gracias

Teach the world

Name: Cheti
Description:
Cheti is a US based 501(c)3 non-profit organization that creates opportunity for the impoverished children of Tanzania through education.  Cheti believes the answer to ending extreme poverty lies in educating youth. We strive to open doors for students who would otherwise have no hope for education, any chance to go to college or provide for their families.  

Our approach is two-fold: through individual child sponsorship, families no longer need to pay school fees – enabling them to focus on other family necessities. The children, who otherwise would have little to no opportunity for an education, are now in a classroom – every day, learning. Additionally, we build the capacity of local private schools. We provide our school directors and teachers proper training, and the resources and knowledge to expand their impact throughout the community. Through each book we buy, classroom and orphanage we build – we are enabling our local heroes to help more children.

 We have just about 80 nursery and primary students sponsored. We have built classrooms, kitchens and bathroom facilities, purchased school buses, and provided health and educational resources to two schools and over 650 students. But we are just getting started!

Name: The Pearl Project, Inc.
Description:
The Pearl Project Inc. is a nonprofit corporation founded to address the negative stigma of lung cancer and advance research using a unique approach - wear pearls for lung cancer!  Driven by online and social media, out goal is to create an educational awareness movement toward a world where no one is blamed for having cancer.  The statistics are widely misunderstood and lung cancer can affect anyone.

Why pearls?  Lung cancer has many colors.  One is clear because it's an invisible disease.  Another color is pearl.  Pearls are timeless, symbolic, and feminine.  Worn across the chest, they are an iconic symbol to support a disease that deserves a voice and progress in the cancer community.

The Pearl Project was inspired by Suzanne Corrales, who was diagnosed with lung cancer at 47 years old.  A healthy, active, non smoker, her doctor did not think to screen her for lung cancer though she had symptoms of the disease.  Lung cancer took a toll on her physically, emotionally, and spiritually.  One challenge she did not expect, however, was the reaction when she shared her diagnosis.  She did not smoke, but found herself defending her cancer.  She then realized she was in a class of it's own, one of the deadliest cancers with the worst stigma.

It's time to change the misconception that lung cancer is dirty, self inflicted, and always preventable.  Join us in the movement empowering everyone affected.  It's time.

#PEARLPROJECT

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Benvenuti nel luogo dove universo femminile e creatività si incontrano dando vita a nuovi stimolanti progetti. Questo è il Fantastudio e si trova a Milano. Mettiti comodo, il viaggio sta per iniziare.

Description:

Furthermore, the auto-burning utility that happens in each transaction helps the token be more stable by reducing the circulation supply. Charity fundraising gives you the chance to both contribute to our cause and gets RFG tokens without a tax fee. You can contribute to our charity cause also by purchasing NFTs from our NFT collection.
 We have created this project in order to give the chance to people that have left their country and their families to use cryptocurrencies as a fast and secure way to send money to the people they love and care. Furthermore, we help them with funds to start their new lives from scratch.
 Our Token was launched in 06/06/21 by a team based in Greece, a country that currently hosts approximately 50,000 refugees, most of whom will remain in the country. Based on this fact we created this project to give a helping hand to the people they need it most.

Name: Mission Ganesh Himal
Auberge sous mon toit
Description:
L’Auberge sous mon toit (ASMT) a pour mission d’offrir des services d’hébergement, d’encadrement et d’insertion sociale à des hommes en difficulté situationnelle, sans domicile fixe ou contrevenants, et les soutenir de manière active dans leur quête d’autonomie.

Notre vision:
Faire de l’ASMT un lieu chaleureux, accueillant et rassurant qui répond au mieux aux besoins des hommes que nous soutenons, afin qu’ils se rapprochent de la meilleure version d’eux-mêmes.

À l’ASMT, le travail de tous les membres de l’équipe est guidé par les valeurs suivantes :
Partage : Mettre en commun le savoir, le savoir-être et le savoir-faire pour l’équilibre et l’évolution du résident.
Engagement : Libre et volontaire, le résident s’implique vers sa réinsertion sociale.
Accueil : L’équipe accueille le résident dans sa globalité.
Collaboration : L’équipe intervient pour et avec le résident.
Entraide : Les intervenants aident le résident dans ses démarches.

Nous la facilitons également la réinsertion sociale.

Nos services comprennent l’hébergement, l’accompagnement, les travaux compensatoires et communautaires, l’intégration à l’emploi, le post-hébergement, l’aide budgétaire et les références.

De concert avec le résident, l’intervenant clinique établit un plan d’intervention qui précise les objectifs à atteindre, les moyens pour les atteindre et les échéances pour y parvenir. La révision du plan d’intervention se fait régulièrement, par l’équipe clinique et par l’intervenant et le résident ensemble.

L’ASMT est située à proximité du boulevard Industriel et nos intervenants sont disponibles 24h/24.

Name: Heroes Honor
Description:
Heroes Honor is a non-profit, which was built by heroes to serve heroes. Our mission is simple: To honor the brave men & women of the Fire Service, Law Enforcement, and Military.

Heroes Honor knows first-hand that Firefighters, Law Enforcement, and Military are unique due to the dangers and consequences of risking their lives to save others. We understand their hardships and are able to quickly provide resources & relief to meet their needs.

We develop programs & fundraisers that benefit our heroes and their families. They include:

Heroes Left Behind – Programs benefiting children who lost a parent in the line of duty. Our core benefits include Youth Camps & Scholarships.

Help for Heroes – Heroes Honor offers assistance to fallen firefighters, military service members, law enforcement officers, and their families, in time of need.

Memorial Campaigns & Monuments – We initiate and assist in starting memorial campaigns, t-shirt campaigns, and monuments to honor our fallen heroes.

Volunteer with Heroes Honor – Volunteering to help our heroes in incredibly rewarding. Click here to get involved!

Fundraisers & Events – Heroes Honor holds events and fundraisers to support our fallen heroes. Campaigns and events include donations, online memorials, athletic events, concerts, comedy shows, t-shirt campaigns, online fundraisers, social media campaigns, and more.

Honor Guard - Become a Heroes Honor Honor Guard Member and receive exclusive Heroes Honor Benefits and News.

Heroes Honor Roll – Started in 2014, it is an honor roll of military, firefighters, and law enforcement who have fallen in the line of duty, from unnatural causes. They shall never be forgotten.

With your help, we will continue to advance our mission of helping fallen heroes and their families, in rebuilding their lives.

Always remember, never forget.

 Copyright Charity Max - A 501(c)3 Non-Profit Corporation - EIN 46-0913208 - All Rights Reserved 2011

Name: Foyer Imuhira
Description:
La dure réalité du contexte social au Burundi se traduit notamment par des milliers d’enfants vivant dans les rues de la capitale Bujumbura. Certains ont eu un jour une maison et une famille mais n’ont eu d’autre choix que de fuir une extrême pauvreté ou des actes de violence. Les autres, nés directement dans la rue, n’ont jamais connu la chaleur d’un foyer.
Notre but est de construire un refuge, une maison pour permettre à ces enfants de vivre décemment, de recevoir une éducation, de se sentir aimés et en sécurité. Nous souhaitons leur offrir la chance  d’aller à l’école, afin qu'ils puissent se construire un avenir: devenir quelqu’un.
Le foyer compte aujourd’hui 9 enfants et il semblerait que ca ne soit que le début. Nous avons encore beaucoup d'ambitions et souhaitons avoir un impact conséquent. 

----

The harsh reality of the social context in Burundi is reflected in the thousands of children living on the streets of the capital Bujumbura. Some of them once had a home and a family but had no choice but to flee extreme poverty or violence. Others, born directly on the streets, have never known the warmth of a home.
Our goal is to build a refuge, a home to allow these children to live decently, to receive an education, to feel loved and safe. We want to give them the chance to go to school, so that they can build a future for themselves: to become somebody.
We have now 9 children in our home. This is only the beginning of our journey, as we have the ambition to help many more children.

Name: Charitarian
Description:
Mission

To be the leading organisation for balancing business with social responsibility and the leading philanthropy media for the emerging economies.

Who we are:

Charitarian is an innovative organisation that aims to advice, influence and report on how to balance business and a better world. Made in China, Charitarian makes global impact by profiling best practice in business ethics, government social responsibility, climate change, China charity and global philanthropy.

Company Overview

Founded in 2005 by Wang Liwei as China’s first charity media, Charitarian has developed into a network of social entrepreneurs from Government, business and civil society. Together we influence, inspire and challenge Government and business agendas in the fields of education, health and human rights. Charitarian’s two areas of focus in China are:

Charitarian Foundation which tackles education, health and inequality;

Charitarian Consultancy and Media which provides reports, organises forums and events on issues of social concern. We also advise on how to effectively run NGOs and CSR projects in China.

Although global in outlook, Charitarian operates from within China itself. We have insights into government policy unavailable to others. With an international, diverse and culturally sensitive team at the helm, we are an unusual combination, but one that shines a light on excellent work.

Name: Feed Starving People Inc.
Description:
In June 2011, Tim Bradley (Founder and CEO of Feed Starving People) set off on a journey to Southeast Asia. He left the US with no timeline and no itinerary, but a deep desire to witness and experience a different world, leaving the anchors of comfort behind. However, he discovered that although his surroundings changed, and cultures differed, the people did not. The same needs, fears, and desires reside in all of us, no matter who we are or where we are in this world. Making his way through Southeast Asia, Tim looked into the beautiful, but disadvantaged eyes of so many people and his purpose became clear. This trip was meant to be an expression of gratitude for the life Tim have been afforded, and it was now time for him to give back. In July 2012, Tim’s journey was coming to an end in one of the poorest countries in the world, Cambodia. This was Tim’s opportunity to discover the heart of his journey.
It began as a self-run mission that Tim called “Feed Hungry Cambodians“. The original idea was to purchase groceries with his own money and bring them to the poorest villages outside of Siem Reap, Cambodia. It was meant to be a small expression of service to those less fortunate, but after by voicing his mission via Facebook, it escalated to approximately $1500 in donations. For five consecutive days, Tim spent days and nights planning the logistics of how to best spend and distribute, what is a small fortune in Cambodia. In the end, Tim was able to feed over a thousand people. Not only could Tim provide groceries for entire poor villages but he had the special privilege of taking families and whole villages to local restaurants and feeding everyone.  Feed starving people was born!

InCom fue creado con el propósito de permitir a los inversionistas conocer un amplio espectro de iniciativas sociales, al tiempo que participar en ellas activamente - tanto con su capital humano como financiero.

Invierte y Comparte AC impulsa y promueve el cambio a través de la filantropía de impacto apoyando a emprendedores sociales - personas que tienen ideas nuevas y la capacidad de implementarlas. Buscamos conectar a las empresas y asociaciones civiles capaces de lograr cambio social positivo a través de una visión de emprendimiento, con personas e instituciones que tienen los medios necesarios para lograr este objetivo. Nos interesan las ideas frescas y la habilidad – la determinación, la disciplina, la visión – indispensables para lograrlo. Confiamos en el efecto multiplicador de una inversión bien dirigida hacia el bienestar social.

Para lograr este objetivo creamos el Fondo de Inversión IS-MX, el cual contribuye - a través de préstamos y participación accionaria - al crecimiento y desarrollo de asociaciones civiles y empresas de impacto social.

Name: Saving Grace Alliance for Seniors
Description:
The Saving Grace Alliance is a non-profit organization, created to respond specifically to Senior adults needs, pre and post disaster. Our goal is to empower Seniors with disaster preparedness classes, geared to their needs, and then assist and restore them after disaster, should one occur. Our perception of what may be perceived as a "disaster" can be very broad.  Disasters to us, can range from home fires that affect a single individual or family, to tornadoes, earthquakes and hurricanes that can affect thousands. Whether it's before or after - we're here to help! 

After life altering events, the Saving Grace Alliance can provide items that are specific to Senior needs such as Durable Medical Equipment, reading glasses, and dietary supplements or personal care items for those who require them. 

The Saving Grace Alliance is not a government agency, but a non-profit organization that works as an essential part of response teams after disaster strikes. Working in partnership with other agencies and organizations that provide services to disaster victims, we rely on your support to make this happen, so we're always ready to accept donations from people who love Seniors like we do! We also welcome questions and encourage volunteer inquiries! Please send all inquiries to: volunteer@savinggracealliance.org

Follow us on Facebook:  The Saving Grace Alliance 

Or Tweet with us on Twitter: @SavingGrace4Srs 

Keep in touch - We'd love to hear from you today!

Name: Stiftelsen Varde - The Cairn Foundation
Description:
NORWEGIAN
Stiftelsen Varde drives i regi av turoperatøren Hvitserk. Stiftelsens formål er å støtte utvalgte bistands- og utviklingsprosjekter og legge til rette for bærekraftig fjellturisme og naturbasert reiseliv. Prosjektene vil både kunne være i Norge og utlandet. I utlandet er det hovedsakelig miljø- og utdanningsprosjekter. I Norge kan det være prosjekter som skal bi bedre opplevelser for turister og lokalbefolkning, mindre naturslitasje og tryggere ferdsel.
Stiftelsen Varde ble opprettet i 2014. Stiftelsen er registrert i Stiftelsestilsynet. Stiftelsen har statsautorisert revisor. 

Stiftelsens formål er å støtte utvalgte bistands- og utviklingsprosjekter og legge til rette for bærekraftig fjellturisme og naturbasert reiseliv. Prosjektene vil både kunne være i Norge og utlandet. I utlandet er det hovedsakelig miljø- og utdanningsprosjekter. I Norge kan det være prosjekter som skal bi bedre opplevelser for turister og lokalbefolkning, mindre naturslitasje og tryggere ferdsel.  

Alle Hvitserks gjester får tilbud om en ekstraregning på "ti kroner per turdag" når de melder seg på tur.
Ekstraregningen gjestene får skal gå uavkortet til Stiftelsen Varde og samles inn til fjellrelaterte utviklingsprosjekter; enten det er utdanning for menneskene som bor der, miljøtiltak eller støtte utviklingen av arbeidsplasser i fjellturismen på stedet. Alle pengene som samles inn fra gjester og deltagere, skal gå uavkortet til prosjektene.

I seg selv er det fantastisk å vite at man som friluftsinteressert skandinav er privilegert nok til å ha mulighet til å bruke dager på tur i fjellet i Norge eller utlandet. Stiftelsen Varde og Hvitserk tror det kanskje kan føles enda bedre, hvis drømmedagene til fjells og på tur også bidrar til noe positivt for andre enn deg selv.

ENGLISH SUMMARY
Learn more about Stiftelsen Varde (The Cairn Foundation) here www.stiftelsenvarde.no/english/
