Whether it be on the driving adventure or throughout the year we will give you a chance to experience the real and sustainable difference you are making to the lives of the children we support.  By raising money before you start the driving adventure, we will be able to join in the celebration of giving along the way.

Name: Résilience Plus
Description:
Résilience Plus est une association qui vise à contribuer au 
renforcement des capacités de résilience des populations en aidant les communautés 
à développer leurs capacités à rebondir après une crise, de revenir à leurs conditions 
de vies normales et surtout de s’adapter à leurs nouvelles contraintes dans une optique 
de développement durable.

Name: Claremont Community Foundation
Description:
The Claremont Community Foundation was established in 1989 to serve as a private nonprofit philanthropic vehicle for donors wishing to support a wide range of community arts, human services, education, and cultural heritage programs.

It is structured and invested as a "family" of component Funds, each with its own purpose, donor(s), and distribution plan.  The Foundation has distributed over $750,000 to more than 150 local programs through initiatives, discretionary grants, donor-directed funds and special collaborative projects.

The Claremont Community Foundation helps build and strengthen community and brings together people and organizations that want to make a difference in the world. CCF is a tax-exempt public charity that guides philanthropy and are dedicated to improving the quality of life in the Foothill communities.

Individuals, families, businesses and organizations work with the Claremont Community Foundation to create permanent charitable funds that help meet the challenges of changing times. The foundation invests and administers these funds through a regional affiliation with the California Community Foundation.

For donors, the community foundation offers a range of charitable giving options that provide tax benefits and strategic advice about philanthropy.

For the communities we serve, the Claremont Community Foundation provides leadership, expertise and capital to address social issues and we serve as a resource for nonprofit, civic, government and philanthropic organizations.

Name: Endocosmic Foundation
Description: Human evolution might have to do with a shift in consciousness. We explore humanity’s future through inner space exploration.

Name: Фундація Дарини Жолдак
Description: “Фундація Дарини Жолдак” – благодійний фонд, що займається популяризацією читання, розвитком української культури та мови. Фонд також надає допомогу дитячим будинкам та лікарням.

Name: The Dallas Woman's Forum
Description:
Rich in history and tradition, The Dallas Woman’s Forum was founded in 1906, two years after the Alexander Mansion was built. The Forum, which has been ensconced in this unique and priceless example of Dallas’ rich cultural history since 1930, is celebrating its second century of community service and historic preservation.

Contemporary in its mission and purpose, the organization’s heritage continues in its focus on the values of service, compassion, concern, knowledge, involvement, initiative, creativity, courage, patriotism and love of God. This foundation has made the Dallas Woman’s Forum a leader in the development of our city and ensures its leadership now and in the future.

Name: FUNDACIÓN VIDA SV
Description: movimiento de jóvenes provida de El Salvador

Name: Indøks Veldedige Initiativ (IVI)
Description:
Indøks veldedige initiativ startet høsten 2015 og har per våren 2018 donert over 490 000 kroner til veldedighet.

Initiativet hører til Foreningen for Studentene ved Industriell Økonomi og Teknologiledelse, NTNU

Name: Ametz Saba
Description:
פרויקט אמץ סבא מפגיש סטודנטים צעירים עם קשישים הגרים בסמוך אליהם, למפגש שבועי בו הם מבלים בהתאם לתחומי עניין משותפים (כמו בישול, שיחה, למידת שפה, מחשב ועוד), וכן מקיים אירועים משותפים במהלך השנה ובחגים.
כיום הפרויקט פועל בשמונה קמפוסים ברחבי הארץ ומשתתפים בו למעלה מ-350 קשישים וסטודנטים.
הפרויקט פועל בשיתוף פעולה עם גורמי הרווחה בעיריות והאוניברסיטאות במטרה ללוות ולתת מענה בעת הצורך לקשישים ולסטודנטים כאחד.
הפרויקט בעל ערך ייחודי בכך שנותן מקום לתרומה הדדית וקשר דו-צדדי משמעותי. הוא מספק לדור הוותיק תחושת משמעות ומאפשר לו להעניק מניסיון חייו, ומקנה לדור הצעיר בית שני וחוויה עמוקה ומלמדת.

Name: Planned Parenthood Generation Action at Auburn University
Description:
Our purpose is to mobilize advocates for reproductive freedom, educate the students of Auburn University on sexual health, and generally raise awareness of reproductive health and rights. We seek to provide an inclusive, accepting space on campus to express any question of sexual or reproductive nature. 

Planned Parenthood Generation Action, believes in the fundamental right of every individual to manage their health. PPGA supports full access to comprehensive reproductive and complementary health care services in settings that preserve and protect the essential privacy and rights of each individual; advocates public policies that guarantee these rights and ensure access to such services; supports access to medically accurate educational programs that enhance understanding of human sexuality.

Name: New Jersey Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (NJSPCA)
Description:
The New Jersey Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (colloquially, "NJSPCA Humane Police") was a law enforcement agency in the state of New Jersey that focuses on humane law enforcement. The agency enforces animal related laws, and investigates cases of animal cruelty. In January of 2018, Governor Chris Christie signed a bill intended to dissolve the organization and transfer animal cruelty law enforcement to county prosecutors, municipalities, and county SPCA agencies. The NJSPCA will cease law enforcement operations by August 1, 2018.

Post August 1, 2018 the NJSPCA will look for other ways to work for the welfare and humane treatment of animals.

Name: Grup Escolta Xaloc
Description:
En el Xaloc preparamos actividades los sabados de 16h a 20h para infantes y jovenes de 6 a 18 años, siguiendo la metodologia scout. 
También realizamos campamentos de Navidad, Semana Santa y verano. 

Entre nuestras actividades hacemos juegos, reflexiones, dinámicas, escursiones, bailes y mucho más. Nuestro objetivo es que nuestros jovenes aprendan y crezcan mediante la diversión.

Name: CDDS, Inc.
Description:
The mission of CDDS, Inc. is to respond to and facilitate recovery from disaster & displacement; provide humanitarian aid to address disintegration, disease and degradation of life associated with such a crisis; restore and preserve health and human rights.

Organizational Focus

    To minimize displacement by providing additional responses to natural and technological disasters; expedite recovery by strategically providing humanitarian aid (food, water, shelter, clothing, first aid supplies and security for women and children vulnerable to rape and trafficking) as needed or requested in the disaster zone.

    Implement a strategic approach to the displacement matrix, i.e., (disintegration, disease, homelessness, hunger, economic collapse).

    Reduce levels of anxiety, trauma and suffering among refugees by providing adequate supplemental services and advocacy where necessary.

    Assist in the prevention of human-trafficking by identifying vulnerable individuals and groups; prevent susceptibility by addressing precipitating conditions; educate communities about the issue of human-trafficking.

    Promote good health among displaced populations by providing basic health screenings and education; address emotional disequilibrium, incapacitating conflicts generated by torture and the trauma of displacement through allied mental health.

    Promote and facilitate self-sufficiency among displaced populations through community and economic development.

    Promote and facilitate opportunities for higher education for refugees and other displaced populations.

    Collaborate with  governments and NGOs preserving life and wellness during periods of crisis or disaster.

    Identify and promote constituent or donor values; establish value-alignment and provide venues for open communication and participation.

Name: Meals4Hunger
Description:
Meals4Hunger (FEIN 45-0714372), a San Diego-based nonprofit corporation, helps families, especially children, improve their lives by combating hunger with nourishing foods, nutrition & obesity education and crucial wrap around services via collaborations with community partners.

Despite our region’s picture-postcard image, nearly one in six San Diegans lives below or near the federal poverty line. Thus, we have found that partnerships with other community organizations are crucial to combating food insecurity. 

Our mission extends beyond satisfying the appetites of the moment. We have a three-pronged approach to hunger eradication: 

1. 	Educating individuals and the community about nutrition and the disease of obesity; 
2.	Building partnerships with local business so that owners reinvest in the communities in which they are located; 
3.	Sponsoring events to provide nutritious meals for people experiencing food insecurity

Since our founding in 2008, we have served over 20,000 people. The work of our volunteers and the generous in-kind support of area merchants, individuals and organizations have allowed us to continue to move towards accomplishing our mission.

Name: Fondation Jeunes et Société
Description: La Fondation Jeunes et Société est un OBNL qui appui financièrement deux organismes ayant pour objectifs de venir en aide aux jeunes et à leur communauté, ici et ailleurs : Mer et Monde et la Ferme Berthe-Rousseau. Mer et monde envoie environ 400 coopérants par année au Nicaragua et au Sénégal, tandis que la Ferme ouvre inconditionnellement ses portes à ceux et celles qui vivent de la détresse ici au Québec, à travers de séjours leur permettant de se refaire un réseau et de retrouver confiance en la vie.

Name: Food Wise
Description: Volunteer organization formed to help fight hunger through food donation

Name: The Finance Lab, 501(c)(3)
Description: The Finance Lab educates students from underprivileged communities with a personalized, principled, and experiential financial experience.

Name: Love Care & Share
Description: Our mission is to support distressed individuals and families in their time of need, and work towards a greater good. We are tireless in our efforts to feed the hungry and clothe the poor. We help those seeking help in a time of need. Our organization serves people of all races, creeds, and religions. We do not discriminate. We merely support our fellow citizens, and serve as a guiding light.

Name: Summit 7 Group
Description: Equipping organizations with the tools they need to reach their fundraising goals.

Name: 360Philanthropy
Description: Helping nonprofits, donors, and companies create impact through equitable philanthropy.

Name: Jaburg Wilk Foundation
Description: The Jaburg& Wilk Foundation is a non-profit foundation committed to enriching the quality of life for the residents of Arizona by fostering private giving and strengthening smaller service providers. To this end, the Foundation awards grants to local non-profit organizations involved in the arts, education, children, at-risk programs, and other community-based efforts. The Foundation grants are awarded after approval of the Grant Committee.

Name: Forum Wakaf Produktif
Description: Forum Wakaf Produktif berisikan nazhir wakaf uang yang terdaftar secara resmi di Badan Wakaf Indonesia

Name: St. Pete Shush
Description: We are a network of dedicated stewards who curate Little Free Libraries (LFLs) all around the city. These libraries are filled with a high quality and diverse selection of books that are available to all people for free, regardless of background or status.

Name: Breakfast Exchange Club of Ogden
Description: The original purpose of “Exchange” was to create grass roots organizations for the exchange of ideas leading to community involvement and enhancement. Locally, this objective has been refined over the years to specifically focus our efforts on community service to others, particularly support for kids in our schools, for our armed forces and projects that improve our community.

Name: The CC Foundation
Description: The Care & Courage Foundation was established in 2017. It is a non-profit organisation which support's independent local charities, as well as run it's own projects. Our vision is for the foundation to be a sustainable platform that builds a community of volunteers who share the same passion of giving back to those that are less fortunate. A movement that encourages the youth of our generation to act with selflessness by taking part in the foundation’s events, as well as eventually inspiring them to run their own.

Name: MASSAC COUNTY DRUG AWARENESS COALITION
Description: MASSAC COUNTY DRUG AWARENESS COALITION is a drug prevention coalition based out of Metropolis, Illinois, United States.

Name: Penn State World for THON
Description: All efforts go to supporting children battling pediatric cancer and their families. Aiding in fundraising for the Four Diamonds organization, the goal is to assure that pediatric cancer families are helped in any way possible (through financial and emotional support). Penn State World for THON is the first and only THON organization for the Penn State World Campus since being established in 2020.

Name: Newark Parks Foundation
Description:
Kids need parks, not iPads. In fact, all people need and deserve  healthy, outdoor experiences to improve their quality of life. Parks keep us healthy. Parks build community.

According to California Department of Education data for 2013-2014 school year, the health risk of Newark’s pre-teens is more than double and sometimes triple than that of Fremont’s, Newark’s neighboring city, and Newark has not scheduled any new public parks for construction, despite the housing boom.

Mission: To improve health and community for the residents of Newark, especially youth, by mobilizing support for thriving, varied, and accessible parks and open spaces.

Name: LAFETT-MH
Description:
LAFETT-MH (La Force Européenne pour le Transfert de Technologie Médicale et Humanitaire) est une association de loi 1901 fondée en 2005 par le Pr So Satta.
Nos actions :
- Missions de formation des personnels de santé cambodgiens
- Aides matérielles des hôpitaux cambodgiens
- Accueil des étudiants et des personnels de santé cambodgiens
- Mobilité sortante des étudiants français en soins infirmiers et en médecines

Name: IDES-ONG
Description:
La IDES “ Istituto per lo sviluppo della Economia Sociale ”  persegue esclusivamente finalità di solidarietà sociale e ha come principale obbiettivo riportato nel proprio statuto quello di promuovere e favorire lo sviluppo della "Economia Sociale di Mercato".

L'economia sociale di mercato è un modello  di sviluppo ,di indirizzo liberistico, dell'economia che si propone di garantire sia la libertà di mercato che la giustizia sociale, armonizzandole tra di loro. L'idea che sta' alla base è che la piena realizzazione dell'individuo non può avere luogo se non vengono garantite la libera iniziativa, la libertà di impresa, la libertà di mercato e la proprietà privata, ma che queste condizioni, da sole, non garantiscono la realizzazione della totalità degli individui (la cosiddetta giustizia sociale) e la loro integrità psicofisica, per cui lo Stato deve intervenire laddove esse presentano i loro limiti. L'intervento non deve però guidare il mercato o interferire con i suoi esiti naturali: deve semplicemente prestare il suo soccorso laddove il mercato stesso fallisce nella sua funzione sociale.

Name: We Are Kairos
Description:
Los jóvenes tenemos la fuerza, las ganas y la ilusión para conseguir un cambio de paradigma social, un mundo más equitativo. Estamos convencidos de que se puede disfrutar de la vida a la vez que ayudamos a construir un futuro del que todos vamos a ser protagonistas.
Este es el momento. Queremos dejar nuestra huella.

Nuestro objetivo es generar ingresos para colaborar con entidades de acción social a través de:
- Organización de eventos solidarios
- Diseño y venta de productos 

Si quieres saber más o ser parte del equipo, más info en team@wearekairos.es

Name: Kiwanis Club of Downey
Description: The Kiwanis Club of Downey, CA, was chartered in 1924. This is our 90th year "Serving the Children of the World." We are a group of energetic members looking to help the community and make a difference in the lives of children in the City of Downey. The name “Kiwanis” was coined from an Otchipew American Indian expression, "Nunc Kee-wanis", variously translated as "we trade," "we share our talents,” “we make a noise," or "we meet”. This was originally the motto of Kiwanis, translated as "We Build." The current motto is "Serving the Children of the World"

Name: Copake Lake Conservation Society
Description: A volunteer group preserving the ecological balance of the Copake Lake watershed, recreational lake safety, and a thriving community in upstate New York

Name: PROJET[d]AR
Description:
PROJET[d]AR é um projeto que surge com a missão de promover numa sociedade educada para a generosidade.
Pra isso é necessário educar, viver e impactar em comunidade.

Quando é que nos tornamos conscientemente ricos? Quando percebemos que temos algo para dar.
Quando é que nos tornamos realmente ricos? Quando percebemos que temos a coragem de dar.

É dever de quem sabe e consegue dar, de quem experimentou a alegria da generosidade, encaminhar os outros para essa meta. É nosso dever cívico aquele de ensinar aos jovens o caminho para a felicidade, se esse caminho passa por dar, então torna-se automaticamente nosso dever educar para o serviço, tendo em vista uma sociedade futura mais feliz, mais altruísta, melhor…

Muitas pessoas objetivamente pobres, são constantemente ajudadas por nós, pelos nossos projetos e campanhas de solidariedade, que, ainda que tenham objetivos e resultados bons, não ensinam a pescar, dão o peixe. 
É necessário dar oportunidade a crianças proveniente de famílias carenciadas, de entrar em contacto com momentos de serviço e de dom diretamente ligados à alegria. O reconhecimento não deve ser experimentado por estas crianças apenas na medida em que se sentem reconhecidas porque foram ajudadas. É necessário proporcionar-lhes a oportunidade de ajudar os outros e sentir que alguém lhes está reconhecido pois foi ajudado por elas.

Através deste projeto quem ajuda e quem será ajudado é chamado a abrir os seus horizontes, destruir preconceitos, desdramatizar e desmistificar certos estigmas e convenções  que inevitavelmente existem em muitas comunidades.
Somos adultos privilegiados, que foram adolescentes motivados para o serviço e crianças educadas para a felicidade. Somos o presente do Mundo e, conscientes disso, preocupamo-nos não só em deixar um legado positivo, mas em construir um futuro consistente e preparado para lutar com alegria.

Name: Ukrainian Graduates of Detroit and Windsor
Description:
On October 9, 1939, a group of Ukrainian university graduates met at Wayne State University and founded the Ukrainian Graduates of Detroit and Windsor. The original mission of the organization was two-fold: to promote cultural and social interaction among its members and to encourage students of Ukrainian descent to pursue higher education.

Toward that goal, the formal scholarship program was established in 1941 and has awarded more than 500 scholarships to deserving students, a program that continues today. Over the years, the organization initiated and supported drives to aid Ukrainian studies at various institutions. These include: The Harvard Ukrainian Studies Chair Endowment fund; The Ukrainian Free University in Munich, Germany; The Ukrainian Catholic University in Rome, Italy; St. Andrew College in Winnipeg, Manitoba; the Ukrainian Studies Book Fund at the University of Windsor, Ontario; and The Ukrainian Studies Fund at Wayne State University, Detroit, Michigan.

Additionally, in 1955, the Ukrainian Graduates of Detroit and Windsor introduced the practice of honoring an outstanding member of the Ukrainian community with the Ukrainian of the Year award. Each year since, an individual is selected based on activism and commitment to Ukrainian causes. The honorees include local Metro Detroit / Windsor Ukrainian Americans along with those from other states and Canadian provinces. Since 1998, a Distinguished Service Award honors either Ukrainian or non-Ukrainian activists who contribute notably to the success of various cultural and patriotic initiatives.

Name: Missouri State Patrol Foundation
Description:
The State Patrol Foundation is a charitable, 501(c) 3 registered non-profit organization.  It was formed to support the Missouri State Highway Patrol by providing services, equipment, and support which might not otherwise be available to it and accepting contributions from the general public for such purposes.

Operation of the foundation is handled entirely through a volunteer board, ensuring that the maximum benefit is achieved from every donation.

Name: REEO
Description: Resources for Educational and Employment Opportunities (REEO) is a 501 (c)(3) organization that is committed to empowering community college students with the opportunity to transfer to a four-year university, to earn a college degree and to obtain a professional position upon graduation.

Name: Carolyn Foundation
Description: Carolyn Foundation is a philanthropy company based out of 706 2nd Ave S # 760, Minneapolis, Minnesota, United States.

Name: Partners4Climate
Description:
Future is now!
The mission of the Foundation is to support Poland and other countries in the economic and social transformation aimed at achieving climate neutrality, to initiate and support activities and projects aiming to reduce CO2 emission. We are focused on delivering real change on the local and national scale based on boosting leverage points in the area of sustainable projects and building bridges between the current situation and the sustainable future for cities and regions in a multi-year perspective. P4C aim is to deliver a better and more sustainable future for the world.

Name: Sarah Stitt Hope Foundation
Description:
We empower people, families and communities to better their lives through the science of hope.

Hope Driven Parenting
Our program combines decades of experience in child development and child welfare with the evidence-based, life-changing science of hope. It’s designed for all types of parents and caregivers raising all types of kids…easy to understand, easy to implement, easy to reteach

Hope Driven Coaching
This program is anchored in the evidence-based, game-changing science of Dr. Chan Hellman, Founding Director of OU’s Hope Research Center, and the trauma repair research of Dr. Bruce Perry, developer of the Neurosequential Model.
Understanding the NEUROSCIENCE behind a young athlete’s development, behavior and performance—including the impacts of stress and trauma—leads to more effective coaching, training and performance.

Name: Nu Rho Psi @ UCI
Description: We are a community of students at UC Irvine driven by our shared pursuit of intellectual and professional development, and community service within the field of neuroscience.

Name: Cabanas Consulting, LLC
Description:
Cabanas Consulting creates dynamic marketing and philanthropic programs for a wide variety of organizations.   
 
The founder, Katie Cabanas, has raised millions of charitable dollars on behalf of nonprofit organizations and has deployed capital on behalf of individuals and private foundations to create high-impact results with big-hearted vision. 
 
With deep experience across multiple industries, Cabanas Consulting is committed to crafting programs that support your brand in an authentic way.

Name: Solidarité INP
Description: Solidarité INP a pour objectif de regrouper toutes les initiatives solidaires des futurs ingénieurs de l'Institut National Polytechnique (INP), locales ou internationales.

Name: T2SA Community Wellness Society
Description: T2SA, or Teens to Seniors Art Society, is a student-based nonprofit that works to build a bridge between the seniors and teenagers in our communities through forms of art. We work to offer a platform where the two generations can form fond connections and gain mutual enrichment and strive to fundamentally improve the quality of our seniors' care by adding a personal touch through our interactive events.

Name: East Greenwich Education Foundation
Description: The EGEF is an independent 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization that promotes excellence in public education by providing grants to educators to fund creative, innovative and sustainable initiatives in the classroom. The Foundation supports educational programs at all six public schools in East Greenwich.

Name: OC Inspiration
Description: OC Inspiration is about love, sharing, and philanthropy.  We live in a beautiful community, and the moments of inspiration experienced here should be shared with all.

Name: WildHeart Foundation
Description: By gifting physical resources instead of monetary grants, WildHeart’s goal is to provide direct help to wildlife in need. Our hope is to support these animals by giving enrichment items, enclosure needs, food, and equipment. Our focus is on the animals, whether they live in a sanctuary, zoo, or private park, they deserve the best life we can give them. With our help, these wildlife can still feel wild.

Name: Ampuvalia
Description: We offer an integral service which includes the prosthesis that the person requieres to recover mobility

Name: mindthegap foundation
Description:
mindthegap foundation is a 'not-for-profit' organisation with a mission to help schools and communities develop through education, micro-enterprise and renewable energy initiatives.

As a result we hope to protect bio-diversity hotspots in Sierra Leone, preserve rain forest in the Ecuador Amazonian Basin and improve quality of life through education in India.

Our initiatives and projects help people who deserve an opportunity to improve their lives.

As a consequence our initiatives, with your help can deliver realistic and sustainable outcomes.

The people who volunteer on or donate to these projects are the kind of people who want to have a positive impact on the world.

Sound like you? Then you are in the right place.

mindthegap: give something back!

Name: Major Minor Global Youth Forum, Inc.
Description:
Major Minor Global Youth Forum, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization and four-day annual event of panel discussions around globally relevant topics viewed through the lens of art, literature and film created by or for youth ages 5 to 21, hosted in New York City’s Harlem neighborhood. 

Together, through dynamic communication, we will be providing a safe and impactful platform for global youth to express their views on topics that matter to them and to their fellow citizens worldwide.  

Our mission is to advance discourse about world and social subjects using youth-led panel discussions around globally relevant topics viewed through the lens of art, literature and film created by or for youth. This exchange of views and ideas will build greater knowledge and self-confidence amongst participants, which can in turn be applied to internships and future professional positions of interest. It will also provide youth with the inspiration to promote activism, as well as greater tolerance and understanding, as they make their way in the world.

Name: Sacramento Braille Transcribers, Inc.
Description:
ABOUT
For 62 years, Sacramento Braille Transcribers, Inc. has helped people get access to material in braille, large print and tactile images. SBT transcribes and produces a wide variety of projects into braille, from textbooks to menus, from newsletters to tactile picture books. Sacramento Braille Transcribers, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, which is passionate about producing high quality, affordable braille.

Name: RESCUE EXPRESS
Description: Rescue Express, an initiative of MGM Animal Foundation(MGMAF) supports the transport of rescue animals from the southern overpopulated areas, to the northern shelters needing companion animals to meet the public’s demand.

Name: Emprendedores con Causa
Description: Emprendedores con Causa es un semillero de talento que se dedica a encubar y desarrollar talento a partir de capacitación y talleres, para preparar a sus miembros.

Name: Holbæk Business & CycLink
Description: I Holbæk Business & CycLink (HBC) kombinerer vi netværk, motion, business og fundraising. HBC er for ledere, der har overskud og udviser samfundssind og som ønsker at få værdi for den ”investerede” tid. HBC er en kombination af fysisk aktivitet, relevant erhvervsnetværk og socialt samvær. HBC kan bidrage til bundlinje både for dig selv og din virksomhed/organisation – samtidig med at du gør noget godt for andre.

Name: Hair Trade
Description:
Hair Trade is a nonprofit organization dedicated to empowering girls by connecting the dots locally and sustainably.  Many girls have a natural resource – hair-- that is valuable but they are unaware of its potential. Hair Trade utilizes the value of donated hair provided by generous volunteers like you and girls themselves to provide an education for underprivileged and orphan girls in India.

By gaining and education, girls will have opportunities beyond the traditional roles now forced upon them. All girls deserve to be happy, thrive and develop to their full potential!

The Impact

Education has the power to light up every aspect of a girl’s life. Hair Trade believes all girls deserve the chance to escape poverty and thrive. Hair Trade is working with existing schools and orphanages to provide an education in a sustainable way to make a brighter future possible.

Quick facts:
    •	8 million children in India are not in school
    •	35% of women in India are illiterate
    •	Girls are more often discriminated against. Daughters rather than sons are forced to drop out of school and become child laborers to support their families
    •	Without an education, girls are susceptible to child marriage, violence and even death.

Proceeds from donated hair are directly applied to the education of disadvantaged girls (including books, uniforms, and school supplies). Hair Trade partners with reputable orphanages and schools in order to support and improve existing institutions rather than undertake expensive bricks-and-mortar projects.

Name: Child Burn Foundation
Description:
Burns are among the most painful and devastating injuries a child can sustain and survive. As a pending 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, the Child Burn Foundation is dedicated to providing support, grants and other financial assistance to burn survivors, families, institutions of higher education, rehabilitation centers, and the medical community.

Children who experience severe burns face some of the most difficult hardships and challenges throughout their lives. The Child Burn Foundation's success is built on a network of volunteers throughout the U.S. and individual and corporate donations.

The Child Burn Foundation is also the first to of it's kind to integrate a powerful online social community, BurnSocial.  BurnSocial is a powerful social network platform dedicated to burn survivors and the burn community in general. We welcome burn survivors of all ages and their families, educators and medical professionals. BurnSocial includes many powerful features, including SocialDNA, group video chat, and file sharing. With BurnSocial, you can also create groups, events, polls and blog.

Name: Ready2Respond
Description:
Ready2Respond is a Unique Global Collaboration of Partners from the Public, Private and Non-Profit Sectors Committed to Augmenting Low- and Middle-Income Countries’ Readiness to Respond Against Influenza and Emerging Respiratory Viral Pandemics.

Our mission is to assure the world’s readiness to respond to the next pandemic through transformative change in vaccine access and immunization policy, with a focus on low- and middle-income countries.

The emergence of the SARS-CoV-2 virus and the resulting and ongoing pandemic makes the work of Ready2Respond more critical than ever. While influenza programs clearly reduce the annual influenza disease burden, they are also a mechanism to strengthen preparedness for future epidemics and pandemics – including the creation of vaccine delivery systems. Influenza program infrastructure is already supporting the efforts to fight COVID-19 and will be utilized to respond to COVID-19 as vaccines become more broadly available.

As a public/private partnership, Ready2Respond is made up of representatives from governments, industry, academia, non-governmental organizations, and philanthropy – that can collectively accomplish objectives beyond the scope and capacity of any single organization.

Name: Beethoven Found
Description:
"Music in Support of Wounded Warriors"
Utilizing major symphony orchestras, organizing groundbreaking events and combining entertainment, culture and education to raise funds & awareness for wounded warriors and their families.

YouTube:
www.youtube.com/watch?v=EYwzPlbCIH8

Name: Darouna Foundation
Description:
We are a Lebanese based non-profit, non-governmental organization (NGO) dedicated to the region of southern Mount Lebanon.

Our mission is to promote the underdeveloped areas of south Mount Lebanon in six core areas: housing, agriculture and environment,  infrastructure works, humanitarian, women’s empowerment, as well as health and education.

Name: Barrington Children's Charities
Description:
Barrington Children's Charities is a non‑for‑profit charitable organization of dedicated men and women working together to positively impact the lives of children. Run entirely by volunteers, BCC donates monies raised to support and address the social, emotional, physical and educational needs of children within the District 220 area and chooses its beneficiaries based on need.

Our mission is two-fold:
First, we aim to heighten public awareness of children's issues and foster solutions to their problems.

Second, we raise monies to fund a wide variety of important, worthwhile projects benefiting local children. Through our collective efforts and charitable donations, Barrington Children's Charities strives to give the children in the District 220 area a chance at a brighter tomorrow and a more fulfilling future.

Name: COCC Monaco
Description: We are The Champagne & Oyster Cycling Club of Monaco. We get on our bikes to raise money for charity. Every year our annual St Tropez to Monaco charity bike ride takes place in aid of the Princess Charlene of Monaco Foundation.

Name: Float Forward Foundation, Inc
Description: Float Forward was founded out of a passion for helping others achieve a BETTER quality of life while coping with mental health disorders. We want to offer clients, who are clinically diagnosed with a mental health disorder, donated Float Therapy sessions so they can experience the peace, clarity and overall NATURAL mood enhancement that Float Therapy has been providing people since 1964.

Name: Boston Rotaract
Description: Boston Rotaract, newly restructured in the summer of 2005. Boston Rotaract started with only few members, but after a very successful year, now counts 27 full time members and several nominees. Our membership – consisting mainly of college students and young professionals – not only Americans, but also internationals, brings to the organization a vast pool of diversity, expertise and motivation for Service Above Self.

Name: SEFUdk
Description: SEFU (Sustainable Education For Uganda) is a Danish based, registered, Non profit organisation based on the idea that education creates wealth and that a locally founded curriculum makes it viable for the students to plan and build their lives around the local community.

Name: Amitié Franco-Malgache Fihavanana
Description:
Depuis 1993, l'Association Amitié Franco-Malgache "FIHAVANANA" de Montpellier a pour but de favoriser les liens entre français et malgaches, et de venir en aide aux sinistrés de Madagascar, particulièrement aux enfants.
Reconstruction d’écoles
Création d’ateliers pour handicapés
Soins médicaux et chirurgicaux des enfants
Scolarisation et santé des enfants
Envoi de containers…

Name: Association Delta Ceps
Description: L’association Delta Ceps, créée en 2017 par Clément, Maxime et Simon, a pour but d’organiser la participation à l’Europ’Raid 2018. Les trois jeunes électroniciens vont tenter l’aventure du tour d’Europe en 205 avec pour but de déposer des fournitures scolaires dans des écoles d’Europe de l’Est.

Name: Everywun, Inc.
Description:
Everywun makes it easy for people to support causes by:
1.	taking fun, easy actions online
2.	earning "credits" for every action they take
3.	Using those credits to create real world impact (make the world a better place). 

We’ve recently been featured on NPR, NBC, CNET for several reasons but especially for the cause marketing opportunity that we offer to brands.

Today 78% of consumers expect the brands that they buy from to maintain or increase their giving, and 90% of consumers would actually switch from one brand to another if it’s affiliated with a good cause.   

We bring consumers and businesses together in a mutually beneficial way.

Name: BleekerFoundation
Description: To reduce the alarming teen pregnancy rates in Africa through SRHE. To provide mentorship and support to existing underprivileged teen moms in Africa, thereby supporting them to become financially independent.

Name: Ong Mission Dei
Description:
CNPJ 35.518.142/0001-20
 Cursos, Palestras e Congressos
 Capelania Hospitalar, Assitencial e Enlulados
 Ações Sociais
 Cultura e Artes
 Viagens Missionárias

Name: The Heart of Delight
Description: Our mission is to provide, what we consider, the basic necessities for the body, mind, and spirit. We believe that everyone deserves a chance at a thriving existence, which means having clean food and water, a comfortable place to call home, access to free holistic health care, and resources that enable the flourishing of knowledge and creative expression. We want to provide support services for those in need within our immediate communities with the hope of turning our vision into a global enterprise.

Name: The Shahaf Foundation
Description: The SHAHAF Foundation is a philanthropic partnership established in 2010 with the goal of developing and supporting the intentional communities’ movement as a mean to strengthen the geo-social periphery in Israel. Intentional communities consist of motivated young people who have chosen to live a life of social activism in underprivileged towns and neighborhoods throughout Israel in order to address the deep challenges in the Israeli society. Today, 265 communities are spread across 90 cities and represent the broad spectrum of Israeli society: graduates of youth movements, members of religious Zionism, immigrants from Ethiopia and the former Soviet Union, Arabs, Druze and Bedouins. 14,000 members of the movement combine community life with social activism and work together, alongside local residents and local organizations to raise the level of education, enrich the cultural environment, provide better social services and over all improve the quality of life of 800,000 residents. SHAHAF's philanthropic partnership which comprises of 20 foundations, organizations and private donors from Israel and abroad, is leading a long-term strategy to support the development of the movement by grant giving, professional training, cultivating innovation and harnessing partners from local municipalities and governmental bodies to enables their unique activity and contribution a strong and resilient civil society.

Name: TipTap Media, LLC.
Description: TipTap – Dance for Charity is a fundraising platform that partners with the brands you love to turn your :15 sec dance videos into cold hard cash for charities. We’re a small Los Angeles team making 'Doing Good', a habit.

Name: Darussunnah Foundation
Description: Darussunnah Foundation is an international Charity Organization working world wide for the benefit of the poorest and most vulnerable people.
Location: Stockholm, Lilongwe, Ogadougou, Indjamena, Sarajevo, Stone Town, Dodoma, Niamey, Nairobi, Jakarta

Name: Art of Living Sleep & Anxiety Workshop
Description: Learn to stimulate the Vagus nerve - the main nerve managing "Rest and Digest". Learn about the Sudarshan Kriya, known to promote a healthy mind and body. Learn small lifestyle changes to live a healthier life and get better sleep.

Name: Maji Kwa Wanafunzi Initiative
Description: Contributing to the access and availability of clean water to African Children.

Name: Ñuu Savi Project
Description: Connecting philanthropies, Indigenous communities, and funders through sourcing and community engagement.

Name: Apprentis Nomades
Description:
Apprentis Nomades is a non profit organization with the purpose to promote charity, environment conservation and sport. It targets the populations and organizations exclusively accessible sailing in more than 20 destinations around the world.
A sailboat is provided to the organization by the co funders to be used as logistics base for the different interventions. The fixed crew is on a 3 years sailing program around the world.

Name: Project Warmth Kansas City
Description: Project Warmth is an initiative to collect new and gently used coats and blankets as well as cash donations to help people in need during extremely cold weather. The Midwest’s extreme conditions during severe weather—hot or cold—prompted the effort to help people in need. Ultimately, Project Warmth aims to ensure lives are not lost to frigid cold or sweltering heat.

Name: No More Fear Foundation
Description: No More Fear Foundation Corp., is a not-for profit organization formed in the State of New York (USA). It is operating out of New York City as an approved charitable organization. The Foundation offers resettlement services to LGBT asylees in need of legal and medical assistance, psychological, resettlement and social counseling and assistance with the language and community accommodations.

Name: Miss Global Foundation
Description:
Miss Global Foundation #MGFNation is an international foundation. Our motto, "Same love ONE heart. Preparing the next generation."

Global Outreach ~ Our focus is to help make the world around us a better, more beautiful, and happier place by connecting communities with opportunities to build and plan for their immediate needs. We empower the Miss Global Queens and the Royal Court to fulfill their individual charitable aspirations. The Royal Court, staff, and volunteers will raise funds to visit various countries and provide resources to build sustainable communities. We organize fundraisers, community-building events, and create positive lifelong relationships around the world. 

Empowerment ~ Building the right mindset purpose and positive character in the next generation: a spirit of giving and passion towards helping others all around the world.

Education ~ Preparing the next generation and world's future one day at a time. 

Community Development ~ Uniting people, countries and cultures. LOVE is the foundation for building strong relationships. Through our services we can provide hope, and a brighter future. 

Sustainable Living ~ Where...People Live with PURPOSE and GROW Without LIMITATIONS.

"Your greatest accomplishment is the wisdom and experiences you pass on to your children." 
~Miss Global Foundation CEO  ~Tea Mak

Name: Collettivo Clan
Description:
L'Associazione culturale C.L.A.N (collettivo libero anti noia), nasce nel giugno 2012 da un gruppo di giovani residenti della città di Grosseto, fondata con l’intento di promuovere e diffondere la cultura in tutte le sue forme, con particolare riferimento all’attività artistica e alla promozione del territorio.
L’Associazione si occupa di: Residenze d’Artista, promozione eventi e spettacoli, corsi di fotografia, pittura e storia dell’arte, educazione artistica mediante laboratori didattici, organizzazioni esposizioni d’arte, scambi artistici nazionali e internazionali,  progetti rivolti allo sviluppo del territorio, promozione di iniziative turistiche.
CLAN ha sede a CityLab un laboratorio collettivo a Grosseto in Chiasso delle Monache 11b (P.zza San Francesco) dedicato alle arti visive e alla  cultura volto alla promozione del territorio. Nato a novembre 2018 con il Progetto Pop Up Lab, promosso dal Comune di Grosseto e dalla Regione Toscana per la riqualificazione del Centro Storico.

Name: ACEDEVIDA
Description:
A Associação de Cristãos Evangélicos em Defesa da Vida (ACEDEVIDA). É uma organização filantrópica sem fins lucrativos, pautada na Excelência da Ação Social Cristã. Nosso projeto visa o atendimento a crianças que estão nas ruas ou em situação de risco social.
Nosso projeto é desenvolvido a partir de duas unidades. Na primeira delas funciona o Núcleo de Prevenção, onde atendemos crianças de 6 a 12 anos e tem o objetivo de dar apoio aos pais da comunidade que trabalham e não tem onde deixar as crianças.
Já na unidade 2, no Núcleo de Proteção, trabalhamos na ressocialização de meninos de 10 a 16 anos que estavam em situação de rua, maus tratos e abandono. E são atendidos pela ACEDEVIDA em sistema de abrigo.
Nosso objetivo no LinkedIn é recrutar novos voluntários para nos ajudarem a fornecer uma melhor qualidade de vida às nossas crianças.

Name: IN Cure of MS
Description: IN Cure of MS hosts an annual gala to support MS research.  In its inaugural year, the IN Cure of MS Gala was a top 10 "DIY" fundraiser for the National MS Society.

Name: Moments Inc
Description:
LEARN, CREATE, SHARE, INSPIRE.
Free Photography Education For All.

Moments is a 501c3 not for profit that provides comprehensive photography education to the New York City community at no cost to students.  Under professional guidance, students will undergo the 10 weeks program, 5 classroom sessions with 5 field trips to our partner galleries, museums, and studios exposing students to the art and science of photography. At the completion of the program students will use the knowledge and skills they have gained to create a piece of work that expresses themselves, inspires others, and share the gift of photography with the world.

What do we do?

We work with the community and provide free classes every week. Our specially trained educators follow our 10-class curriculum and give every student technical instruction, personal attention, and the opportunity to explore their creativity in a safe environment. Students complete assignments throughout the course to build their skills and develop their eye, and present their favorite work in a gallery show and sale at the end of the program.  We also work with community organizations to provide free one day classes to share the gift of photography with as many people as possible.

Name: La Llama
Description:
La Llama is a non-profit IT consulting company and freelance photography agency established in 2005. 

During its short history has provided IT services to the Spanish Agency for International Development Cooperation (writing requests for proposals) and the Bolivian Government. 

Moreover, has been connected with well known Spanish artist (Sunday Drivers, Quique González, Sidonie) and indie music festivals (portAmérica, Mawazine, ContemPOPránea) for almost ten years.

Name: 知行教育基金會 YesWeDo Fundation
Description:
1  核心價值(Value)

知行教育基金會（Yes We Do Foundation）成立於2009 年，是在香港特區政府注冊的慈善機構。知行教育基金會本著自信自強（Yes）、團隊合作（We）、社會責任感（Do）的核心價值觀，一直努力補足現有教育制度中素質教育的欠缺，為低收入地區的孩子提供同樣優質的群體素質教育。 

 

 2  定位(Positioning)

隨著社會發展，很多欠發達地區的硬件設施已逐漸趨於完善，但眾多體藝課程（音樂、體育、美術、科學啟蒙等）由於不屬於應試教育範疇而往往遭到忽視。同時，現時國內較多的支教項目都是短期項目，沒有辦法為欠發達地區的學生提供系統性的學習經驗。

 

作為全人教育的一部分，我們除了需要為欠缺資源的下一代提供「知識」，更需要為學生提供面對困難、解決困難的「經驗」，以及相信自己能夠成功的「勇氣」，而這些東西正正可以在群體素質教育的各項群體或個人的素質學習當中得到分階段實踐的機會。

 

我們堅信每個小孩都應該擁有整全且平等的教育機會，只有投入教育才能讓下一代的人文素質等到提升。透過通過長期幫助學校征聘體藝教師以開辦系統化的群體素質教育，在興趣培養過程當中的「成功」、「失敗」都能隨著學生的成長而轉化，成為他們日後在不同的生活經驗當中的支持。

 

 3  願景(Vision)

知行教育基金會希望讓每個孩子都能享有優質教育的權利，可以公平地成長，在群體當中建立自我。

我們認為，貧窮以及眾多做成社會分裂的因素，皆源於資源分配不均和社會結構問題。為解決此問題，我們希望透過全面、務實、系統化的群體素質教育，把社會資源投放到下一代的品格培養中，保障每一個欠缺資源的孩子平等地接受優質素質教育機會的權利，讓他們與群體成員一起成長的過程中，建立自信、發展天賦，使每一個孩子的可能性得到實踐。

 

 4  目標(Mission)

我們希望以我們的工作作為平臺，向有需要的學童提供： 

- 素質教育 

- 平等教育 

- 交流融合的機會

Name: Guardians of Heart
Description: Guardians of Heart provides highly-trained, compassionate, and professional character volunteers to the Central Ohio region. Our volunteers receive several hours of training on issues of identity and inclusion, sensory-friendly behavior, and professionalism. Our background in charity work is with children in hospitals or living with lifelong/terminal conditions, but we'd love to expand into other services related to children's well-being in accordance with our mission.

Name: Aid Legion Ukraine
Description:
Aid Legion is the charitable foundation, based in Ukraine. We deliver aid from across the World to the Ukrainian defenders and civilians displaced by the war.

Aid Legion combines the speed of the small foundations with a global impact of the large ones. The foundation is created by a group of Ukrainian entrepreneurs, marketologists, and creatives with a vast network of international connections willing to help Ukraine.

Name: Associação Brasileira Addisoniana
Description:
ABA – Associação Brasileira Addisoniana – é uma entidade filantrópica, sem fins lucrativos, criada em 28/04/2019, em São Paulo, com o objetivo de amparar addisonianos e pessoas portadora de insuficiência adrenal secundária e terciária.

O atendimento gratuito envolve prioritariamente pacientes que dependem do uso diário de medicação e necessitam de acompanhamento médico.

Conta com uma equipe multidisciplinar, com médicos, pesquisadores, psicólogos e voluntários.

A associação também tem como missão contribuir com a sociedade. Por isso, promoverá cursos, palestras e oficinas sobre temas de interesse dos addisonianos e que colaboram para a melhoria na qualidade de vida dos atendidos.

Venha fazer parte deste projeto. Seja um parceiro da ABA e ajude-nos a proporcionar uma vida melhor aos addisonianos.

Name: Kids' Dreams, Inc.
Description:
The mission of Kids’ Dreams is to provide economically disadvantaged youths with academic support and extracurricular experiences in conjunction with mentoring by law enforcement.

Please make a tax deductible donation at our website; www.kidsdreams.org

KIDS’ DREAMS INC is a Section 501(c) (3) Public Charity.

Name: Brujos de Catemaco
Description:
La organización Brujos de Catemaco fue fundada en el año 2015 a travez de su plataforma brujosdecatemaco.org, desde ese año la web veracruzana de brujos, hechiceros y chamanes a venido trabajando para dar apoyo en diferentes campos místicos a personas que requieran de su ayuda en todo el mundo. Los Brujos de Catemaco han demostrado amplia capacidad en realizar rituales de amor, hechizos de separación y limpiezas espirituales. 

Los Brujos de Catemaco ayudan y dan apoyo en múltiples sectores a travez de su plataforma verificada y supervisada constantemente.

Telefono de los brujos de Catemaco: https://brujosdecatemaco.org/telefonos

Name: ANO Eurasian Integration
Description: Автономная Некоммерческая Организация "Евразийская интеграция" создана в ноябре 2012 года для разработки и реализации программы материальной помощи ПМР. Исходя из поставленной задачи, был разработан механизм работы АНО, являющийся, по сути, многоцелевой службой заказчика, осуществляющей свою деятельность в форме благотворительности.

Name: Limelight Shirts, LLC
Description:
Limelight Shirts partners with various charities, foundations, and nonprofit organizations to help them raise money by selling T-shirts that promote their cause.

We like to call it the win-win-win model: nonprofit and not-for-profit organizations receive funding for operations; Limelight Shirts is provided a way to help these organizations; and supporters get a wearable billboard to personally publicize their causes and beliefs. Up to 50% of the profits for each shirt sold is donate back to partner organizations.

Based out of Philadelphia, PA, Limelight Shirts was created to set an example. The Limelight model intends to emphasize that relationships between business--large or small--and the nonprofit world can create fantastic partnerships, connections, and opportunities.

Name: Humanity and Us Foundation
Description:
Humanity & Us Foundation is an Indian non government organisation(NGO), founded by a group of self motivated corporate individuals. It is a humble yet significant effort to construct a bridge between “Humanity & We the People”. We are determined to build a world in which every human being attains the right to survival, protection, development and participation. We are also focused to maintain or improve the quality of life & the natural world around us by preserving, protecting & planting more trees to negate the effects of rapid urbanization & industrialization.

Humanity & Us Foundation believes in the principle of Collaboration, Co-operation, Sharing, Learning and Mutual Support while respecting the individuality. The Organisation is doing charitable work in various fields which includes Child-Welfare, Education, Medical-Support, Women-Security, Environment conservation irrespective of religion, region, gender, caste, creed, race and most importantly socio-economic status.

Name: Streetways Uganda e.V.
Description:
Streetways Uganda is a Ugandan-German cooperation project, which supports homeless children to attend school and all the necessities they need for a living in Tororo and Busia in Uganda. 
We are cooperating with ASHWA in Busia.

Name: Eduxy
Description: Eduxy is a public charity under section 501 (c) (3) of the internal revenue code. We are on a mission to ignite the potential of the next generation, equipping them with the essential tools for mastery through experiential learning in Finance, Artificial Intelligence, Entrepreneurship, and Arts. We forge financially astute, technologically fluent, innovative leaders and creative citizens ready to reshape the future.

Name: Coat-A-Kid, Inc.
Description:
Coat-A-Kid is a St. Louis nonprofit. Our mission is to provide new coats, hats and gloves to kids in the STL area, with the only stipulation being that of true need. We are a 100% volunteer organization with very little overhead. Donations are used to purchase new coats, hats and gloves. Each coat is put on a child by a volunteer-one by one.
We coat kids in the St. Louis Public, Parkway, Rockwood, Ferguson, and Florissant School Districts, as well as, YWCA and Urban League Head Start programs. Since 2001, we have coated over 15,000. STL kids. Our coats allow kids to get to school on even the coldest days, and we feel that education is the best way to end the poverty cycle. We are currently competing in the Brackets For Good Fundraising event and hope that you will help us win the 10,000.00 grand prize. 10,000.00 will help us coat over 400 kids!

Name: Tema Biwole Foundation
Description: The Tema Biwole Foundation is an international charity organization that helps children living in poverty remain in school. The children sponsored through our programs are in great financial need, and many of the children we assist are orphans or children living in emergency situations.

Name: Tanam Berkah
Description: A platform for community who want to spreading goodness with us. Feel free to spread the news and good.

Name: Abigail Children International House Inc.
Description:
Abigail Children International House Inc. is a nonprofit institution founded since 2004 and incorporated by order of the Ombudsman of the province of Santo Domingo in 2007. Our corporate goals are focused on:

1) Feeding orphaned and abandoned children.
2) Helping children with educational problems.
3) Building Child Training Centers.
4) Develop programs and nutrition education for children.
5) To promote Christian values and spiritual growth of its partners.
6) Disseminating knowledge of the Word of God.
7) Work on projects of community development throughout the territory Dominican and the world.

Name: Community Lifters
Description: Community Lifters' focus is providing a hand-up to those in need and encouraging others to volunteer by lifting their community while professionally supporting others in our group. Community Lifters supports other non-profits in Southern Nevada.

Name: Philanthropy Action
Description: Philanthropy Action is an online journal promoting intelligent discussion on giving for philanthropic donors.

Name: Canolfan John Burns Centre
Description:
The Canolfan John Burns Centre is the home of the John Burns Foundation, a charity delivers a wonderful range of programs to enrich the lives of people in the local community. 

Set in a stunning 20 acres of farmland, the centre is a modern, state-of-the-art building with free parking and various-sized rooms that can be hired for events or conferences. The building itself is carbon negative, with several electric charging points and food that can be ordered fresh from the farm.

Name: DACF Belgium
Description: Our mission is to construct a qualitative education system in developing countries. We finance and build schools, we connect peoples and we share our knowledge, all for a brighter tomorrow.

Name: Meow Baari - The Cuddle Creche for Cats
Description:
A loving family to care for your feline babies while you're away on work or pleasure. We provide day-care services as well.

Meow Baari is managed, supported, and run, by animal lovers, who have been involved in rescuing and fostering of at-risk street animals (primarily dogs and cats), as well as extensive vaccination and sterilisation campaigns within the city of Kolkata.

Your patronage will allow us to continue working with street animals, since our earnings from the creche is used to fund our rescue, foster, vaccination, and ABC (Animal Birth Control) efforts.

Name: Grâce des enfants / Grace of Kids
Description:
Grâce des enfants est un organisme sans but lucratif qui aide à soutenir les familles adoptives d'ici, et les enfants abandonnés/orphelins de l'extérieur du Canada. 

Notre organisme est ouvert pour tous ceux qui sont touchés par les enfants abandonnés/orphelins dans le monde!

Name: BrainyCo
Description: BrainyCo is a peer to peer mentorship platform for first-generation college students in the United States. We believe mentors could change lives of many by providing guidance, and a roadmap to help lead students to become working professionals. Our platform solves the problem by automating the connection between a student and a mentor for free. To give it a try, please visit our website and find out how we are empowering the future.

Name: Assas In Vietnam
Description: Association permettant aux étudiants de l'université Panthéon-Assas de réaliser un projet humanitaire durant leur échange au Vietnam.

Name: One Million Words Organization
Description: The One Million Words Organization has been established with the mission to finance, source, and supply new printed books, in local languages or in a second language as per demand at the time, with a word count in excess of 1,000,000 words. Our goal is to supply curriculum based textbooks and fictional works to young learners and schools in remote provinces in PDR Laos, Hong Kong SAR, PR China, and the Philippines, with a special focus on underprivileged children aged 4 to 14. For more information, please visit the official website at http://www.onemillionwords.org

Name: Law Enforcement United Inc., Maryland Division
Description: The Maryland Division of Law Enforcement United was founded in August 2017.

Name: Global Business Brigades at UCR
Description: Global Business Brigades leads university students to under served communities in foreign nations in order to assist them in creating economic and financial opportunities as well as helping them open and maintain new businesses.

Name: Expovoluntariado
Description: Expovoluntariado es un evento que se realizará en la ciudad de Medellín, el cual reunirá en un solo lugar organizaciones y proyectos que tienen una propuesta social diferente con voluntarios que están dispuestos a donar su tiempo para transformar el mundo…

Name: WLA Development Foundation（世界顶尖科学家发展基金会）
LinkedIn URL: https://www.linkedin.com/company/wla-development-foundation（世界顶尖科学家发展基金会）

Name: MenstruHelp
Description:
Une association humanitaire veillant au bien-être de la femme. 
MenstruHelp est une association créée au sein du Sustainable Impact Project de l’EDHEC Business School. 
L’objectif est de lutter et de sensibiliser au sujet de la précarité menstruelle.

Name: Generosity Advisors Network
Description: Generosity Advisors Network is a collaborative endeavor chartered to help local congregations and faith-based organizations fulfill their mission through the appreciation of the gifts God has granted each of us and the building of strategic donor relationships - in short, to practice and inspire radical generosity.

Name: Aazima
Description: Aazima is an initiative for smart economies, where companies and individuals exchange services evenly without the use of a monetary medium.

Name: Fantasy Sports 4 Life Foundation, Inc.
Description: Fantasy Sports 4 Life is fantasy sports + charitable fundraising. Our mission is to increase charitable donations for health-related organizations by harvesting the power and momentum of the booming fantasy sports industry.  We provide fantasy sports players the chance to play on behalf of a charitable cause without having to leave their existing platform.  By targeting dual audiences – fantasy sports enthusiasts and the healthcare community – we seek to use what is becoming America’s newest pastime to help fund and solve global health problems.  As our slogan says, “It’s Not Fantasy to Change a Life.”

Name: CrosscutUSA
Description:
CrosscutUSA empowers homeless people to forge their way up and out of homelessness by connecting them with resources and opportunities.

It is estimated that 1.5 – 3.5 million people in the USA experience homelessness every year.  There are many misconceptions about who the homeless are.  The fact is, only about 20-25% of the homeless suffer from a persistent mental illness and fewer than 38% have a substance addiction problem.  It may seem unlikely, but over 75% have either a mobile phone, regular access to the internet, or both. On top of that, an estimated 30% or more of the homeless population is both able and willing to work without accommodation.

By making use of existing technology, we want to streamline the entire process of case management and create a system that connects homeless people with organizations and agencies, going beyond the typical model of social services. By means of a mobile interface that directly connects the homeless with social workers and other entities, problems will be addressed effectively and solved efficiently. We believe in the power of people to work their way up, and we aim to support their efforts by providing well targeted and accessible assistance, helping people help themselves.

We believe that by leveraging technology and community participation, we can alleviate homelessness by improving efficiency and connecting people to transformational opportunities.

Name: Heiwa Peace & Reconciliation Foundation of New York Ltd.
Description:
Heiwa [hey-wa] Peace & Reconciliation Foundation of New York Ltd. supports annual Hiroshima & Nagasaki peace events in August, promotes awareness of issues relating to the proliferation of nuclear weapons, and general issues in relation to war, conflict and violence, with the intent of taking a proactive approach based upon Eastern religions to create a peaceful world. The Foundation works to give life to the wish for peace.

It creates and supports programs related to peace and reconciliation at the grassroots level, so that ordinary people will learn to live peacefully with compassion and love, transforming violence in our society to peace.

Name: El Amor de Patricia
Description:
Tamara Hillstrom opened El Amor de Patricia in 2010 in San Lucas, Sacatepequez, Guatemala. Since then, the children's home has become a safe haven for abused and abandoned children. In a family-style environment full of love and encouragement, these children have the opportunity to reach their full potential. There are a number of programs and resources managed by the staff, with a holistic approach - nutrition, education, medical, faith - all deeply connected to Guatemalan culture. This is not a shelter, it's a home.

Since 2015, El Amor de Patricia has adopted the village of Yalu near Sumpango, Guatemala, where we help some of Guatemala's most impoverished people with bunk beds, stoves, and water filters. El Amor de Patricia is currently working on plans to build an English Immersion school for the community.

More information can be found at: www.elamordepatricia.org

Name: Connectco
Description:
Connectco help schools build mutually beneficially life-long relationships with past pupils, parents and friends in order to benefit current and future pupils.

We utilize professional experience, sector best practice and benchmarking information to provide the most cost effective fundraising and engagement solution for schools.

Get in touch to find out how the Connectco model could benefit your school community.

Name: МІЖНАРОДНИЙ БЛАГОДІЙНИЙ ФОНД "АРХАНГЕЛ СВІТЛА"
Description:
Философия Фонда: 
«Любовь к людям – это и есть те крыла, на которых человек подымается выше всего» 
Максим Горький

Name: MPC (Movimento de Proteção Colina)
Description: The MPC is a non-governmental institution that acts in the social protection of dogs at risk, which rescued from the streets and violence of the Center for Environmental Monitoring (organ of the Pernambuco's state government). Animals are accepted on a transitional home in a three-acre site - located at Olinda-Pernambuco-Brazil - dedicated exclusively to this purpose. In it, we retrieve the ill health of animals, and promote their adoption.

Name: Impact Global Mission
Description:
Impact Global Mission is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization that addresses the disparities that exist internationally in underprivileged regions of the world. Our mission and vision revolve around creating equal opportunities for marginalized individuals by targeting five key initiatives: child welfare, educational development, health equity, poverty alleviation, and spiritual and mental wellness.

At Impact Global Mission, we believe in the power of compassion, empathy, and service. Through our non-denominational, Christian-based organization, we strive to love all human beings as God loves us, and we are committed to treating everyone equally and with respect. Our dedication to serving communities in need is the cornerstone of our work.

Name: Riders of Hope
Description: Riders of Hope is a non-profit organization based in Washington DC with a focus on the special needs community and therapeutic horse-back riding.

Name: Fondazione Vita Giving Europe Onlus
Description:
Fondazione VGE Onlus  was founded with the objective to promote, support and encourage the development and dissemination of the culture of giving and philanthropy.

We work in the non-profit and charity sector, mainly through the provision of cash donations, with the use of funds coming from donations, in favor of non-profit organizations.

Fondazione VGE Onlus is a Member of Transnational Giving Europe Network from april 2009

Name: UC Davis Men's Soccer Alumni Association
GSS Yoga
Description: GSS Yoga – A philanthropic and non-profit organisation, GSS Yoga intends to bring about awareness in the society and serve humanity through virtuous practices and yogic lifestyle.

Name: Projeto Seja Luz
Description:
Projeto Social nascido no coração de cariocas para fazer o bem e levar dignidade às comunidades do Rio de Janeiro. Focamos nas crianças pois acreditamos que elas são o futuro e a esperança do país. 
Iniciado com somente 4 amigos que sempre quiseram ajudar ao próximo porém não sabiam muito bem como fazer isso, hoje contamos com cerca de 50 voluntários e diversas parcerias. 
Não recebemos doações em dinheiro e não temos patrocínio!
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Projeta Cidadania
Description: O Projeta Cidadania é um grupo de sorocabanos que atua nas mais diversas frentes para melhorar a sociedade como um todo. Acreditamos na mudança da sociedade por meio da educação e do voluntariado. Organizado em equipes, o Projeta desenvolve atividades não só no eixo da Escola de Cidadania, mas também no grupo de trabalho Social e Sustentável, implementando campanhas para auxiliar pessoas em situação de vulnerabilidade social. Além disso, é composto por times de Comunicação e Gestão, responsáveis pelo engajamento dos mais de 200 membros da comunidade que compõem a comunidade do Projeta em grupos do Whatsapp e nas redes sociais.

Name: Ket Doan Association 501(c)(3)
Description:
Ket Doan Association is a community based 501c(3) non-profit organization established in 2001. We are made up of young professionals with shared common interests for community service and volunteer work. While our participation varies in the community, we aim to focus on 3 main strategic goals:

1. To create a network of individuals where people with common interests can connect, learn, and grow.
2. To provide opportunities for those with desire to lead and/or serve our community.
3. To promote the Vietnamese-American culture.

Name: English Singing Contest
Description:
ESC is an annual music playground for students who have a passion for English singing, organized by students in English-specialized classes at Hung Vuong High School for the Gifted, Binh Duong, Vietnam. 

We corporated with philanthropists and organizations in Binh Duong Province and Ho Chi Minh City to host numerous mini-events and a grand musical event with more than 1,500 audiences every year to raise money for charity. In our latest 9th season, we successfully generated 100 million Vietnam dong in profit, all of which were later donated to social protection centers in Binh Duong Province, Vietnam.

Name: Bright Young Dyslexics
Description: Bright Young Dyslexics is a 501(c)3 nonprofit supporting K-12 dyslexics students in the United States. Bright Young Dyslexics provides funding for dyslexia tutoring and assistive technology as well as raises awareness about dyslexia. Bright Young Dyslexics was founded by Carter and Caragan Olles in 2013 when they saw a lack of support for dyslexics in their community. To date(February 2019), Bright Young Dyslexics has raised of $160,000 for dyslexia and impacted the lives of thousands of dyslexic students.

Name: The Little Playroom Foundation
Description: The Little Playroom Foundation supports hospital Child Life programs and pediatric playrooms. We provide in-kind donations to fulfill wishlist needs for Child Life Specialists, help refer qualified individuals to fill pediatric volunteer needs, maintain a referral list of certified therapy dogs, and bring awareness to the importance of pediatric Child Life programs.

Name: American Youth Movement
Description:
The American Youth Movement is a values-driven, NFP 501c3 pending IRS, Community Turnaround Organization with mission to Plant a Seed of a Unique Civilization by Integrating Diversity.

Education to youth and community on potentials of country's diversity, future lying ahead, bring about, revive and strengthen common values to harness the power within our diversity for opportunities of stewardship, leadership, and service.

Empowering youth and community for 21st century challenges by capitalizing on diversity. Programs to empower youth with leadership skills, tools, and qualitis for better and effective contributions to community, country and world.

Name: OneLessBeer
Description:
This is something that was never planned for. Yet, in hindsight, this was
always meant to be. Growing up in the Calcutta suburbs Rimi, a Sweden-based software professional and the heart and soul behind OLB, was reduced to tears every time a hungry child came up to beg. She gladly gave away her pocket money and wished she had more to give. After she got her first job, she started getting involved with charities working with the disadvantaged. Since then, wherever she has lived, she has volunteered time and money to grassroots organisations working in healthcare, education, women’s issues etc. Yet, that childhood regret – a wish to do more, give more – kept bothering her. She realised there were plenty more like her who could do just a little bit more that would make a huge difference to those less privileged. Her idea for setting up a fundraising charity that would collaborate with grassroots organisations in India (at the moment that’s our area of operation as that is the place we know best) met with immediate support from her husband Debjyoti and her college mate Debapriyo. The three of us set up One Less Beer – an idea that can change the attitude towards giving.
We trust that, like us you also get pained by the faces of hungry kids and needy people across the globe. Like us, you also wish that you could do something for them. But lack of time, money etc. often hold us back. So, in OneLessBeer (OLB) we try to keep it simple. You actually do not need to sacrifice almost anything to bring happiness in others’ faces. Would you believe that a single glass of beer in your local pub (€ 7or $7 or £6) can actually feed all meals to a hungry child in India for entire one month??!!

OLB Equation: 1 Beer = 60 meals!!
That is with the cost of your just one beer we can feed a child, lunch and dinner for an entire month ! Is not that simple?
Moreover we are a 100% voluntary organization which helps us to have minimum operating cost and also complete transparency !

Name: Love + Lift
Description:
Love + Lift Inc. grew out of the Facebook KidsCycle pages in the Greater Milwaukee Area.  These Facebook pages still serve as the primary vehicle and online community where our mission is carried out. The original KidsCycle group was started in the Summer of 2014 in the Village of Shorewood with an initial purpose to create a buy/sell/trade page for families to recycle gently used kids' items.  It has evolved and inspired the creation of Love + Lift Inc.

From the beginning, there was an emphasis on treating members with respect even if we disagreed with them.  The group was closely monitored and any negativity or drama was addressed quickly in a fair and direct manner.  A culture of kindness and selflessness was organically created.  This culture grew and grew to the point that Love & Lift Inc. was formed to help spread its mission.

Some now call it the "KidsCycle Tribe."  Some refer to us as "Cyclers."  We have become a community that takes care of each other.  We all have good intentions to help our fellow community members but don't always have a vehicle to easily turn these intentions into a reality.  Many acts of Love & Lift are carried out daily by our members, independently of our organization.  With the creation of Love & Lift Inc. we hope to give members another way to contribute to strengthening our community.

KidsCycle has slowly become so much to so many people.  Giving back to the members in your community is not a new concept... it is just highlighted and relentlessly encouraged in KidsCycle.  Gratitude is shown on these pages daily.  Judging others is simply not acceptable.  There is no room for negativity or tearing each other down on these pages. We simply Love & Lift.

Name: The Michelle McGann Fund, Inc.
Description:
The Michelle McGann Fund’s generous donors make diabetes education, awareness and support possible. We are committed to helping families manage diabetes and individuals live strong, healthy lives.

While diabetes research plays an important role, we’re focused on helping families today. Complications resulting from poor diabetes treatment and lack of awareness and support include hypoglycemia, heart attacks, strokes, blindness and vision problems, kidney disease and more. In 2013, the cost of diabetes reached nearly $250 billion.

Dealing with symptoms, getting good treatment and paying for costly diabetes management overwhelms newly diagnosed individuals and their families.

We help individuals with grants for camp attendance, medication, telemedicinem diabetic equipment, support programs and more. The Michelle McGann Fund also supports healthcare institutions and nonprofit organizations offering innovative programs and services that drive diabetes awareness, education and support.

Our goal is to promote awareness of optimal diabetes treatments and effective disease management so that today’s children become tomorrow’s diabetes success stories.

Name: I Love Hartford, LLC
Description:
Message from Pat Tyman, president & founder:

Over the past month I have been working on the mean streets of Hartford and the experience has truly opened my eyes to the poverty that plagues unemployable minorities, drug addicts, ex-convicts and the mentally/physically disabled. Every morning I pass a homeless shelter on Park Street that is overwhelmed with hungry, tired men all day long. This daily experience led me to start a non-profit organization called I Love Hartford, Inc.

Three weeks ago I started bringing enough food to three or four homeless men to last them through the day. I continued this practice every day for a solid week and the small group of men rapidly grew to upwards of thirty individuals. I started taking personal requests and began bringing them specific clothes, food, toiletries, notebooks, pens, etc. The shelters do not provide basic necessities for these men so items like toothpaste, floss, and deodorant are in high demand within the homeless community. Furthermore, the shelters do not offer any meals on Sundays so I have been providing them McDonald’s and drinks whenever I get the opportunity.

As a Non-profit Organization, I need assistance from other people and larger organizations to raise funds, donate clothes, food, and toiletries so I can bring them directly to those who are in need. Thank you for reading my message and please help spread the word.

Name: Equipping Hope International
Description: Providing the most vulnerable victims of war and disaster with the means by which they can reconstruct their own lives and attain economic self-sufficiency, through Gospel-lead development operations and community building.

Name: The Village Enrichment Program
Description:
The Village Enrichment Program (The Village) is a nonprofit organization dedicated to leveling the playing field for at-risk youth in underserved communities by educating them on the life skills required for success.
 
Our motto: Educate to Empower to Excel. 

Through a widespread volunteer network, we engage the community to provide instruction and mentorship for the youth of their own communities by providing an easy, manageable way for volunteers to give back to the community and play a part in the success of The Village.

Name: Tuljai Foundation
Description:
